clean_body: USAID Hiding Where $7M Gaza Grant Went [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Sues for Records on Rebranding of West Point’s DEI Office [] It seems games are afoot at West Point to disguise its radical diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) agenda. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Defense for information regarding the rebranding of West Point’s DEI office to “Office of Engagement and Retention” (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Defense [] (No. 1:24-cv-02941)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the United States Military Academy at West Point failed to respond to an August 28, 2024, FOIA request for: All documents related to the renaming of and/or elimination of West Point’s “Office of Diversity, Inclusion and Equal Opportunity” (ODIEO). All documents related to the creation of West Point’s “Office of Engagement and Retention.” * All emails related to the matters addressed in Bullets 1 and 2 sent to and from the following USMA officials: Superintendent LTG Steve Gilland, Dean BG Shane Reeves, Commandant BG R.J. Garcia, and Chief Diversity Officer Lisa Benitez. Reporting in August 2024 detailed [] the name change: The West Point Office of “Diversity, Inclusion and Equal Opportunity” is now called the “Office of Engagement and Retention”.... On the West Point page [], there’s not much change beyond the title ... We recently sued [] on behalf of Stand Together Against Racism and Radicalism in the Services, Inc. (STARRS) against the U.S. Department of Defense for records regarding the U.S. Air Force Academy’s diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) plans. In June 2024, we sued [] the Defense Department for records regarding the deletion of the words “Duty, Honor, Country” from the United States Military Academy at West Point’s mission statement. In March 2023, records [] we obtained from the Department of Defense showed the Air Force Academy has made race and gender instruction a top priority in the training of cadets. In July 2023, we exposed [] records from the United States Air Force Academy that included instructional materials and emails that address topics such as Critical Race Theory, “white privilege,” and Black Lives Matter. In July 2022, we sued [] the Department of Defense for records related to the United States Naval Academy (USNA) implementing Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the training of naval recruits. In June 2022, we received records revealing Critical Race Theory instruction at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point [] One training slide contains a graphic titled “MODERN-DAY SLAVERY IN THE USA.” [Emphasis in original]. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES OVER $27M GRANTS FOR USE IN GAZA There’s something fishy in aid to the Middle East. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the United States Agency for International Development (USAID) for records about $27 million in U.S. grants awarded to “Miscellaneous Foreign Awardees” that have been designated for use in Gaza (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Agency for International Development [] (No. 1:24-cv-02159)). On April 2, 2024, we filed a FOIA request with the USAID for: 1. All records identifying the recipients of USAID funding under the $7,000,000 grant allocation awarded on or about November 15, 2023, and associated with Federal Award Identification Number 720BHA24GR00005. 2. All proposals, applications, scope of work documents, or similar records related to any grant award or sub-award associated with Federal Award Identification Number 720BHA24GR00005. Recently USAID produced records [] in this case but is refusing to disclose what organizations received the money. We are challenging that withholding. USAID reports [] that over $282 million was obligated to the West Bank and Gaza in fiscal year 2023. On October 7, 2023, Hamas—a U.S.-designated terrorist organization—invaded southwest Israel [], killing over a thousand people and kidnapping hundreds of others. On November 15, 2023, the Bureau for Humanitarian Assistance, a component of the USAID, issued a $7 million grant [] for “multisectoral response in Gaza.” The grant was awarded to “Miscellaneous Foreign Awardees.” The same day a “continuation [ grant of $20 million was also issued for “multisectoral response.” The involvement of employees of a U.S.-backed multinational organization in the October 7 attack on Israel underscores the importance of transparency in who receives U.S. taxpayer dollars and how they are spent. This is critical to protecting the national security of the U.S. and Israel. NIH GIVES UNIVERSITY $5 MIL TO STUDY IF ITS RACIAL EQUITY INSTITUTE WORKS Using your tax dollars, diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) researchers at a public university will be scanning people’s brains to see if the center it launched in 2021 to address systemic racism has been effective. Our Corruption Chronicles blog takes a closer look: A public university in Pennsylvania is getting $5 million [] from American taxpayers to research the effectiveness of a special center it launched in 2021 to address systemic racism. It is called the Racial Equity Consciousness Institute [] (RECI) and its founders at the University of Pittsburgh claim it is essential because “systemic racism is an endemic public health crisis in the United States that has a profoundly negative impact on the mental and physical health of millions of people—focally, people of color.” Furthermore, according to RECI. Since it was launched by Ron Idoko [], [] who previously worked at the school’s Office for Equity, Diversity, and Inclusion, RECI has worked to eradicate systemic racism by developing a critical understanding of the complex and pervasive ways it operates and establishing strategies to foster racial equity. The institute claims to teach individuals about the racial equity consciousness framework [] by using narrative guides, videos, articles, open discussion and collaborative activities. To develop racial equity consciousness the institute teaches how to recognize racial oppression and advance racial liberation, examine racial identities and address racial biases, embrace racial diversity and grow racial literacy, build racial empathy and enhance racial stamina, acknowledge racial traumas and foster racial healing, gauge racial inequities and champion racial justice. This helps recognize histories and impacts of racial inequity, embraces the inclusion of all racial identity groups, builds compassionate connections across racial differences, and acknowledges emotional, mental, and physical impacts of racial oppression, among other things. The institute uses “structured cognitive behavioral training [ (SCBT) to address and determine thoughts, feelings and behaviors toward racial equity and justice. This is described as an instructional, process-oriented derivative of cognitive behavioral therapy that provides an empowering tool and approach to consciously address and assert one’s thoughts, feelings, and behaviors toward racial equity and justice. The program is designed to help individuals and communities actively develop and embody distinct cognitive behavioral traits toward racial equity through structured learning and practice. “Learners” are encouraged to reflect on and address systemic factors that contribute to racial disparities and develop systemic processes toward racial equity. “Through this approach, we can understand how to take the transformation within ourselves and bring it into a world of structures and systems, transforming them in the process,” according to the RECI website. “Thus, every person committed to antiracism becomes a source of positive change that radiates out into the world.” Sounds fantastic but there is no concrete evidence that it is working. The research funded by the NIH will focus on identifying the effectiveness of RECI training as well as other bias drills on diversity and attitudes that perpetuate systemic racism in healthcare outcomes, especially among marginalized communities. Outcomes of the intervention will be measured through questionnaires and Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) that looks for structural brain changes before and after the program. The randomized trial will involve participants from over two dozen schools. One of the University of Pittsburgh researchers says she is excited about the possibility of generating evidence of the effectiveness of RECI because so far, the center relies on people claiming it has changed their life. The institute’s founder claims he has received overwhelmingly positive feedback from hundreds of participants and has also seen behavioral changes firsthand, but again, no material evidence. So, Uncle Sam will dole out millions to see if the institute actually helps combat the public health crisis of systemic racism. “These inequities are perpetuated through normative, and often unconscious, biases and behaviors,” the Pittsburgh researchers write in their NIH grant document []. “In recent years, academic institutions have devised new policies and initiatives to promote inclusive excellence, and in doing so have put a greater burden on underrepresented (UR) faculty to lead these efforts. Yet, many UR faculty are continuing to disproportionately leave the academy, indicating that academic institutions have not succeeded in their goal of dismantling systemic inequities and making academia more inclusive.” Until next week, [Contribute] [] [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2024, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

|
---
**[](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MTIwMzg1OTA4NDQyOTUzLFwiclwiOjEzODEyMDM5ODM0ODc0NzgzOH0iLCJzIjoiZmIzZjhmZDY1Y2QyMDU2NiJ9)Dear Peter,**
We invite you to join us for an important **United College Park (UCP) Community Townhall** on Saturday, November 16th, at 10:00 a.m. at [Restoration Christian Fellowship Center](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MTIwMzg1OTEyNjM3MjU4LFwiclwiOjEzODEyMDM5ODM0ODc0NzgzOH0iLCJzIjoiZjRmZDZkNzU0ZTZkZDhjYyJ9). While the national election has ended, our work at the local level continues. By staying informed and participating in decisions that shape College Park, we can make a meaningful impact on our community.

| | |
---
|
---
**This Town Hall will provide crucial updates on the following issues:**
| | |
---
|
---
* **Battery Storage Facility Approval on Welcome All Road:
** We’ll discuss the recent decision to rezone land for a $400 million battery storage facility—approved without a public hearing—raising concerns about safety, transparency, and adherence to zoning laws.

* **Sale of Bill Evans Baseball Field and Badgett Stadium Practice Field:
** Gain insight into the recent sale of these valuable recreational spaces, with an emphasis on transparency concerns and missed opportunities for public input.

* **Closure of a Popular Rock Climbing Wall:
** Learn more about the proposal to close this beloved recreational space and what UCP is doing to support residents who want to keep it open.

* **Winter Closure of Park Bathrooms:
** Despite significant investment in park bathroom facilities, the council has voted to close them for the winter. These facilities are equipped with heating and air, and we’re questioning the need for this seasonal shutdown.

* **Recall Effort for Ward 1 City Councilwoman:
** We’ll provide an update on the ongoing recall effort for Councilwoman Jamelle McKenzie, driven by community concerns about transparency and her role in recent decisions affecting College Park.

* **Erosion of Transparency:
** We’ll clarify and provide updates on Resolution 2024-01, which redefines the weak mayor structure, affects consent agendas, and limits citizen input.

* **Upcoming Elections for Wards 2 & 4
**

|
---

|

**Your voice matters.** UCP is committed to creating a space where residents can express concerns, ask questions, and receive direct, transparent answers from community members.
Please join us on November 16th (and bring a friend!) to learn more and get involved. Together, we can help build a better, more accountable College Park.
**Location:** Restoration Christian Fellowship Center, 2455 Roosevelt Hwy, College Park, GA 30337 **Date and Time:** November 16, 2023, at 10:00 a.m.
If you have any questions or would like more information before the Townhall, please feel free to reach out to us at [UCP Contact Information].
We look forward to seeing you there!
**Best regards,** **United College Park**

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: From the bottom of my heart. Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
\-- |
#
---
Team, I first want to acknowledge and thank every single person who made their voice heard by casting a ballot in this all-important election. You did your civic duty, and while the outcome was not what we were hoping for, I’m proud that so many of you took the time out of your busy lives to exercise your democratic rights. For those of you who volunteered your time, your hard-earned dollars, or both, thank you from the bottom of my heart. We face an unknown road ahead. But thanks to the work of this team, critically important races were won that will be necessary to ensure working families, women, immigrants, LGBTQ+ people, and others remain protected. **Your organizing delivered wins for Fight Like Hell candidates across the country.** Senator-elect Elissa Slotkin won her race here in Michigan, along with Senator-elect Ruben Gallego in Arizona. Senator Tammy Baldwin won re-election in Wisconsin and Senator Jacky Rosen won in Nevada. Senator-elect Angela Alsobrooks and Senator-elect Lisa Blunt Rochester both won and will become the first Black women to represent their states in the Senate. In Pennsylvania, Senator Bob Casey is fighting for every vote to be counted as we wait for this race to be called. In the House, many Fight Like Hell PAC candidates won their election, including Laura Gillen, flipping a crucial seat in New York. There are still some candidates whose races have yet to be called, and we know that once all the votes are counted, we’ll be celebrating more wins. On top of that, 7 of 10 ballot measures protecting reproductive freedom across the country passed. Missouri is the first state in the country to undo a full abortion ban, and in addition to Montana and Arizona, all three will recreate the protections set by _Roe v. Wade_. Colorado, Maryland, and New York all passed new protections to reproductive rights. Nevada passed their first of two measures needed to codify reproductive freedom into their state constitution. It’s worth repeating: **This is thanks to the tireless efforts of supporters like yourself. You should be proud.** Now, we move forward and continue the work of solving problems that affect **_all_** of us — no matter who you voted for, what you believe, or where you’re from. It’s moments like these that we must remember we have so much more in common than what divides us. There’s no question that the road ahead will be challenging, but I’m not giving up, and I know you won’t either. I’ll be with you every step of the way. — Governor Gretchen Whitmer
Fight Like Hell PAC
PO Box 15093
Lansing, MI 48901
United States ****[FIGHTLIKEHELLPAC.ORG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97165997/512530113/-1026118285?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC30_20241115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQ5NjlkMzQtYmRhMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aWbaBUgZBoQtOF0B5aP7BhjVKpr4Mdhjof3XzRUDxCo=&emci=9e010553-d2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=fd969d34-bda3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1028753) ** | [info@fightlikehellpac.org](mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org)**|**[PRIVACY POLICY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97165998/512530114/-28805512?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC30_20241115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQ5NjlkMzQtYmRhMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aWbaBUgZBoQtOF0B5aP7BhjVKpr4Mdhjof3XzRUDxCo=&emci=9e010553-d2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=fd969d34-bda3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1028753) ** **** | **Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**

name: Michelle Steel
subject: Please read this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
We’ve fought too hard to give up now just inches away from the finish line.
We can't give up now.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

We left everything on the table.

We spent every dollar we had keeping our ads on the air and reaching voters in every corner of the district.

We gave it everything we had and now we're running on empty. _**[Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0c6165326d25408cb91929683dacb76c&_e=wyphUnJ3YM0OFSyw5eXe6mIJoQ10UiDpj9Z1k6r_0UudvPd2oYA7o9P6CTI3wh_PFUWVCr3BxkyFv5HEbG0REBFwvKRUycOr9YHI5tKgVtcIZuWsiIBYrwQkMcL7f_yOUybvRDAoynx9Y5XjMkrDGVpD4sMdiAMI94IWizd2D9ZTib-8q1OYhyxnnvQZF6TdPupYm-Dn3w7KwdSgcauXGH3VgPaRs8khG_Jw-kVrPtPeG9-AMyII_1h4HF3EyUhMjXvcUWIMWdX226KHklWLU_BIbUmQk5NzTUscHafupadTMayaLG1qsGXIpf2a0fJDfn-zizygpc0QmKABvtAYWqi8Ffb0ZaGVDSZoOhHytdKCcx28QfPHaxsuVmCJYZg4O9jwVbrkZSpzLb3JkcWqil2UoCn16KbAQwghMqH8V8A%3D "Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?")**_ We've fought too hard to give up now just inches away from the finish line.

name: Bob Casey
subject: American democracy was born in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.
Peter, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.
Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.
**[I’m here to tell you that the process is not done, and this race is _not_ over. Can you fund our fight to have all voices heard by splitting a donation of $10 or more between myself and Lucas Kunce right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84193?refcode=em20241115-8672&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8672%2E614464%2EilIrxL)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84194?refcode=em20241115-8672&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8672%2E614464%2EilIrxL) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84194?refcode=em20241115-8672&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8672%2E614464%2EilIrxL) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84194?refcode=em20241115-8672&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8672%2E614464%2EilIrxL) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84194?refcode=em20241115-8672&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8672%2E614464%2EilIrxL) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84194?refcode=em20241115-8672&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8672%2E614464%2EilIrxL) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84194?refcode=em20241115-8672&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8672%2E614464%2EilIrxL) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84193?refcode=em20241115-8672&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8672%2E614464%2EilIrxL)

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Join us in thanking Elon Musk

Fellow American,

Thanks to supporters like you, and allies like Elon Musk, we're _**[celebrating a huge victory](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/uOtd1MzHS6jd9Y7c1dScKw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpGyb6P0TcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3RoYW5reW91LWVsb24tY2FyZC1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfQUZSJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExNV9uYV90aGFua3lvdWVsb25jYXJkLXYxX0FGUl9ucnNjX25yc2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZnVuZHJhaXNpbmcmYW10cG9zaXRpb249NCZhbXQ0PTEwMCZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZVcDc3BjQgpnN3sdOGeekVLEUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**_ as Donald Trump has been elected the 47th President of the United States.

We want to thank Elon for his unwavering support by sending him a thank you card signed by MAGA supporters like you, Friend.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ixYGAS5WwVLZa9L8Cfwi5g~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpGyPQP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3JlY291bnQtYmF0dGxlcy1kbS1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfRUFUJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExM19uYV9yZWNvdW50c25vdG92ZXJzbXMtdjFfRUFUX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZhbXRwb3NpdGlvbj00JmFtdDQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmc3Ch44Z8sISCdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Friend, thanks to YOU, we won back the Senate.

Your support fueled our movement, kept our ads running, supported our field teams, and delivered a **[Republican Senate Majority!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ixYGAS5WwVLZa9L8Cfwi5g~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpGyPQP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3JlY291bnQtYmF0dGxlcy1kbS1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfRUFUJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExM19uYV9yZWNvdW50c25vdG92ZXJzbXMtdjFfRUFUX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZhbXRwb3NpdGlvbj00JmFtdDQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmc3Ch44Z8sISCdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Together, we've ensured that Chuck Schumer will not have power -- and that President Trump will have an America First majority to get to work for Americans next year.

But our work isn't over.

**[--> In PA, Dave McCormick is hanging on but facing a possible recount.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ixYGAS5WwVLZa9L8Cfwi5g~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpGyPQP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3JlY291bnQtYmF0dGxlcy1kbS1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfRUFUJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExM19uYV9yZWNvdW50c25vdG92ZXJzbXMtdjFfRUFUX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZhbXRwb3NpdGlvbj00JmFtdDQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmc3Ch44Z8sISCdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Here at the NRSC, we're preparing to send field teams to all of these states to offer support -- and we're preparing for a legal fight.

As you know, recounts are expensive and Democrats are going to do everything they can to stop us.

_**[Our ask today is that you'll pitch in just $10 to support this critical effort. Make your donation to the NRSC's Emergency Legal Fund here: NRSCEmergencyLegalFund/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ixYGAS5WwVLZa9L8Cfwi5g~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpGyPQP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3JlY291bnQtYmF0dGxlcy1kbS1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfRUFUJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExM19uYV9yZWNvdW50c25vdG92ZXJzbXMtdjFfRUFUX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZhbXRwb3NpdGlvbj00JmFtdDQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmc3Ch44Z8sISCdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**_

Thank you in advance.

-- Republican Senators

name: Your America News
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits...

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqqjfui5prrget0suuudf641pm03jknhong9f2ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim4p34c9h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdu56hjg9pge8l2chpef7oc661shuhfo4980v130_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim4p34c9h2bs) [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj9pan3alg59mi6u6mqup1sp6131f3976jat5g38_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim4p34c9h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9o00c3uv56l6jm7dd0qiauv5pfji2g195k00kqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim4p34c9h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo3msfv3nue5to2alu0u8iogdf1v90anuoui3tno_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim4p34c9h2bs)
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj3i7ja2toi5qpuqna0grq7dmepmapudei368t3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim4p34c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj5c3jm8oj24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoptdig2ogft18pr5ln6oq7gqon19e9c7aqrl0t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim4p34c9h2bs)_

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The next generation needs this
body:
We’re in a moment of national reflection.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze0i67kmi0dkeo7lf35ebvevrivmthsaknifv5ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimco36chh2bs)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zspi79qe57r1f1s883tusq5sku14lvfrrgm42dpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimco36chh2bs)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9csueitt9k8ak7g3g9sitqtrpsihoivopc8mtko_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimco36chh2bs)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi4i3u7dfpsod4iaajvp8b3i56gnk2f8fcqp072g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimco36chh2bs)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd0bg15o3pa80qgrj5b6mbivm03r3skedrovk4m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimco36chh2bs)
---
In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq1btcd1nbehgnq634lff01n7mngn4n88nmmop40_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimco36chh2bs)
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5s4vpl8q23ogjs52p1rp249t0ds3qmv4mabvqu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimco36chh2bs)
---

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: The New York Sun
subject: The New York Sun is different
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear Fellow American,

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced
first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism
- mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to
get things right.

In today's media landscape there are far too many publications
that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places
principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by
President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I
faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient
effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal
arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor
Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves
students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I
find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything
that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with
confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important
recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it
faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to
the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I
highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts
now.

Join the Sun Now →

Alan Dershowitz

Columnist for The New York Sun

The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New
York, NY 10022, United States

Too many emails? Manage your email preferences or unsubscribe.

Done with the Sun for good?

Your privacy is important to us.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z25ucm07v535m79ftslu631sla4s30h8skuk86oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk58u5arurf1kg0nr92dj6olbksk1ijro4bf95oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl2nd34nku72aj2oofqtsbgkrhflipg5f87uclr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpedbhhehigf3tlf7i57crbm52rkla2f6klsjrlg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpim1pr2chh238h1e8he4937cpi6epb1c3j61oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsnlbfvp6ulcknljsk0vj3l8dkut5hd3l3up60s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs)_

name: Happily Ever After
subject: We’re back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
With a story of the GREATEST VICTORY OF ALL TIME.

Friend,

We're back, and this time, with a story of the **GREATEST VICTORY OF ALL TIME.**

This story won't take too long. To everyone's surprise, the Election was quickly called - _in the early hours of November 6th_ \- for Donald J. Trump. It was nothing short of a LANDSLIDE in both the Electoral Vote AND the Popular Vote.

But, we don't want to give EVERYTHING away up front. So, keep reading to hear about a Presidential Election that will go down in HISTORY for the rest of time.

_[**If you're in a hurry and would like to skip right to the part where we ask you to give a few dollars to show your continued support, then please follow this link or use the button below.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgu2neuktodn5pg9i51a4fnpki9h909l28vqdauo_)_
**[SUPPORT TRUMP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuubdf95oofrnkhnga2appe3s4g0jtat4bufs7qg_)**
---

* * *

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqeoj59d23lf5jbbs0ce8u6i6m6pti6lh5jkg6qo_)

The year is 2015, and Donald J. Trump chose to leave his successful life behind to answer America's call for change. It all started with one escalator ride and a bold declaration that he would Make America Great Again. With that, a movement began - a movement that would shake the very foundations of politics.
**[SUPPORT TRUMP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zltqefbbqs79rf6gdtluf6c19jslend6dk0v3ka0_)**
---

* * *

**2016 - A Movement Takes Hold**
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8rg6glid3oge2lbpflf7ad88d9194te3a437q8o_)
It was a fight no one saw coming. Seventeen rivals and a media machine determined to stop him, yet Donald J. Trump rose to defeat every opponent in the most competitive primary in history. The mainstream media, the political elites, and even the Clinton machine were in disbelief. They labeled his supporters "deplorables" and crafted rigged polls. _But the silent majority spoke,_ **and on November 8th, 2016, Donald J. Trump became the 45th President of the United States.**
**[SUPPORT TRUMP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn9n5hdhkqhvkifll50qi2v5onj7lfns7ur5e1sg_)**
---

* * *

**2017-2019 - Building a New America**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhvd1nu3g5aq696s02thvlq40kt0qhtq5974p0s8_)

Donald Trump's leadership brought unprecedented success. He cut taxes, strengthened the military, and _created the strongest economy in history._ Factories returned, **the border was secured,** and for the first time in years, _Americans were winning again._ The swamp fought back with impeachment hoaxes and relentless investigations, but he pressed on, never wavering in his commitment to the American people.
**[SUPPORT TRUMP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1bh5i5ect7ch4o6un24td8kdpkkjovhf0e64tg0_)**
---

* * *

**2020 - The Fight Intensifies**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znsg9oic7g8fp8dng7nvne07hq5bt6jo7cgmmg60_)

In 2020, Donald J. Trump faced an unprecedented election. COVID changed everything, and Democrats capitalized on it. They pushed for massive mail-in voting and chaotic voting rule changes. Against all odds, Trump held the lead early on election night. _But by morning, the results changed._ **The media crowned Joe Biden as the new president, and America was left questioning its democracy.**
**[SUPPORT TRUMP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn95javobqu1rc2pbldvfivh4k2eepkaj4f71gso_)**
---

* * *

**The Never-ending Persecutions**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2279otht5devmqi4kmvo9djnlo1numec94u987o_)

The left tried everything. Countless investigations and even an **unconstitutional raid on Mar-a-Lago.** _They weaponized the justice system_ and launched baseless "witch hunts" to stop him. The Democrats made history by convicting a former president, hoping to silence his voice. They said he was "a threat to democracy," but his supporters only grew more resolute. No weapon formed against him could prevail.
**[SUPPORT TRUMP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmc18ahpkj9cnp5qo2dv0u4mol51s659o8ffmc9o_)**
---

* * *

**2022 - The Beginning of the End**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhuonv6opm5bk7lqf7a97mh6fvtjdjil1evlgsco_)

In 2022, Donald J. Trump declared his 2024 candidacy with a single mission: **to save America.** Determined to stop him, Democrats pulled out every trick in the book, indicting him in four states and launching every attack they could muster. But the people stood firm in their support, knowing that Trump's vision for America was what they wanted - _four more years of his leadership._

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq5v3pegv62v05gp8bq99kfjbuatj681jbbd83c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgodq6lq72vb4o4mu4rgs3h7jr6bs9ahmaajtmd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfmv77vi56s3c2tb8vfli9jev2vt669hnak279k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs6t2vtklrjfqtb5nb4s3od2ro2kjko0amdg310g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zve190qpk8n4i7n1fmqj0dt1e5vdrg070euds2ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs)
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits...

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc2oltlpri6luqq00pdu0q0c09nrdc87gfgll3o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmf5mf1d69s6h6mglv85k8l29lgcnp42qdsv74l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvpl5vflqh7ele0amsq1vfjf7nomrq354a22sgfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoql8i9eevano33o5rme4nlmeds49nvo08rjuafo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdv93pokqfuufqjaq7eehb0j9g5kv99frb6o9va8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o76c3h2bs)

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Big Tech vs. the Babylon Bee, Round 1,267,310
body:
When Elon Musk bought Twitter

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvccbu61lcblvs47guckvpkvr8ccmfeohrclaaao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o74cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor."
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z54m283s2do24aaeub6keib6st4ja73fr4i8qt9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o74cjh2bs)
---
We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well.
---
* **Facebook** has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions.
* **Front** , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world.
* And, in a particularly ironic move, **Vimeo** permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk **I gave on censorship. **

---
**It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy**. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. **No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us**. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. **But we won 't give them what they want. **We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the _truth_.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkh1rj913e445ka9ml1smvaujvqe6rvds3oqndbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o74cjh2bs)
---
Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. **The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber**. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. **[If that sounds like you, I hope you'll consider subscribing to the Babylon Bee. We'd love to have you in the fight for freedom of expression.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zed7v0otjf03jl5mmd18jbvhd7uu37rrsh4h2970_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o74cjh2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf3ge3frqceqbasfru0h4tsa61mfo4k1ift7ucn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o74cjh2bs)
---
They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. **[Join the fray with us by becoming a Babylon Bee premium subscriber today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z295tshrjpnh0nfchil6tqv69iq477e3qi1m028g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim2o74cjh2bs)** Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too.
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee
Pronouns: Bee and Beeself
---
|

clean_body: When Elon Musk bought Twitter | | | | Friend, When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor." We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well. Facebook has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions. Front , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world. And, in a particularly ironic move, Vimeo permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk I gave on censorship. It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. But we won 't give them what they want. We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the truth. Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too. Seth Dillon CEO | The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself | Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is:** The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits...

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zm5o6us2a1qlshg0f4uknkvp4bfqsue7rs2ffe4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimapr0cdh2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1t54dogamd4mnoqnuj5pnp7i2k5ghsmif60h0k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimapr0cdh2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfpl9iltn5d51mcc44ksv4kggd2n9bv3ruq512h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimapr0cdh2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zukipo85dq9rs2h35h0sialj6egenkha5t2ugog8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimapr0cdh2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlkcf8fp3t6gio8brv55bmm7ietvgu5qf4b0b7ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctimapr0cdh2bs)

body:
We’re in a moment of national reflection.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zujicdc43kp36alid49pso7vthf4e8hj72a869ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim6or6cjh2bs)

Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0tb630ga90rnghdc13345oavkqq8c7kkhd7vd7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim6or6cjh2bs)_

---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj5att8k5dnhdsr0ufidm2egtn8e3rlqst1hpil0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim6or6cjh2bs)**_

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Let's help Amanda Chase return to the Senate
body:
| | |
---
|
# Let's Send Amanda Chase Back to the Virginia Senate
ONLY 3 WEEKS TO GO
---
| Greetings!
The establishment is pouring money into one particular Senate District 10 candidate, and you know it's not mine.
Please make a generous donation today. They are coming after me, again.
The Richmond establishment is employing a paid door knocking operation and their mailers are ready to go for one candidate in particular. They are simply waiting for the announcement of the exact date of the Special Election, so they can add the date to their mailer. That announcement will take place this coming Tuesday, November 19, when we all find out the date, location and time of the Senate District 10 Special Election.
If you receive tons of mailers in the mail over the next few weeks, you'll quickly figure out who this particular candidate is that they are supporting.
And make no mistake. I'm sure I will be the target of all of their attack mailers, because they know that I'm the front runner in this now crowded field of 6 candidates vying for this seat.
All of the Richmond lobbyists and attorneys have been given the wink and nod to put in thousands of dollars into this one particular senate campaign, because they know she will carry their water for them.
They know that I'm a grassroots candidate who has refused to take money from political action committees and lobbyists since 2019. That's right. I don't take money from PACs or lobbyists, so I'm really counting on you.
Please give your biggest and best donation today.
We're less than 3 weeks away from the Special Election, which we've been advised will likely be next month, in early December. Will you please give $25, $50, $100, $250 so that I can run a successful winning campaign?
You don't have to live in the district to donate. And your donation will help me to communicate to voters, who have no idea there is a Special Election this December.
Please click here to donate online or for instructions on writing and mailing a check. Your donation today, will help me return to the Senate, so that I can be the vocal, strong voice for our conservative values that you've been able to count on for 8 years, while I served you as a State Senator from 2016-2023. I'm experienced and a proven conservative with a voting record that you can count on.
Do you want a candidate beholden to the people or to the lobbyists? Please give your best donation today.
For God & Country,
---
---
---
Republican Candidate for Senate District 10 Mother of 4 adult children Jesus is my Savior Virginia Tech Hokie, Degree in Business Virginia State Senator 2016-2023 Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel Pro-America First Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/CPAC) Family Foundation, 100% VCDL Virginia Citizen Defense League, 100 % NFIB National Federation of Independent Businesses, 100%
---

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Can you think of a $44 billion joke?
body:
When Elon Musk bought Twitter

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zahve7r9c04ivkhm3bb0heik88vf6jgvh54v8gng_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim1ob2chh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor."
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb8a0uotu7ijg0tukvl7lgkfrtsm1js3suoupu30_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim1ob2chh2bs)
---
We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well.
---
* **Facebook** has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions.
* **Front** , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world.
* And, in a particularly ironic move, **Vimeo** permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk **I gave on censorship. **

---
**It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy**. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. **No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us**. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. **But we won 't give them what they want. **We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the _truth_.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs78bu8rc95jclgtn7vmdcvld55g78kg9l4g0q8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim1ob2chh2bs)
---
Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. **The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber**. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. **[If that sounds like you, I hope you'll consider subscribing to the Babylon Bee. We'd love to have you in the fight for freedom of expression.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4ou18gndnrgragos38gpjpddfulnlkgru50apfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim1ob2chh2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z631d09irn40nmo5squrmrekohsic8aojt2tq5q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim1ob2chh2bs)
---
They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. **[Join the fray with us by becoming a Babylon Bee premium subscriber today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8kvrvvcia0h11t00armbptta7vcrjvmig4622po_rp22sh2s8i6epj4ctim1ob2chh2bs)** Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too.
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee
Pronouns: Bee and Beeself
---
|
---
_Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468
---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zabvdhi31s4npe9ni84lv3faudoaqbotkgv73iv0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6chjmao71c9i649fg)

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits...

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mr_rj2mPSxWWEBeJBxGfwg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGwKIP0SfaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIwODYmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJmFmZl9zdWI9Uk0tQVZELTIwMjQxMTE2JmMyPXBvcDExMDEyNGEmYWZmX3N1YjM9M01PMTk2VCZhZmZfc3ViND17dHJhbnNhY3Rpb25faWR9VwNzcGNCCmc3Vms4Z6bcDhVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mr_rj2mPSxWWEBeJBxGfwg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGwKIP0SfaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIwODYmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJmFmZl9zdWI9Uk0tQVZELTIwMjQxMTE2JmMyPXBvcDExMDEyNGEmYWZmX3N1YjM9M01PMTk2VCZhZmZfc3ViND17dHJhbnNhY3Rpb25faWR9VwNzcGNCCmc3Vms4Z6bcDhVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mr_rj2mPSxWWEBeJBxGfwg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGwKIP0SfaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIwODYmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJmFmZl9zdWI9Uk0tQVZELTIwMjQxMTE2JmMyPXBvcDExMDEyNGEmYWZmX3N1YjM9M01PMTk2VCZhZmZfc3ViND17dHJhbnNhY3Rpb25faWR9VwNzcGNCCmc3Vms4Z6bcDhVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mr_rj2mPSxWWEBeJBxGfwg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGwKIP0SfaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIwODYmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJmFmZl9zdWI9Uk0tQVZELTIwMjQxMTE2JmMyPXBvcDExMDEyNGEmYWZmX3N1YjM9M01PMTk2VCZhZmZfc3ViND17dHJhbnNhY3Rpb25faWR9VwNzcGNCCmc3Vms4Z6bcDhVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
