"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**

When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a873bae633974a0692aa76ddfad3a05e&_e=ExxB4avH4WHkeGkncI72ZfOM5fVlNrKogDXEUg3uC8yb41gkdOpsEQnyXuCpXE8V0nO78nsfkdbygZEaKTrJKtqm6LScXZk2-6psjQm9NFxPJjsU5yWbn0W8jngcpeVoziPQz2WjIGUTr82VzQ55wtAoE4ZcRBrWRhXC-31Xbw7j4MQ0GrSOmTgbYwoK3lfxEQLm5v4xKiAfVcwAYw4bxD_bHBdnB8JepaMC7MTYK-3a_CC8Y4hFviPJg2q5a7S-EBEE1bxYCGtLLEQbQWg4CCYKzJUdlEdfkPEfkUapvS60lRhbXZ6qdeVIp_Kcbgp1hfucxLm_AWSKrl8tVuCfCyJZckCxA6srFG3kq3kMEL_B0eMbRqRjvoZ69xMSganCWk3V78-3p5nBjdPyE7iblA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a873bae633974a0692aa76ddfad3a05e&_e=ExxB4avH4WHkeGkncI72ZfOM5fVlNrKogDXEUg3uC8yb41gkdOpsEQnyXuCpXE8V0nO78nsfkdbygZEaKTrJKtqm6LScXZk2-6psjQm9NFxPJjsU5yWbn0W8jngcpeVoziPQz2WjIGUTr82VzQ55wtAoE4ZcRBrWRhXC-31Xbw7j4MQ0GrSOmTgbYwoK3lfxEQLm5v4xKiAfVcwAYw4bxD_bHBdnB8JepaMC7MTYK-3a_CC8Y4hFviPJg2q5a7S-CV_7vxvAstGWOHsgXVHPQaJhAZHvwVuyz0vaYnXfMhAnxTXKfIezRoFdESOo0-J7Rjm9xYh_z7ZZGIrzhFhfkj7Nqr9XQhK47YEyeqIchGrabwCxg6N92AXntKIa2WOJxuk0n4reiLmfG-DhM4aJ-g%3D%3D)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a873bae633974a0692aa76ddfad3a05e&_e=ExxB4avH4WHkeGkncI72ZfOM5fVlNrKogDXEUg3uC8yb41gkdOpsEQnyXuCpXE8V0nO78nsfkdbygZEaKTrJKtqm6LScXZk2-6psjQm9NFxPJjsU5yWbn0W8jngcpeVoziPQz2WjIGUTr82VzQ55wtAoE4ZcRBrWRhXC-31Xbw7j4MQ0GrSOmTgbYwoK3lfxEQLm5v4xKiAfVcwAYw4bxD_bHBdnB8JepaMC7MTYK-3a_CC8Y4hFviPJg2q5a7S-Y77Y0zVUUdVYLcjUgiT94IoRgI_5bz3wa6BBZsDcm51taHLeLPjYg1l1Sg1rP-o0YUUfhLlK8J9nPKtQUfGjgiwMaxd75nvaclFX5V8cjWVQETka84N6zTdT5IN_KymYtlkl1u2CXY7bJGZ5VOD85Q%3D%3D). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a873bae633974a0692aa76ddfad3a05e&_e=ExxB4avH4WHkeGkncI72ZfOM5fVlNrKogDXEUg3uC8yb41gkdOpsEQnyXuCpXE8V0nO78nsfkdbygZEaKTrJKtqm6LScXZk2-6psjQm9NFxPJjsU5yWbn0W8jngcpeVoziPQz2WjIGUTr82VzQ55wtAoE4ZcRBrWRhXC-31Xbw7j4MQ0GrSOmTgbYwoK3lfxEQLm5v4xKiAfVcwAYw4bxD_bHBdnB8JepaMC7MTYK-3a_CC8Y4hFviPJg2q5a7S-WiJ9ahl4wqxzJBILbYRb4WU7hf1Cs7TUDeq8L6dC3EGI3w6gwfSF4EnWyZOMS-w11jBdbPXkv17OhTFjZTjYXJ_qKY-b1WpLsgTifWq5IseO2nseTB-G5V14DvcZxOnGlYzPWphrmxTS_f9vUu1jXg%3D%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Dr. Ben Carson

subject: America’s students deserve MORE

body:

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94d55512-ba4e-425b-b100-d343fbab2890/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, with Trump coming (unfortunately) back to the White House, our nation’s schools are facing a CRISIS. Trump has been all too clear that he wants to gut the Department of Education – and that’s going to leave MILLIONS of schoolchildren to suffer. The Department of Education provides crucial funds for programs like Title I to help improve education outcomes for low-income children and IDEA which provides schools with money so they can meet the needs of students with disabilities. Ripping away funding to these life-changing programs would damage the futures of children who need that help the most – and it’s straight-up cruel. We need to get the resources together RIGHT NOW so we can fight back against any attempts to damage the Department of Education. [If you believe in the DoE’s value and want to help keep education a national priority, will you chip in $10 to Blue Amp Action today so we can fight to protect the Department’s important services? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T623fa758-9895-4963-a680-3ffe66126988/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Thanks for defending education. \- Blue Amp Action

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3755bdf9-8d62-4581-81e8-572b04c4ffcc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Full Mag News
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits...

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee3555b15f9643cea6ec7108c1c5d429&_e=52Tmr6j05TTpQeGYTCafcJ_d-J7luNEJAhYVtyFSw89xVq5x2EvfUY_6ENhU3S_NT0X0R8CsccR__YCi4N6KBITtvEz34WpHufIAWAtNHYfnnvUGoWKf0MNg9w95LW0OiatnJmnZ255rIsyJeJyKrOQn3Pfm_eCXtvo9Y6Qg1ryq6fnJEdQ_W4GNVx5hfc0QXKkIcD11QkRSd1pf3k1ctlqleEaxh9uWQb6Or4QEOU2KavmU9br10HKcCsnrAFa6DPtB-PqwHgnEqee33-Zg-VqisD9W2IFc7-qUUY8F8t0IzrlVgVCQV_Grfsa0li4ey5EQFUKp9ME6ZyBLo1SXpVZvoxBG8Vxx7jDVQCEFvWNpKkkowI90jcKyiIEsZgga), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee3555b15f9643cea6ec7108c1c5d429&_e=52Tmr6j05TTpQeGYTCafcJ_d-J7luNEJAhYVtyFSw89xVq5x2EvfUY_6ENhU3S_NT0X0R8CsccR__YCi4N6KBITtvEz34WpHufIAWAtNHYfnnvUGoWKf0MNg9w95LW0OiatnJmnZ255rIsyJeJyKrOQn3Pfm_eCXtvo9Y6Qg1ryq6fnJEdQ_W4GNVx5hfc0QXKkIcD11QkRSd1pf3k1ctlqleEaxh9uWQb6Or4QEOU0VnqcKFbegVkrCLCLKBkKe1g76oqz6lUPEc2rONm69fXVCpFixafs5WFeOkOxpchiaHuUOkQwDs-aUWvn38UwW3P1I9A5qmrsTebWW0bVGYKTRzYDpM-K6mvEZmSB2-57kG_fZCQFywkHv0pHtVGci) [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee3555b15f9643cea6ec7108c1c5d429&_e=52Tmr6j05TTpQeGYTCafcJ_d-J7luNEJAhYVtyFSw89xVq5x2EvfUY_6ENhU3S_NT0X0R8CsccR__YCi4N6KBITtvEz34WpHufIAWAtNHYfnnvUGoWKf0MNg9w95LW0OiatnJmnZ255rIsyJeJyKrOQn3Pfm_eCXtvo9Y6Qg1ryq6fnJEdQ_W4GNVx5hfc0QXKkIcD11QkRSd1pf3k1ctlqleEaxh9uWQb6Or4QEOU3J-Mrc0ueuA9_4pbdxzsY0jchzl8RfxCGE831Mj3fDNpVXeGNT298zc4YWAuwjAkDkzCNROxw8nJJxMt8mzvCwU2ku9X14bcc9dGa78K5Iwgt0qeFL54JN_8aaf2QeKhSRKdL7nyVHN2E_CBJuplLq) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee3555b15f9643cea6ec7108c1c5d429&_e=52Tmr6j05TTpQeGYTCafcJ_d-J7luNEJAhYVtyFSw89xVq5x2EvfUY_6ENhU3S_NT0X0R8CsccR__YCi4N6KBITtvEz34WpHufIAWAtNHYfnnvUGoWKf0MNg9w95LW0OiatnJmnZ255rIsyJeJyKrOQn3Pfm_eCXtvo9Y6Qg1ryq6fnJEdQ_W4GNVx5hfc0QXKkIcD11QkRSd1pf3k1ctlqleEaxh9uWQb6Or4QEOU19Lr7DN4sKiumAAp00uQgj9TUO3OPkWom1hsv30F0DNSCxsrMMHxilawmUmmasEwOLaDX3NRn9fCK0Do5aFoE3L2kmWnQgb8Fui4C87XiEn8BnTwclVPs-oj6NxQLu79DvnHP8mrQfoo2KnmlHsaks) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee3555b15f9643cea6ec7108c1c5d429&_e=52Tmr6j05TTpQeGYTCafcJ_d-J7luNEJAhYVtyFSw89xVq5x2EvfUY_6ENhU3S_NT0X0R8CsccR__YCi4N6KBITtvEz34WpHufIAWAtNHYfnnvUGoWKf0MNg9w95LW0OiatnJmnZ255rIsyJeJyKrOQn3Pfm_eCXtvo9Y6Qg1ryq6fnJEdQ_W4GNVx5hfc0QXKkIcD11QkRSd1pf3k1ctlqleEaxh9uWQb6Or4QEOU1JYlBbssypGrwat4SIl0blLW4axFvUW73XKaUiGsys7mVXmZgWmEGOTHOYOwtCxN2F5e08ikRs_OQEEM3_UDZODY-UeI6C9-ASEcfu3wFI5g62InCmn1OPAjMa0-RenOT-FDGzhI8ZaPIOxbEHjSsp)

This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f529f90fc1c1447ba614958f089d4494&_e=QXKC18jn4boy_D1B66aB8QmuT4WAC-x08BU-Ix2KCDRI-3MsAjyMsCpq-4Q4tckuZ9cV1wsuDv0q4WWoYyAFvUwYCtpyGWfK7329tyOe1aGK05xmKUxl_tPtGWxS8NrNAGZi3-lElWVmhXIn0X2WS3Kp7cpS-CGctux-9z3LI6eXUg2i25LYJj4_T0npQW4NnHtWFAr_vHbFK82w4Mnv_aXbvMR4_ZJ3MlvF87Aq1h0AP7Kp10PVEez-t8xKvSQf5O7-pOS2k4vklf7_dJIqiuVHjU9w8RrRyE-15H_yWNlFSmjKZVcYVHE38MuVvOazO-8FCa1sXZ6Z2csvJ7N1IiC5fj2p50B2TtS1UJhzvwS-jyHwJX7KSeun6qTHxDHwhL-FAzxSTIT1zMY4fJ6HVLI6CqoCMMW2JQaNDuazoUHHd5R7eqQVMjvHo6QyRWSS)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f529f90fc1c1447ba614958f089d4494&_e=QXKC18jn4boy_D1B66aB8QmuT4WAC-x08BU-Ix2KCDRI-3MsAjyMsCpq-4Q4tckuZ9cV1wsuDv0q4WWoYyAFvUwYCtpyGWfK7329tyOe1aGK05xmKUxl_tPtGWxS8NrNAGZi3-lElWVmhXIn0X2WS3Kp7cpS-CGctux-9z3LI6eXUg2i25LYJj4_T0npQW4NnHtWFAr_vHbFK82w4Mnv_aXbvMR4_ZJ3MlvF87Aq1h0AP7Kp10PVEez-t8xKvSQf5O7-pOS2k4vklf7_dJIqitVddAGYrAEHYlloiQZC9fiVKXu0z8mHrHcXlmrJ5Tq0oMaAg7R4LD1QTBhzsEJCMTZUAs5VZo-pUldGavW_xlz0_z_kYu9PI-dkJ_GqCtynetENdIkNMNmiHBTCLZiNvw3mhqjIs0Tu-u7ylcQgFWuM_CVtaasuPbXZqciw9LEk) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f529f90fc1c1447ba614958f089d4494&_e=QXKC18jn4boy_D1B66aB8QmuT4WAC-x08BU-Ix2KCDRI-3MsAjyMsCpq-4Q4tckuZ9cV1wsuDv0q4WWoYyAFvUwYCtpyGWfK7329tyOe1aGK05xmKUxl_tPtGWxS8NrNAGZi3-lElWVmhXIn0X2WS3Kp7cpS-CGctux-9z3LI6eXUg2i25LYJj4_T0npQW4NnHtWFAr_vHbFK82w4Mnv_aXbvMR4_ZJ3MlvF87Aq1h0AP7Kp10PVEez-t8xKvSQf5O7-pOS2k4vklf7_dJIqiizPd_KUjFqgDJdeii7SW76qLWC57l0nhWg10BldQ3ki2cYWEEH1LfSHHHbDRu1NtUKB-6Pnfhges5KCESvbVHNBXZKK5_N9LnoAaHfSkIqTO1JdO0XlEuDoDZt3ryGvCYxhGxHT7-1OIEGTh5rdBLn6Xkg-dJbehBJWTNjxkeBz)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Can I send you my new book?
body:
over the past year, I wrote my new book, Right Wing Revolution, as a guide for a return to an America where...

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce3f37d7a67f402bad417eb0d649d4e8&_e=k28a-ux4wQkacTDhSJlL3BJz4EPSPQw0mhTPhG_GAfU6KEVQeuVHEH51IjKGBaCPVy1Jb1aTBrhbLg_l5vxsYcFIs4S6AZYp9GbBS4mplrGTMuZp51jhikWyQAEigekyhsg7a8idMQisw-2vLe1PcxDI0nk-anfP2X_29BBbHI-e1pH146nWg1JpdeFmT8ZK1LwDGme-cTcEqrfwQRVlNGM5YKhMEb4Pt1-rV_gcPOsAy5x7vvrdXjf_3dJmGZnK2fWCIzdMhw5hMOHnA5GFTQ8a14hAW9QPtcNm3GcXUJHStOes4VyoA_oss7j1sw9G)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce3f37d7a67f402bad417eb0d649d4e8&_e=k28a-ux4wQkacTDhSJlL3BJz4EPSPQw0mhTPhG_GAfU6KEVQeuVHEH51IjKGBaCPVy1Jb1aTBrhbLg_l5vxsYcFIs4S6AZYp9GbBS4mplrGTMuZp51jhikWyQAEigekyhsg7a8idMQisw-2vLe1Pc82103PGSUa9hUUFcYMtU4XCaDmP4_xP7DrRSK00CWi5cNqxqjfrZJJ7SUbKXm7n7CyoCKEwBD1J_1scC2UDwl-qv2lOhjtTX9SczFL0Z-ED2mAMk0JUkOoEzgRnM-uA4OeHILS9iLaJyaH5W3b_D9_zPfnbTkKKsco5c_5aSBRK)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce3f37d7a67f402bad417eb0d649d4e8&_e=k28a-ux4wQkacTDhSJlL3BJz4EPSPQw0mhTPhG_GAfU6KEVQeuVHEH51IjKGBaCPVy1Jb1aTBrhbLg_l5vxsYcFIs4S6AZYp9GbBS4mplrGTMuZp51jhikWyQAEigekyhsg7a8idMQisw-2vLe1Pc2yYBd3NYTCBMMraF-B2LP34HBGwUhePYLFECbzGqkFHFZH1V_njKf2tFhFow6EubH0KsWkg4is5cfNQuq7BFOsMMnKl0WuNyueTf-6WfNM2KLoAvyiKDh9O98TQC6vZFdjzedP4PkbsGOeGyMsatLLfbfmCy1gW-NUT3-p7PKgw)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Shocking Report: China Attacks U.S. Water Supply
body:
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19126/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/0e0f02eb057c24d685391bb6eb8e7e5bd5de1942). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19126/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/0e0f02eb057c24d685391bb6eb8e7e5bd5de1942?message_id=IjZkMzY0NzIwLTg2NjMtMDEzZC01ZGYxLTEyOTdhMmQ4OWMzZEBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19126/6374453/a2a40514e5231f9b69ef0c2e217113a767f26bad/0e0f02eb057c24d685391bb6eb8e7e5bd5de1942)
---
---
|
---
**SHOCKING REPORT:**
---
**CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY**
---
---
**_FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News_** Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown. Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... **But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.** If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.** If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.** Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.** Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share... Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** **[The Ultimate Water Filtration System!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19126/6374453/a2a40514e5231f9b69ef0c2e217113a767f26bad/0e0f02eb057c24d685391bb6eb8e7e5bd5de1942)**
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19126/6374453/a2a40514e5231f9b69ef0c2e217113a767f26bad/0e0f02eb057c24d685391bb6eb8e7e5bd5de1942)
---
**But hurry – we have limited stock, and these Ultimate Water Filtration Systems are first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.**
---
[**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19126/6374453/a2a40514e5231f9b69ef0c2e217113a767f26bad/0e0f02eb057c24d685391bb6eb8e7e5bd5de1942) The best part is...
---
|
---
**_This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!_**
---
|
---
It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 140+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. **But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.** In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. [**Now we've just got a fresh batch in.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19126/6374453/a2a40514e5231f9b69ef0c2e217113a767f26bad/0e0f02eb057c24d685391bb6eb8e7e5bd5de1942) And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. **And YES there's a payment plan!** Yes, right now, you can get your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems on a convenient, no-credit-check payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. [**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19126/6374453/a2a40514e5231f9b69ef0c2e217113a767f26bad/0e0f02eb057c24d685391bb6eb8e7e5bd5de1942) To your survival, Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his Ultimate Water Filtration System: _"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_ **Customers Love Their Ultimate Water Filtration System!**
---
---
**Cyndi L.**
"No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others." **Michael B.**
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time." **Faith P.**
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water." **Carol B.**
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious." **Rick O.**
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you." **Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day." [**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19126/6374453/a2a40514e5231f9b69ef0c2e217113a767f26bad/0e0f02eb057c24d685391bb6eb8e7e5bd5de1942)
---
| | |
---

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Big Tech vs. the Babylon Bee, Round 1,267,310
body:
It’s clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can’t abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae5508b793824409b06656f17025007a&_e=yNIb6QdHxD5pYq1wI8hXvT3f5SllocWnjN_PlO6sZrJo7tMJMsmMFdHlvQr8rwisvHWP9XctONGBdhQZqUd3BDs7jzJqmlIP4vdwnvosy_zHeklsks0jBIVAk4wsBrJ8QLuLc5R5q4QToQ-TahtN7Sbxjgi2a-j8IbWf4zMHtsLXzKHiD9hjUnuZeRJAT1rzQ5SX47q5BFClcxWeJV0IdT68EONYk-QBIPgoYA4SPvwzk5oMU9zEnIsoSDi30cJ04v_ewtHdSSjcYoGhqdPWMg%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend, When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor."
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae5508b793824409b06656f17025007a&_e=yNIb6QdHxD5pYq1wI8hXvT3f5SllocWnjN_PlO6sZrJo7tMJMsmMFdHlvQr8rwisvHWP9XctONGBdhQZqUd3BDs7jzJqmlIP4vdwnvosy_zHeklsks0jBIVAk4wsBrJ87R5C1CC4YCBAwo4d8XrNgYJs32FSfUDo3E0xbVDxUCb7YPH7Nx8JR4hJ6pk1aawxRKqoWjnRnc21toG79ALXfJO9Stq9GsMhLSM67njFHukGmLZD-P60bOdij3EsEi6m21s4SktnXFwqgCbVfroqyQ%3D%3D)
---
We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well.
---
* **Facebook** has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions.
* **Front** , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world.
* And, in a particularly ironic move, **Vimeo** permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk **I gave on censorship. **

---
**It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy**. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. **No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us**. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. **But we won 't give them what they want. **We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the _truth_.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae5508b793824409b06656f17025007a&_e=yNIb6QdHxD5pYq1wI8hXvT3f5SllocWnjN_PlO6sZrJo7tMJMsmMFdHlvQr8rwisvHWP9XctONGBdhQZqUd3BDs7jzJqmlIP4vdwnvosy_zHeklsks0jBIVAk4wsBrJ8sHsYmvOlF5oyTK5tQeSq6MhIcdKqP96dnsoIB4Hat07nFi3o6Ehuy7Td9rN1Kd1CEDVsZedtNIAxMhnKw5xwtQmdub91ipoYieOm9WlN5wW6PuQcyHAnfihb6PXS4TLEML4YSDF5WeCs1xiVErNt4A%3D%3D)
---
Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. **The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber**. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. **[If that sounds like you, I hope you'll consider subscribing to the Babylon Bee. clean_body: It’s clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can’t abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy. | | | | Friend, When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor." We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well. Facebook has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions. Front , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world. And, in a particularly ironic move, Vimeo permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk I gave on censorship. It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. But we won 't give them what they want. We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the truth. Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too. Seth Dillon CEO | The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself | Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is:** The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

## Roberson Execution to Proceed
The Texas Supreme Court ruled on Friday that the state could [proceed with the execution](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2K4zAUBeCnkTsZ3ytZigsVC4u7bLMMUxr9XCcC2QqSnJ-3H5J-qlMc-Dic7_NytjHF_fLPbmTac80LDig5AAe1BBvTa5FdMG4IE3RkQAvQo1IKu6tZrUR3glWHcZJ-Et6OGrRyjkYhRqAumjcGAAoAtcBeS7LkTsOKctU4AZMDhdhy6duVGj1tXdMr36n0Pm9dMtfWbpWJPwxnhrN1fqdH7S_5XTOcv_4znEt2VBr_RM175fQkf7SYd16oHhvxD8zrcSu0Eff5KI0H8skWqgzn2nJ5MTHHwMRfgHEaYNTYFRNuj5hSrEozOVw2G9NnVvv1p7vBnwAAAP__D_hrVA) of Robert Roberson. Originally scheduled for October 17, the state's highest court stayed Roberson's execution hours before it was to be carried out, prompted by the Texas House of Representatives [issuing a subpoena](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQBp_G7rC8awJ2QfE37vK3V1oY1gk6DBHgkLz9ydG1V-1II41W39d1uWrnXbj91zup8trigj1yBsBALFY7_154a9Xa2wlaUiAHkBchBLZ3BROgkaMGYS4E6zoBjb01dBmERiTbOnXGAEAAoBywk5w0rWO_Id8kTtDwnqwrMXXlToVeOm_-HZ-UOhP31qt7KY_cDP8anBuca61dWE2gmk_f4Hxig_OR2S99Giwfj0Q7MROPVFg6PGXmdd31N6XMtPexunBjKa50-vPkGBi9yBzFxcCSCRrGfuCyTco-qvPeZSEb3t927fznu_LnXE-FPwEAAP__3J9wHg) for Roberson to testify before them. Friday's ruling said that [Roberson could still testify](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO8yAQBOCngQ6LXQjYBcXfpMvfXmlhs8ToiIkwF5K3PyX9VdOMvtF8XeaLTznt1__-Rq49Y5lRohYAAswcfMqvWfPgFhkm4OTAKrAnYwzyzdEC4M0JVJyMslavo1QK4xhhUbT6E0_ujQGAAUCrcLCaPC2jjKijxQmYlhRSK3VoGzV6-iPmV3lQHdZy49ltrd0Ppv4xPDM8996HnfrRib7fBYbnWhaqTXziKLv4GCKQb5uopQt60vrTUtkFTKPRo-TVhXtPOafDWKbl9eZT_qy1P-8_HP4GAAD__5GNXWc) before the Texas House, as Roberson's legal team continues to buy time for his sentence to be overturned. With his execution yet to be scheduled, Roberson would be the first person to undergo capital punishment for a shaken baby syndrome murder, a conviction that has come under scrutiny based on new scientific research.
## Two Corrections in Texas Michelin Guide
Michelin has now removed two restaurants from its [inaugural Texas Guide](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQhZ_GdCDP4NikcHEbutx2SzTgMYxkIDJONnn7VaLdarXdSPOdH52Py3AhSbLN_2llXx5xH1CjqQFqsEMgSc_BVMGPOpyhYg-uBXey1mK1eNcZdGyDJk0jOWQYI_EpRNcF08W2Ev8yAwALgK7FxhkmHjsd0USHZ1BGc5Cy56YsXPhBR0zP_c65mfa1Sn4p5Xqo9p_CXmE_3yRws8q0cJLthSjsb4fCnjeFPeUiU2KF_Q9SvxX1xJnXfXv-_rwj66NQPuo5M2_f9yhjPe-3vNIWquzD9VNSksM6ZfS8kqR3v_LnYHePXwEAAP__sndwtw). [The first removal](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OnDAQRZ_GdEbMYP4KF2noNm1KZPAYRjL2yjbLbp4-2vRff3XP0fnzWB6GPYf9tzlJl7eLCzaoJICEfrGG_WdRldVrYyeoSMPQwtD1fY_VoVe3uo7acWqU2sZpAzusYzu13dpCQ9hVrL9nANAD4NBiPSgytI6NQ-UGnECohiyXmOpyUKG3yc5_4otSvcWz8voo5ZlF-0vgLHC-77u2p9nNXw70XQicXYqhrFcKlATOX5zAGUDgfPJ2kOcg94stySOGmLK8Uwy7tMZ7k2WiXMyVTCiSc74oyy2mRFvhGATOVdL2ebP3nPtBqGY_Dfv_ZuXHVC-N_wIAAP__FJptIw) was due to the Guide confusing The Charles, its original listing, with Mister Charles, as both restaurants are in the Dallas area and owned by the same parent company. Kau Ba, a [Viet-Cajun restaurant](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2vpCAYRn8Ndhh4QZCCYhu7u-2Who9XJRfhRnGc-febmf7WT_Kck_Pva_5yKaey_nU72vZc6gwMJOWccjVHl_Jrll20nkXDO7RcC64HpRR0m2UiGAxCDqi00RKi16NQHECGwTO_dMm-zzjninPQAnot0aEf2QJy0WA4kQxjavXo24YNn-5c8qs-8OhD3btst9Z-TiL-EJgITPd9999bvd4jgckdLYWMBCYsDY_mUtmxNAJTTCWVlcD07S7qHQ25nhjpnsKGORW6XikijVfJ7vGiW73OVgv98AlMMA40euGMDwPFMEQqB-6oCcbQAIKPcdTaRdYdNv7cKed0Kk0kW3eX8ke8_VryYeF_AAAA__9gbHT4) in Houston, was also removed, having permanently closed before the Guide was released. Meanwhile, Texas restaurants still on the list are making way for an uptick in patrons garnered from the publicity, one of which is [Birrieria y Taqueria Cortez](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO3CAQxvGnwd2smDFr7MJFGneXNuUKw7CeCMMKk-Pu7aNNn_qTftL3__Xx-HCSJD9_upPX9hXLgzQZQAScHsFJ-n6YIay7DgsOvKId0d6naaLhWH3EOS58R8MLztb7MHo2Ls73cb9rtIOsbwwRJ0SyI92sYcf7rCOZaGlBZTQHaaXe2sGNv9wV03f55Hrz5RzSerT2utT4Q9GmaOu933p07j0q2lxt4hMr2jL3S9GWindJ0RZLbdBLbQfsUqs4-F0kNygvzhxAMpAmDbl0kHZBydAOhlP8wUkyPP9IeKs0Wwja6sAzgd-DBcNmgt0HB3rZ3RRnMjPZoa7h1SUluSarjH6eTtK_A-2_RT9X-hsAAP__Hrx21g), which was opened as a food truck in 2020 by a former roofer who had been laid off.
## Paul Defeats Tyson in AT&T Stadium
Mike Tyson and Jake Paul squared off over eight rounds last night in AT&T Stadium, with Paul [winning by unanimous decision](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuozAQAL_GdEbs2gFSuLjGXa69Ehl2SfZiMMJOCH9_yvWvHmk0mj-34RYkynr_HRZ25TOnARu0GkBDO1CQeA62Ijc2dIWKHXQGukvbtlg9HPTQTTQaE2ay1E69CbMxgcZx4kAGK3FfGQC0ANgZrDvLgce-mdHOHV5B2YZJStrr8uDCn5DneKY37_WUliq6RylbVuaXQq_QH8dRc97WL1Tox_SR9a7Q55L2U6EfFHohhd6ihf4CV4X-b3iy3sIr6ml_Seas08o6CzFp4kmypFUv8mRdzpzWane0HRKj5LZTtrkvQeL_mPLjnbfDfwEAAP__31pnzQ) over the boxing legend 31 years his senior. The highly-anticipated event was shown on Netflix, and the streaming entertainment company's foray into live sports didn't exactly go well; problems with the feed [created a stir](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdI68a2OHwsXf0OVvr0QmLMleDEbYIfD2J66_ZqTRjD6N5uvW3QJHnh__w0S-7GPqUKGRABJsNwSOR2eqwfdqaKAiD06Dq621WD19Y2vdU69cqBUCgtG6vpvr2Fw1aNJNxf6EAYAFQKfx4gwF6q9qRDM6bEAYRQOXtF7KkwrtIY_xSButl3uaquifpSxZ6H8CW4HtfCwplzMS2J5kgS3AKbXANi9pLfmsURkj7zKXlcLE80Nyzm_KMlLYTjvxi2Q5cprld3iRXMI7yo3pQ2uWkTceBLbV6oflwzFytk4Y9ZgCx99Z5c-fNo8_AQAA__832mn9) on social media. The weigh-in Thursday night lived up to media hype when Tyson slapped Paul during the final stare-down. You can [watch the moment here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngS0WdxCIB4YubOna0cJwxCfh2LKRnbx9le6df-mT_p_7cI9c-fn4jjP59irLgArNBeACdsiR63swMvtR5R4keXAa3NVai3LyBHGEnooBhw56p6NVKaUMRcVkblfJ_oMBgAVAp7FzhiKNN1XQFIc9CKMoc1u2rk3U6BX3Ut_LQVuXlllWP7W27kJ_CQwCw3meHe3r8xMFhoMzLQJDqrwKDIPAwFlgMKh7C_omN5_Xk2vl3Tph1GOOXP_g9u_p4fE3AAD__2h5Uz8). [Celebrities in attendance](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQBb_GdEbs4jNQuEjj7tKmRAYvsDmDEXaO4--jS5_y6Umj0Xzd-7vjwNv86VYy-TXFHitUEkCC7r3jcPWq8GaofAcFGWhqaG5aaywWo8h3oF2FbTcNrtNji1M7KHUbK99SCwWbNwwANAA2NZaNIkdDW02opgY7EKoizzkeZV4o08ulKVzxSUc5xrUIZsl5T6L-EGgF2vM8S0r79j4F2iG-eJsF2pTjcQm0vUDLXqBVqKBGbAXalR8k85XiJr_dg-TufoKceF6yHCnQcHC-ZHpv3uZUHMbvJ4fASTdCVfPqOPy55H_jPA3-BgAA__-R0Wan) at the fight included boxing greats Evander Holyfield, Sugar Ray Leonard, and Lennox Lewis.

Originally scheduled for October 17, the state's highest court stayed Roberson's execution hours before it was to be carried out, prompted by the Texas House of Representatives for Roberson to testify before them. Friday's ruling said that before the Texas House, as Roberson's legal team continues to buy time for his sentence to be overturned. With his execution yet to be scheduled, Roberson would be the first person to undergo capital punishment for a shaken baby syndrome murder, a conviction that has come under scrutiny based on new scientific research. Two Corrections in Texas Michelin Guide Michelin has now removed two restaurants from its . was due to the Guide confusing The Charles, its original listing, with Mister Charles, as both restaurants are in the Dallas area and owned by the same parent company. Kau Ba, a in Houston, was also removed, having permanently closed before the Guide was released. Meanwhile, Texas restaurants still on the list are making way for an uptick in patrons garnered from the publicity, one of which is , which was opened as a food truck in 2020 by a former roofer who had been laid off. Paul Defeats Tyson in AT&T Stadium Mike Tyson and Jake Paul squared off over eight rounds last night in AT&T Stadium, with Paul over the boxing legend 31 years his senior. The highly-anticipated event was shown on Netflix, and the streaming entertainment company's foray into live sports didn't exactly go well; problems with the feed on social media. The weigh-in Thursday night lived up to media hype when Tyson slapped Paul during the final stare-down. # Saturday, November 16, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1907, President Theodore Roosevelt issued a proclamation [officially admitting Oklahoma](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuszAQwPGnsbcg7mwcMnj4FvQtaYcOHa0LPsO1Jo7ACuLtq2bvC_z0_39ew5Uky316o4V9TSVgi_YEcAIXIkk-gtXRJ2Zko9nD2cC5cz04PXuLljrD5KxljjGOzvVj12JryKQ09lr8rwYADsAgXBpOPcLFmBt0fXSGlG05Si1r81XkXmdO-ShPXpuxLDr7udbHpsw_hYPCYd_35pU0y1bLejRlnRQO_8seosTw_p1pLguFG49l4UDho1Jlvfr42CVn2dxZ2XZaSPLLr3_9Pj3-BAAA__9dOFkh) as the 46th state, over 100 years after the land was acquired from France in the Louisiana Purchase. Speaking of Oklahoma, it got its [_Sooner State_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO6yAQheGngQ7LAwTsguI26XLbLS0I4zAbDJFBsfz2q2y_9Sedo__rttw8ZSqP_35D19e6yFFqASDALNFTPhfNo1sRJSqODqwCezETGJ6c9qPReoaAIcyAOF2s1wAWxyCtvAdO7rMGAAZASZgHXCcJs1IBLlM0yjM9YqRe9-G7UukJ13zWN-7DvW48u9T7qzH1j8krk9fjOIZErdf9_DiT14JH-0A6BTVRn9mnunlR6P4sfsMoekLRai24i9Z9R767-DooZ2rGMj0-Nk_596z_Ff928icAAP__k71c9Q) nickname from the Land Run of 1889. During this event, people known as _Sooners_ illegally entered the Oklahoma Territory to claim land before the official start time. The Sooners aren't the only rule-breakers in today's edition—check out our _Sports_ section. ## Ethics Committee Delays Vote on Rep. Gaetz
The House Ethics Committee [canceled its Friday meeting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8GOiLvgjEUFH_jLn97peXAOuwJTBRzifL2p6S_bkYjzSd9X-flvHLh_fp_rRT61hYc0CgABXZJK5fXYmQKGxGSlhRg0jCN1oGVOXgcjIuju0xINrq0RUrGjM5M1scLesnh_QYAFkAj-BNtDsFrfYHRJatXYQZK3Nv99N1475m28moPup9iq7KE3PvtEPqfwFng3DNlLuW9CZxzq7TT8_jEn4MEzsZ7HCerPl1RzxwPFVut3DuRqkSd96uK6x6pFEoCZ3kP6fbkUviwkzDDta78Icj-l41HwN8AAAD__2gBYVM), postponing a vote on releasing the long-awaited report on Rep. Matt Gaetz, despite growing calls to disclose the investigation's findings. Gaetz, who [survived a Justice Department](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8GOiLvgjEUFH_jLn97peXAOuwJTBRzifL2p6S_bkYjzSd9X-flvHLh_fp_rRT61hYc0CgABXZJK5fXYmQKGxGSlhRg0jCN1oGVOXgcjIuju0xINrq0RUrGjM5M1scLesnh_QYAFkAj-BNtDsFrfYHRJatXYQZK3Nv99N1475m28moPup9iq7KE3PvtEPqfwFng3DNlLuW9CZxzq7TT8_jEn4MEzsZ7HCerPl1RzxwPFVut3DuRqkSd96uK6x6pFEoCZ3kP6fbkUviwkzDDta78Icj-l41HwN8AAAD__2gBYVM) investigation on allegations of sex trafficking and obstruction of justice, was also the subject of a three Ethics Committee review. Gaetz has denied any wrongdoing, and no charges were filed. House Speaker Mike Johnson [urged the committee](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvwyAUBOBfAxsR70GwGRi6eEvXjhYOD0OFjWXTROmvr-K9251O-qT7uo03n0te50-_kGuxjihRCwABZgw-l9eoeXCRCElxctAp6K6mB8OT01FaCSj1FKKXCCAnbRSB1xFtB8Cze2sAYAAUgr1Q7BGsUhNc-2CUZ1pSyK3ul--a15Yolld90H6514UXl1rbDqY-GA4Mh5Yo5VLeG8Mh1YVWeh5n_DmI4aCtRWu0OLuglvL9EDttdW9i9tR-GQ58d2F75lLyYTqm5bz4fJK8_Xf_4fAvAAD__xtvWvU) to keep the investigation sealed despite outside political pressure, stating it would be a “breach of protocol and tradition.” House Judiciary Committee Chairman [Rep. Jim Jordan](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_q2zAUhZ9G3m7wlRw5GTSkFG-_QunQMSjSdXyD_hhJjkmfvrh7p3PgwOHj-_11_7IcOD1_2EimzfkuezkAIqC-e8vhcx86b2YiSaojg6PC8awvqLvF2H7snaR-dPoh3ejl9dzP-oE4Xwd9mXXH5nhDRI2oJF5PNF8kXpV64PnitbJi6Mlzy-X0ypzaQnP45DeVk8uxC2Zpba1C3YSchJz2fT_Fmo5NyIkSbFXIKdF-xJoDN3ZHfXGEVy7eJqj2U4Hawq6CyzFya0RQaM2lQU4QbWvwtNT-QF3yFnyCBs8M6_YI7IScbIHbDbex_rwJNWXHXqjv3w5ftNdfVNauGL_uHAJXPYqhf0bL4R9--5_Ot5F_AwAA___-WHjo) echoed Speaker Mike Johnson's stance earlier this week, stating that, under committee rules, the report on Rep. Matt Gaetz should not be made public.
## Confirmed: Iranian Nuclear Facility Destroyed
U.S. and Israeli officials have confirmed Friday that [Israel’s attack on Iran](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOGyEQBOCn4Tos73I_PhcUjqJrkj9NipTWGhZ7EwwWYKN7-8jpU00x0kjz_fo8f5IkydcfdGfXYznjHmcNoMGeA0nazvMUXGRGNhM7OBg4fNgF7HRztJjojUE87C944eMyH42xYGxAniPaSdx7DQAsgEE47jguCEdjLvCxBGtIzXsO0kvd_S6S-41j2sqL686X-5TcrfdHU-akcFW4jjF295bfncKVs342hWvm8Y5RagoK1xKjeKHUdKNNS6vESQduvZaNgybf5cU6P31iqnowPUpuunJjqv6mI3lJ0jctWUulrFuv8ocVrlT16QTP5fv4psxavARlvn55y_FoP7k-purCY0hK0uxBzfvrnST9O9L_B_ty-DcAAP__vFJ8ug) in October destroyed an active top secret nuclear weapons research facility, damaging Iran’s nuclear weapons research program, putting pressure on Iran and Hezbollah. Friday’s news coincided with a series of Israeli airstrikes in Beirut that destroyed at least one high-rise building in a Hezbollah-controlled area. [You can see the building collapse here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFutDAQBOCnMZ1P7BoMFC7-xt39bUpkzsuxic9GtnOIt49In2aakT6N5uM-3x0Hjs__7kWmrmnGFjsJIEHP3nE4567xZiVCUg0ZGBQMvR5BN5uhZQVA7fwC2tNIKwxTq2lYqEffT4-GzaUBgAZQCNON1hFhUmqBfvRaOdG15LmmfPtMHOtGazjTm_LtkV5NMFutexHqn0Ar0MZzT6VelUB7wQItwBW9QHukHLyMdBSBlkt2FFg6zqVm_iLpqdScziIX4vxd5cbPTWYuJCO5LAMtLlIh-XA7VxcE2iYbvx8cAhc9iK59vhyH32H1r6PeBn8CAAD__47pawU). Lebanon’s [prime minister has asked](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDuO4zAQBU8jZTTU_EoBg02cedMNhabYtNqgSYPi2vCcfuDJJ3x4QKFQ_y7rBTlzuf7FO_me6ionqQWAALtG5Pxe9Rh9IpKkRvLgFDhjZ7Dj7qdAzuppSlZLcrBRIIc2LAuFONuYRvYfGgBYACVhOVGaJSxKBTBztAoHPVHkXtvpVrn0nVJ-1ye101bvY_Z7749jUH8GeR7kGR-FXsfn-ozWecs0yDMfDSmLnb5CzRl3kSlgqUVwwyI2woMSNxKBuP3vImPjGxYW2polRGNntCaiNgCzkah0MjqFDdzYfHy8OGc-rBv0dL0j5x-x_luop5ffAQAA__8V6mpa) Iran to help broker a cease-fire in the ongoing Israel-Hezbollah war, as Israel has intensified its attacks on Hezbollah since September. According to Lebanese media, U.S. Ambassador Lisa Johnson presented a cease-fire proposal to Lebanese Parliament Speaker Nabih Berri, who has been representing Hezbollah in the negotiations.
## House Holds UFO Hearing
House lawmakers heard testimony this week from witnesses alleging that the federal government has decades' worth of [information on UFOs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OwyAQBOCngc4Ru_wYCopr3OXaKy1ilsAJm8gmifL2p6S_bkYjfdL8nOdzKLVs1--wku-pzShQDQADmDmGUl-z4tEnIiTJycMoYdTGguHZk3IpAmknhEZMqKwd00UvkoQVpCIv_q0BgAGQCO5EySI4KS-gbTQyMCUolt72028rW8-U6qs9aD8tbeXV595vB5NfDCeGU8-US63vjeGU20obPY9PvB_EcFLOOi3d8OnDPdyGg5adlteQKexluzKc-O7j7VlqLYcZmRLXNZQPyft_9x8e_wIAAP__hwVbXg) that remains undisclosed. A former Pentagon official testified before the House Oversight Committee's subcommittee, claiming that the U.S. possesses alien technology and that military installations have been surveilled by "_advanced technologies not made by our government — or any other government._ " Another former Pentagon official claimed the [U.S. has been aware](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UD1zhCAQ_TXY6bALohYUaegubUpnT1Yl4eRGuHP89xnTp3mveV_zvm7jjUIM2_JJD7ZlTiNK1DVADWb0FOI56srbmRlZVWyhU9C1pgdTrRaU7u9Kzzh5CR3fcWJqJ9-anqTnAapgrzQAMAAKYWh47hEGpe7Q9t4oElqyDyXtzXcKW1l5jmd6895M6VFFu5byzEJ9CHQC3XEczStTSZ7OSyDQ5ZL2U6Db-MgXUQlpE-iuWoEO4AIl0L3mVK9Me9iWutAP00Fnrl_0rKe0LTvny94Z1AO2IGUn0FW79c8jxBiy6YSWy4NC_BtW_jvqbfE3AAD__6xdZ6s) of extraterrestrial activity since the 1930s and misappropriating funds to fund a secret program, stating that "_excessive secrecy has led to grave misdeeds against loyal civil servants, military personnel and the public — all to hide the fact that we are not alone in the cosmos_." A former NASA administrator urged the space agency to take a more active role in documenting unidentified phenomena, suggesting it use advanced equipment instead of relying on cellphone footage and fighter jets' cockpit gun cameras.

name: History Facts
subject: These first ladies weren't married to the president
body:
While the role of first lady is traditionally filled by the president’s spouse, other family members have stepped in several times in U.S. history. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68bf7ugam9fn47cv582bfngkldvlftewpu1n1ivgc9pnd46xfh56u1gp9xkg0zljpharbd1da84hvf12qfxbadr3k4irt42blwv4hitovcuczagsn8c9hwwl1tkkqso2fn6f7k1h49w2mkvjq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn1lpt&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

---
# [First ladies haven’t always been married to the president.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn1lpt&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn1lpt&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn1lpt&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W hile the role of first lady is traditionally filled by the president’s spouse, other family members have stepped in several times in U.S. history. Though there’s no constitutional requirement to have a first lady, it’s always been the tradition, and in cases where the president has been widowed or unmarried, someone else has always filled the role. The first instance was [Martha Jefferson Randolph](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn1lpt&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), the eldest daughter of Thomas Jefferson. When Jefferson took office in 1801, he had been a widower for about 20 years, so Martha took on the first lady duties, which at the time largely entailed hosting social events. Future First Lady Dolley Madison also lent an unofficial hand during the Jefferson administration while her husband, James, was serving as secretary of state.
---
Another unique case was the presidency of Andrew Jackson, whose wife, Rachel Donelson Jackson, died just months before his 1829 inauguration. Jackson asked his niece Emily Donelson to be first lady, though she was later replaced by his daughter-in-law Sarah Yorke Jackson. This began a tradition of daughters-in-law acting as first ladies to widowed presidents, including Angelica Van Buren (to Martin Van Buren), Jane Harrison (to William Henry Harrison), and Priscilla Cooper Tyler (to John Tyler).
Later, from 1857 to 1861, Harriet Lane acted as first lady to her uncle James Buchanan, who was a lifelong bachelor. Widower Chester Arthur and then-bachelor Grover Cleveland, meanwhile, enlisted the help of their sisters Mary Arthur McElroy and Rose Cleveland, respectively. In the two most recent examples, presidents’ daughters filled the role for their widowed fathers. Mary McKee was first lady to Benjamin Harrison from 1892 to 1893, and Margaret Wilson served as Woodrow Wilson’s first lady from 1914 to 1915. Since then, the role has been exclusively held by the president’s spouse.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn1lpt&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn1lpt&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## A pair of panda bears were gifted to Pat Nixon.
During a historic visit to China in February 1972 with her husband, Richard Nixon, First Lady Pat Nixon sat next to Chinese Premier Zhou Enlai at a dinner. During their conversation, Mrs. Nixon talked about going to the Peking Zoo to see pandas, and remarked about a cute cigarette box featuring panda iconography. After listening to her express adoration for these creatures, Zhou [responded](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn1lpt&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), “I’ll give you some,” and gifted two giant pandas to Mrs. Nixon and the American people. In April, the pandas — Ling-Ling and Hsing-Hsing — arrived at the Smithsonian’s National Zoo in Washington, D.C., marking a symbolic moment in the easing of relations between the two countries. In return, the U.S. sent two musk oxen to China as a goodwill gesture. On April 20, Pat Nixon attended the dedication ceremony, and spoke about the “panda-monium” that was running wild. The two pandas lived long lives into the 1990s, attracting hundreds of visitors daily.

clean_body: While the role of first lady is traditionally filled by the president’s spouse, other family members have stepped in several times in U.S. history. | W hile the role of first lady is traditionally filled by the president’s spouse, other family members have stepped in several times in U.S. history. Though there’s no constitutional requirement to have a first lady, it’s always been the tradition, and in cases where the president has been widowed or unmarried, someone else has always filled the role. The first instance was , the eldest daughter of Thomas Jefferson. When Jefferson took office in 1801, he had been a widower for about 20 years, so Martha took on the first lady duties, which at the time largely entailed hosting social events. Future First Lady Dolley Madison also lent an unofficial hand during the Jefferson administration while her husband, James, was serving as secretary of state. Another unique case was the presidency of Andrew Jackson, whose wife, Rachel Donelson Jackson, died just months before his 1829 inauguration. Jackson asked his niece Emily Donelson to be first lady, though she was later replaced by his daughter-in-law Sarah Yorke Jackson. This began a tradition of daughters-in-law acting as first ladies to widowed presidents, including Angelica Van Buren (to Martin Van Buren), Jane Harrison (to William Henry Harrison), and Priscilla Cooper Tyler (to John Tyler). Later, from 1857 to 1861, Harriet Lane acted as first lady to her uncle James Buchanan, who was a lifelong bachelor. Widower Chester Arthur and then-bachelor Grover Cleveland, meanwhile, enlisted the help of their sisters Mary Arthur McElroy and Rose Cleveland, respectively. In the two most recent examples, presidents’ daughters filled the role for their widowed fathers. Mary McKee was first lady to Benjamin Harrison from 1892 to 1893, and Margaret Wilson served as Woodrow Wilson’s first lady from 1914 to 1915. Since then, the role has been exclusively held by the president’s spouse. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Age of the youngest first lady (Frances Cleveland) 21 | | Viewers of Jackie Kennedy’s televised tour of the White House 80 million+ | Viewers of Jackie Kennedy’s televised tour of the White House 80 million+ | | Days served by the longest tenured first lady (Eleanor Roosevelt) 4,422 | | Height difference (in inches) between Abraham and Mary Todd Lincoln 14 | Height difference (in inches) between Abraham and Mary Todd Lincoln 14 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- A pair of panda bears were gifted to Pat Nixon. During a historic visit to China in February 1972 with her husband, Richard Nixon, First Lady Pat Nixon sat next to Chinese Premier Zhou Enlai at a dinner. During their conversation, Mrs. Nixon talked about going to the Peking Zoo to see pandas, and remarked about a cute cigarette box featuring panda iconography. After listening to her express adoration for these creatures, Zhou , “I’ll give you some,” and gifted two giant pandas to Mrs. Nixon and the American people. In April, the pandas — Ling-Ling and Hsing-Hsing — arrived at the Smithsonian’s National Zoo in Washington, D.C., marking a symbolic moment in the easing of relations between the two countries. In return, the U.S. sent two musk oxen to China as a goodwill gesture. On April 20, Pat Nixon attended the dedication ceremony, and spoke about the “panda-monium” that was running wild. The two pandas lived long lives into the 1990s, attracting hundreds of visitors daily. | | | Forget about the annoying throbbing in your thumb from loading round after round (this stops that!), the Ammo Speed Loader will **save you valuable shooting time**.
...And we want to help you spend more time perfecting your shooting skills and less time loading magazines.
This thing can load 10 rounds in less than 9 seconds - No exaggeration!
Plus it works for 9mm and .40 S&W. ********
****[Grab your Ammo Speed Loader for 70% Off + Free S&H!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19133/6374453/d575d0a4408e7d2135487bca2822387f44aa275e/3fdfbba78b3316dc0d11a21a34ba5e1a58b6aa4f)**** __
_-Gun News USA_

P.S. Spend less time jamming your thumbs while loading mags... and more time going _POW POW!_

name: GivingTuesday@USO.org
subject: Support our service members this Giving Tuesday (2X match!)
body:
Together, we can make a difference for our service members this holiday season
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH YOUR GIFT*](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/R30rHgqb2_t4/dU5YdEtYTmM2dTdTcTlCaTNKNXJxWGNLR29KTjBxM21IMnl2aVMrN1A2eTdGNExUQ3o1MEtBRTZ3TEJNSWNYY0NiZHltNGtRYnY0MG5NM1I1RFVTRHpEZXY3cTdrc2YwWTJSSEJsUmx0QjA9S0/RVlCU2ZFVWsvZElFQThHdnNuSFdpZjFMTlBPTzFtaDg0MS9xN2d1cFAxWGxZMFJ0NWxrNkJ0SW9YYTlScFpKVE1waDUyRThVendNZFczVWZEZTVXMkx1MDF5aGpTaERhS0)

|

[2X YOUR GIFT NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj~kPpCe/dU5YdEtYTmM2dTdTcTlCaTNKNXJxWGNLR29KTjBxM21IMnl2aVMrN1A2eTdGNExUQ3o1MEtBRTZ3TEJNSWNYY0NiZHltNGtRYnY0MG5NM1I1RFVTRHpEZXY3cTdrc2YwWTJSSEJsUmx0QjA9S0/RVlCU2ZFVWsvZElFQThHdnNuSFdpZjFMTlBPTzFtaDg0MS9xN2d1cFAxWGxZMFJ0NWxrNkJ0SW9YYTlScFpKVE1waDUyRThVendNZFczVWZEZTVXMkx1MDF5aGpTaERhS0)
---
We're reaching out with three reasons why your gift to the USO today is mission-critical in supporting our brave service members.
1. Our heroes in uniform make countless unseen sacrifices -- **including spending the holidays far from their families and loved ones.** Your support helps them stay connected to home when they need it most, in the form of a video call and the comfort of a warm holiday meal enjoyed at a USO Center.

2. **The USO is a nonprofit organization that relies on the generosity and support of people who care deeply about our service members -- like you.** We are not a government agency -- we're an organization dedicated to supporting military heroes and their families. Your generous gift today will help advance the USO mission of strengthening the well-being of those who serve.

3. Today, **your generosity will also be MATCHED** , dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, thanks to a generous group of donors. So that means every dollar you give will be worth twice as much to provide vital support to those who serve.

[GIVE $29 (BECOMES $58)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[GIVE $58 (BECOMES $116)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[GIVE $116 (BECOMES $232)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~)
---
[MATCH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/N-6VBp4q8kBy/dU5YdEtYTmM2dTdTcTlCaTNKNXJxWGNLR29KTjBxM21IMnl2aVMrN1A2eTdGNExUQ3o1MEtBRTZ3TEJNSWNYY0NiZHltNGtRYnY0MG5NM1I1RFVTRHpEZXY3cTdrc2YwWTJSSEJsUmx0QjA9S0/RVlCU2ZFVWsvZElFQThHdnNuSFdpZjFMTlBPTzFtaDg0MS9xN2d1cFAxWGxZMFJ0NWxrNkJ0SW9YYTlScFpKVE1waDUyRThVendNZFczVWZEZTVXMkx1MDF5aGpTaERhS0)
---
As you enjoy family and friends this holiday season, please take a moment to remember our service members far from home. From providing support in the Middle East to hurricane relief in North Carolina, our heroes in uniform are always ready to serve. And your Giving Tuesday donation will help the USO bring them a sense of connection and home this holiday season and into the new year.
**[So please, will you donate $29 or more now to help us reach our $500,000 Giving Tuesday goal via email and text message and have the value of your gift DOUBLED to support our service members?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/yvb0Cw_)**
[GIVE NOW TO MATCH YOUR GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/Dd9Kh-qEL4Sm/dU5YdEtYTmM2dTdTcTlCaTNKNXJxWGNLR29KTjBxM21IMnl2aVMrN1A2eTdGNExUQ3o1MEtBRTZ3TEJNSWNYY0NiZHltNGtRYnY0MG5NM1I1RFVTRHpEZXY3cTdrc2YwWTJSSEJsUmx0QjA9S0/RVlCU2ZFVWsvZElFQThHdnNuSFdpZjFMTlBPTzFtaDg0MS9xN2d1cFAxWGxZMFJ0NWxrNkJ0SW9YYTlScFpKVE1waDUyRThVendNZFczVWZEZTVXMkx1MDF5aGpTaERhS0)
---
Thank you for supporting the USO. Your generosity truly makes a difference.
With gratitude,
The USO
*A generous group of donors is matching all gifts to the USO, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through November 16, 2024.

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Delbert Vs Donald – anti-school choice Republicans are on a collision course with President Trump
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/delbertvsdonald?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **Donald Trump is the most pro-school choice President in history. **“As president”, he has said, “I will establish the national goal of providing school choice to every American child”.

**“If we can put a man on the moon and win two world wars, then I have no doubt that we as a nation can provide school choice to every disadvantaged child in America”.**

Unfortunately, Mississippi has made little progress towards school choice due to a tiny handful of anti-school choice Republicans.
---
|
---
_Delbert Hosemann opposes Trump’s school choice agenda._
| Even though three of our surrounding states, Alabama, Arkansas and Louisiana, now have school choice, we still don’t.

**_The biggest obstacle to the education reforms we need is the current Senate Leader, Lieutenant Governor Delbert Hosemann. _**He has taken every opportunity to thwart efforts to achieve more parent power.

Initially, Mr. Hosemann took to claiming that school choice would be unconstitutional. This is an erroneous argument, as a carefully prepared legal briefing note we circulated shows. Having conceded that there is, indeed, no constitutional barrier to school choice, our Lieutenant Governor began to search for alternative excuses. Schools might not have the capacity, seems to be his latest one.

That is why the draft bill we worked on ensures school boards get the final say as to their capacity. No one is forcing them to take more kids. Another excuse crumbles.....

**One by one the arguments invoked by anti-school choice Republicans to justify their inertia have been dismantled.** But it still appears that the will to give Mississippi families the parent power they have in our neighboring states just isn’t there.

**Why is a Republican Lieutenant Governor in a conservative state teaming up with progressive activist groups, like the Parents’ Campaign, and briefing leftist media outlets like Mississippi Today to thwart reform? **

Mr. Hosemann, I gather, has indicated he is flat out opposed to a tax credit.

This means Mr. Hosemann is very likely to be on a collision course with the next President, whose team, I understand, is literally finalizing plans for a federal tax credit right now. **Will Mr. Hosemann continue to oppose a tax credit?**

Mr. Trump has made it clear he will abolish the federal Department of Education. Trump does not intend to dismantle power in DC only to see it handed over to local bureaucrats in Jackson. He would like to see parents have control over their child’s education.

**If a handful of local Republicans continue to kill off school choice (“It died in committee”, is likely to be their next excuse), I suspect that the conspicuous absence of invitations to Mar-a-Lago may become the least of their worries.**
---
|
---
_Who is behind Trump on school choice?_
| In a fight between anti school choice Republicans and Team Trump, I imagine Trump will win. He’d certainly have support from the local conservative base who have voted conservative for years but not always got a great deal to show for it.

**Perhaps part of the problem is that one or two of our anti school choice Republicans have an unfortunate habit of never wanting to engage with anyone with different ideas to their own. **That can become a problem if you don’t actually have very many ideas of your own. I’m not sure that a policy on four semesters a year, or cell phone usage in schools, quite cuts it ....

Those that get endorsed by Trump to run in 2027 will, I imagine, be Republicans that actually support the new President’s agenda in the coming months, particularly the 2025 session. **There’s still time to get on board with school choice in Mississippi. **

Invited to Mar-a-Lago or not, have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=24c47f7e98&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **_Ps. This weekly email now goes out to _tens of thousands of Mississippians_ making it one of THE most widely read email blasts in our state. Thank you for your support!_**

**_Also in the past 28 days, our online content has been seen _OVER 3 MILLION times! _(Our posts about school choice did particularly well)_**

**_We will continue to ensure that conservatives in Mississippi and across America know who has their back on school choice! _**
---
|
---
| | _ _

# [Tell Mike Johnson "to hell with protocol, release the Gaetz ethics report!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30fcf3b1-ae3b-4059-8116-5b5174211a9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Speaker Mike Johnson is blocking the release of a report detailing years worth of sexual, drug and other misbehavior and possible crimes by Matt Gaetz -- the nominee for Attorney General. Johnson says it would be a "breach of protocol" since Gaetz has resigned his seat. Are you kidding me? Gaetz is about to become the highest legal official in America. And he resigned his seat precisely so he could block the imminent release of the report. Senators on both sides of the aisle want to see the report before they vote, and it is essential that they get to do this. [**Sign now, and demand that Johnson stop blocking release of the report.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec66b044-c98b-4301-9ac1-ad3ac25a72a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Don't let him get away with hiding the evidence.

name: MAHA Alliance
subject: RFK Jr. Nominated – The Fight Begins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MAHA Alliance
body:
This is the moment we’ve been waiting for.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JCTMDPRDWZFXE364P84EYG2C_0)
---
| | | | Dear Friend, This is the moment we’ve been waiting for. President-elect Donald Trump officially nominated Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as Secretary of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). RFK Jr. has the incredible opportunity to lead the most significant healthcare revolution in American history—a chance to take on the entrenched systems driving America’s chronic disease epidemic and restore integrity to our public health agencies. Recognizing the threat Kennedy poses to their dirty deals, the special interests in Washington are conspiring to oppose RFK Jr.’s nomination process in the US Senate before it gets started. Big Pharma, Big Food, and Big Ag are scrambling to maintain their grip on the agencies Kennedy is poised to overhaul. For decades, these powerful institutions have abused the revolving door of influence to ensure their monied interests come first, compromising your and your children's health. As _The Hill_ reported, RFK Jr.’s nomination has sent these industries into crisis mode, with Beltway-Insiders working overtime to block his agenda and undermine his presumed authority. **The fight ahead is monumental. This isn’t just about one nomination—[it’s about dismantling decades of corruption](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JCTMDPRDWZFXE364P84EYG2C_1) and replacing it with leaders committed to integrity, transparency, and public service that benefits you and me–the way it’s supposed to be.** MAHA Alliance has an urgent mission: to identify and support new, honest leaders who will join RFK Jr. in challenging corporate control of our health system. We’re working to ensure HHS, CDC, FDA, NIH, and beyond are led by individuals who will fight for clean food, safe medicine, and a healthier future for every American. But we can’t do it alone. This battle has just begun, and we need your help. **[Will you donate today](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JCTMDPRDWZFXE364P84EYG2C_2) to help us recruit, vet, and position the right people, like RFK Jr., to drain the swamp and truly Make America Healthy Again?** **Your support directly funds this critical work and ensures RFK Jr. has the allies he needs to lead this revolution.**
---

Kennedy Jr.’s successful nomination process. Every donation strengthens our ability to win this battle—**[please give today](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JCTMDPRDWZFXE364P84EYG2C_5)**.
