name: Byron Donalds
subject: Cool as a cucumber
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
Here’s what MSNBC just said about this election
| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b6c38d92a145f0ba9ea697e4395516&_e=x8K1XVLRefOvSRUxregs1EwVKWHwamvfzicdvJRqNY0u2K_bn0ZuEO-XK_vsd12FjQcNDonaZhTlWXH1cGELOBIiJHWApQGcMocGlHDxL2XRC6qW2RmtWmGax4mdOX99dJboxFVgbx9FQWCFBUUavJActJZ1Z9N5pkqctg-5nMcYq2JOWKM5btjhSNflAQxYZoU1_EaCG71p4P65WDP5PK-qWL_U7oyiHmIuKTJiBmf6C5WlZExDFObnN53lWtV77yqd_dbQ_ul4-5ZVOGHyx4qbGhZASG9XhrkcFC22ETwVu-gbkrrz7E4mUOfe4mqd2AIAzkwZiLPRanS3t3xNyA11L4qB2sP06Bk8fawHBG83ohREvy0M1c38hWdOgAT1wcyfwXvvAj8JVqLioMfahQ%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b6c38d92a145f0ba9ea697e4395516&_e=x8K1XVLRefOvSRUxregs1EwVKWHwamvfzicdvJRqNY0u2K_bn0ZuEO-XK_vsd12FjQcNDonaZhTlWXH1cGELOBIiJHWApQGcMocGlHDxL2XRC6qW2RmtWmGax4mdOX99dJboxFVgbx9FQWCFBUUavJActJZ1Z9N5pkqctg-5nMcYq2JOWKM5btjhSNflAQxYZoU1_EaCG71p4P65WDP5PK-qWL_U7oyiHmIuKTJiBmf6C5WlZExDFObnN53lWtV7LPYORYtVNxZG-8axyPisG_X-m0zvQOnjQsaFGqMQbSaKvCOXjNZy2f3hji4iGkmKnM_M-bAh-5-w2mBTnEaTqOv3czsoJs3se3REy4ZiULbQ-L1LKRCohBnRhk2kaCZPuYzLmzsS_ZhhCj-JmTo9gw%3D%3D)
|
---
I’m as cool as a cucumber.
You have to be when the Fake News is calling our MAGA Movement “evil” on national television.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
I got real tired of seeing them lying about us with no repercussions whatsoever.
So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight _**one-on-one**_?
That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressman to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself.
But I just went on MSNBC & what I heard made me realize we still have _**[so much work to do.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b6c38d92a145f0ba9ea697e4395516&_e=x8K1XVLRefOvSRUxregs1EwVKWHwamvfzicdvJRqNY0u2K_bn0ZuEO-XK_vsd12FjQcNDonaZhTlWXH1cGELOBIiJHWApQGcMocGlHDxL2XRC6qW2RmtWmGax4mdOX99dJboxFVgbx9FQWCFBUUavJActJZ1Z9N5pkqctg-5nMcYq2JOWKM5btjhSNflAQxYZoU1_EaCG71p4P65WDP5PK-qWL_U7oyiHmIuKTJiBmf6C5WlZExDFObnN53lWtV7aInxigSF_Xc7VEED-B6k7fWd3fFWyqv1ELO_hXilj5kTVH5tVeKpVZ5CQJHCrATU4p28qWCzDN7mN3rT_04l5OSO3o0r62RiXZ8Eg3071cIOWYEaCaYaojcDTsbFmV6LOEx645-vZV9EfkN8Ieal4w%3D%3D)**_
They interrogated me, demanding to know if I thought that President-Elect Trump was too dangerous to be in the White House, then even hinted that he wasn’t qualified to be President.
**I kept my cool and picked their phony narratives apart piece by piece like clockwork.**
Problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense every single day until he’s inaugurated, and if no one challenges them, their lies could seriously get out of hand.
I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight.
_**[So please, can you chip into Fake News Offensive Fund today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b6c38d92a145f0ba9ea697e4395516&_e=x8K1XVLRefOvSRUxregs1EwVKWHwamvfzicdvJRqNY0u2K_bn0ZuEO-XK_vsd12FjQcNDonaZhTlWXH1cGELOBIiJHWApQGcMocGlHDxL2XRC6qW2RmtWmGax4mdOX99dJboxFVgbx9FQWCFBUUavJActJZ1Z9N5pkqctg-5nMcYq2JOWKM5btjhSNflAQxYZoU1_EaCG71p4P65WDP5PK-qWL_U7oyiHmIuKTJiBmf6C5WlZExDFObnN53lWtV7dRwQ4gxkAhkoP7CE4kA-Ccmz7_Nm2yim68a4BFUHQohqQv-G8AK7HH30egnzRJP0yL3i3KnFTZ52sPrsVZf2JUaYOaFS_7rjylaqFaJxiYPZ_2TUUas4wt1BY_j5Johku9IZ-T7e8pZaplqzq0W3XA%3D%3D)**_ _****__****_

clean_body: Here’s what MSNBC just said about this election | | | | | I’m as cool as a cucumber. You have to be when the Fake News is calling our MAGA Movement “evil” on national television. This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds. I got real tired of seeing them lying about us with no repercussions whatsoever. So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight one-on-one? That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressman to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself. But I just went on MSNBC & what I heard made me realize we still have They interrogated me, demanding to know if I thought that President-Elect Trump was too dangerous to be in the White House, then even hinted that he wasn’t qualified to be President. I kept my cool and picked their phony narratives apart piece by piece like clockwork. Problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense every single day until he’s inaugurated, and if no one challenges them, their lies could seriously get out of hand. I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight. **** | | Thank you for your unwavering support, Byron Donalds | | | | Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress 138 Conant Street Beverly, MA 01985

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: You can learn from Rome’s history
body:
The might and drama

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ The might and drama | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bc15cd74ffe44801a86620e0a4b15fa3&_e=y8Fk3GiIir447OV-uBHF_zfBYQV0WdL6mHqeEPmNL89kr-kOsW-IbjK1y4pmHMefsfWwdr3h27SQHiWnqxT9iqP4OscuTXs-oDnk1BQgnuyePVh318NzCjx--QSbyugeN0CeUHqNQpagk47WcjNE3MCir_XUlTtPWLHJPsPKHZNlh3fK5AwjZMJjrhlIPZKmVKxjyqNeXPv76Hcw2oTwMKeVzHrp2g9GgsaJcWF-HpkUnW0lgAcLizJBThcj2bCVRx7_ekgP6zZu7kC1rJYaQ-bRQfMScUlMCluB59lg7V7GAPtEq8c9I2Cic7xX-O91ILqX2C4ooJxJNPEgKRUHkCF5NFnIf3JnVbL9Za_33QTYrgTWNjLgIGlsSoR7HrtQqPLllXNBLpJqjVpni30j6I7TQKrwAkJ3g6UMvHMOJtA%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bc15cd74ffe44801a86620e0a4b15fa3&_e=y8Fk3GiIir447OV-uBHF_zfBYQV0WdL6mHqeEPmNL89kr-kOsW-IbjK1y4pmHMefsfWwdr3h27SQHiWnqxT9iqP4OscuTXs-oDnk1BQgnuyePVh318NzCjx--QSbyugeN0CeUHqNQpagk47WcjNE3MCir_XUlTtPWLHJPsPKHZNlh3fK5AwjZMJjrhlIPZKmVKxjyqNeXPv76Hcw2oTwMKeVzHrp2g9GgsaJcWF-HpkUnW0lgAcLizJBThcj2bCVRx7_ekgP6zZu7kC1rJYaQ_pS3Gg0r18qeLnHM0ukpB70FWCSodDNijdiryjPOqMhAPcQ4B8rwzadGQozTEuX8xPJ11bdu24-SEOPzQKR_ws2U1rGHRb7MXOyf4zm44HI4eOV2EGIA_jkYylad7acpi28ROSgURycNKSWW7fQBoE%3D) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bc15cd74ffe44801a86620e0a4b15fa3&_e=y8Fk3GiIir447OV-uBHF_zfBYQV0WdL6mHqeEPmNL89kr-kOsW-IbjK1y4pmHMefsfWwdr3h27SQHiWnqxT9iqP4OscuTXs-oDnk1BQgnuyePVh318NzCjx--QSbyugeN0CeUHqNQpagk47WcjNE3MCir_XUlTtPWLHJPsPKHZNlh3fK5AwjZMJjrhlIPZKmVKxjyqNeXPv76Hcw2oTwMKeVzHrp2g9GgsaJcWF-HpkUnW0lgAcLizJBThcj2bCVRx7_ekgP6zZu7kC1rJYaQ-1jJpIfK8jO6mH6vcOM9sMiSnCKSYTw_cZnDwp3wW-wPojrGYSViXPwgcf6rStAHLbfhBk98ljrzQcwE4KwVMu7JnrTi4C66BNdbJKunSpMAbScfceIghGaY_D4Un3BmAL25K9OPIhiIv-OeFnzLyk%3D)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bc15cd74ffe44801a86620e0a4b15fa3&_e=y8Fk3GiIir447OV-uBHF_zfBYQV0WdL6mHqeEPmNL89kr-kOsW-IbjK1y4pmHMefsfWwdr3h27SQHiWnqxT9iqP4OscuTXs-oDnk1BQgnuyePVh318NzCjx--QSbyugeN0CeUHqNQpagk47WcjNE3MCir_XUlTtPWLHJPsPKHZNlh3fK5AwjZMJjrhlIPZKmVKxjyqNeXPv76Hcw2oTwMKeVzHrp2g9GgsaJcWF-HpkUnW0lgAcLizJBThcj2bCVRx7_ekgP6zZu7kC1rJYaQ8CKFFmw6gWDtdBfSvHcSQMgwX0VzGuBKGuYHaTMiV_Yj45ZyXzdAbKMSsOK1CFDnKzaDnnrL8fXx1PXhGrbm7i9esqTqILOlHjjjSf_bhY6Fx8tA74jI4R7gX208thxGETGAHOomdra6KudmORwGgY%3D)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=bc15cd74ffe44801a86620e0a4b15fa3&_t=U-ZqEGa6KcPKX8c1U5qH8Ae_JNKjacZHaRimvFS1HBJaXk3z1mlTHO6LfjTuVvTQtv8Dvdln-kN9sbltVwqoW74lfncP6yUtAZ849Bk7UbxoUykQkXwAbzCYgSEmy76_)

name: Bob Casey
subject: this is what Pennsylvania deserves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard
| | |
---
Hello, friend.

This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97180162/512550504/1089970663?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2537-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTI3MWE3YzAtMjNhNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hyNNY-V2H08uqBSPKIJNaPYtbpIcfluWF4Vx8j-x2e0=)

It has been made clear there are tens of thousands of votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.
My team is working hard to make sure Pennsylvanians' voices are heard, but we’ll need the resources to keep this operation running.
**[So please, split $5 or more between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and myself today to ensure we have what it takes to keep this operation running.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97180165/512550507/1089970663?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2537-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTI3MWE3YzAtMjNhNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hyNNY-V2H08uqBSPKIJNaPYtbpIcfluWF4Vx8j-x2e0=)**

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! subject: Fighting for our democracy

body:
Pennsylvania is on the frontlines of the fight for voting rights.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4859%2E552475%2EwAVQdW)
Pennsylvania’s Senate race is **not over.** We need your help to re-elect Bob Casey. **[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241116-1?refcode=em20241116-1&refcode2=4859_552475_wAVQdW&akid=4859%2E552475%2EwAVQdW)**
---
If we’re going to protect our fundamental freedoms, we must re-elect Bob Casey. Bob has always stood up for women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights — and he’s not going to stop now.
Our democracy only works when every voice is heard. As tens of thousands of votes are still being counted across the Commonwealth, we need the resources to fight back against efforts to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters.
**[So please, donate whatever you can to Bob Casey’s campaign today so we can keep up the fight to protect voting rights and our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241116-1?refcode=em20241116-1&refcode2=4859_552475_wAVQdW&akid=4859%2E552475%2EwAVQdW)**

name: Colleen Davis
subject: The attorney often shrugged his shoulders…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
“I fear what you are asking this court to do is to sign the death warrants of women and children and pregnant people in this state.”| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97184325/512563523/928813567?refcode=EM_F_241114wisconsin_N_JZ_90DO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1N2ViMTNmLTI3YTQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RjZdKzfy351zNQNNwn4Yz6Os7roE_y5TUZIkcB9f4Lw=)
---
Hi Peter,

This week, the Wisconsin Supreme Court heard oral arguments over whether a 175-year-old abortion ban that went into effect following the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ is enforceable.

We wanted to share this video clip from the hearing with you because it perfectly illustrates why Her Bold Move must exist – and why women MUST be in the rooms where policy is made.

---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97184326/512563524/928813567?refcode=EM_F_241114wisconsin_N_JZ_90DO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1N2ViMTNmLTI3YTQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RjZdKzfy351zNQNNwn4Yz6Os7roE_y5TUZIkcB9f4Lw=)
---
The hearing featured the women court Justices asking probing and important questions of the male prosecutor’s attorney who was defending the state’s abortion ban. As they asked hypothetical but realistic questions, for example, about a 12-year-old girl becoming pregnant after being raped by a family member (a scenario that would NOT qualify for an abortion under this law), the attorney often shrugged his shoulders.

It was infuriating to watch the juxtaposition of so much merited emotion coming from the female justices compared to the nonchalance of a male attorney (and a male court Justice) working to remove bodily autonomy from millions of women and girls.

**This is why it’s so important that we have women in the rooms where decisions about _our_ bodies are being made. As Justice Rebecca Dallet pointed out, the only people who had rights in 1849 – when the original abortion law was signed into law – were white, property-owning men. We have made unimaginable progress since that law was implemented, and we must keep up the fight.**

This law was written **before women could vote** and even **before gynecology** was established as a surgical specialty. We are sick and tired of men working to take our nation backward, and we are sure you are, too.

[**Thanks to the women on the Wisconsin Supreme Court, this law will likely be rendered unenforceable. THAT is EXACTLY why what we do at Her Bold Move is so important. Help us continue to elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN at all levels of our government by pitching in $25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97184327/512563525/928813567?refcode=EM_F_241114wisconsin_N_JZ_90DO_8_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1N2ViMTNmLTI3YTQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RjZdKzfy351zNQNNwn4Yz6Os7roE_y5TUZIkcB9f4Lw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97184328/512563526/928813567?refcode=EM_F_241114wisconsin_N_JZ_90DO_8_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1N2ViMTNmLTI3YTQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RjZdKzfy351zNQNNwn4Yz6Os7roE_y5TUZIkcB9f4Lw=)

clean_body: “I fear what you are asking this court to do is to sign the death warrants of women and children and pregnant people in this state.”| | | | | = Hi Peter, This week, the Wisconsin Supreme Court heard oral arguments over whether a 175-year-old abortion ban that went into effect following the overturning of Roe v. Wade is enforceable. We wanted to share this video clip from the hearing with you because it perfectly illustrates why Her Bold Move must exist – and why women MUST be in the rooms where policy is made. = The hearing featured the women court Justices asking probing and important questions of the male prosecutor’s attorney who was defending the state’s abortion ban. As they asked hypothetical but realistic questions, for example, about a 12-year-old girl becoming pregnant after being raped by a family member (a scenario that would NOT qualify for an abortion under this law), the attorney often shrugged his shoulders. It was infuriating to watch the juxtaposition of so much merited emotion coming from the female justices compared to the nonchalance of a male attorney (and a male court Justice) working to remove bodily autonomy from millions of women and girls. This is why it’s so important that we have women in the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made. As Justice Rebecca Dallet pointed out, the only people who had rights in 1849 – when the original abortion law was signed into law – were white, property-owning men. We have made unimaginable progress since that law was implemented, and we must keep up the fight. This law was written before women could vote and even before gynecology was established as a surgical specialty. We are sick and tired of men working to take our nation backward, and we are sure you are, too. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = In this together, Colleen Davis Endorsements Manager Her Bold Move “I fear that what you are asking this court to do is to sign the death warrants of women and children and pregnant people in this state, because under your interpretation, they could all be denied life-saving medical care, while the medical professionals who are charged with taking care of them are forced to sit idly by.” \- WI Supreme Court Justice Jill Karofsky | | Her Bold Move believes that ambitious women will transform our country. We provide critical support for fiercely pro-choice women candidates and their campaign teams: financial support, endorsements, message amplification, campaign media, fundraising support, and more. name: Mary Peltola
subject: The most important thing to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |

| | |

| | |
---
| |

| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef8b3698-10d9-402b-bcfd-8c44193c5dba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| | | | | Peter, we’re getting new info about my race by the minute, and I urgently need your support before the next surge of details comes through. The most important thing to know right now is this: This race is far from over, Peter. Across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they’re coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations (where I often perform best). On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still thousands of votes that are yet to be counted. There is a LOT of counting left to do, Peter. But the reality is, we likely won’t know who won until the ranked-choice voting process plays out in the coming days. Team Mary is prepared for any and all scenarios, and we’re ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work – however long it takes. We can’t ensure every Alaskan’s voice is heard without support. [So please, will you split $10 between Blue Amp Action and me to ensure that we have the resources to keep this seat in the people’s hands? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3afebf5-aed8-45d8-a97f-45db88548e62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

---
| | | Thank you! \-- Mary Peltola
---
|

|

| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Michelle Steel [iPhone]
subject: We’re not in the clear yet, Fellow American.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Election Day may be in the books, but my race isn’t done yet.
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=eebfe9add8934088bda4cf90b503d102&_e=RuTxVpN59uMyPSYT3i4BsdGpB8y8X9SW8GXMiYPG0-h2p5SrzM2lXeOKTel--uTmpbWfZA2eRjeusbDiop3EdWH9-gSoCntJU1sLb5CLupsGKZwSCkpXRbDzRe_efjJp5It7FN5_nvWFqk4QGgrwjbzrYoQm0Zfr1k9Pjxbolgs48ofQZWOYJcEb0E4MqseLJ6QKSCK8GmKhWIDd9G00a4ZDtZ73nq60lyMf2ZA36jHxQAay_N1eoIyTt6FC_79YlCq5-N4Qw2rVhiGWKY9B5CJtqSAezfiEt9kDKK_7CKqBh_K1Ex132bOuEpbK53oW2ZOVwr1YyhNUAyyCAXcyvcpTDaFjG3f2h8YSxLEpDzlDrHyPzsxUPrc3mH61Aw_WihUK_SLzKyiyC8ZpxyR90q3g_CA90bcoAVP7Zz-Cr_Q%3D "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat and our House Majority RED, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=eebfe9add8934088bda4cf90b503d102&_e=RuTxVpN59uMyPSYT3i4BsdGpB8y8X9SW8GXMiYPG0-h2p5SrzM2lXeOKTel--uTmpbWfZA2eRjeusbDiop3EdWH9-gSoCntJU1sLb5CLupsGKZwSCkpXRbDzRe_efjJp5It7FN5_nvWFqk4QGgrwjbzrYoQm0Zfr1k9Pjxbolgs48ofQZWOYJcEb0E4MqseLJ6QKSCK8GmKhWIDd9G00a4ZDtZ73nq60lyMf2ZA36jHxQAay_N1eoIyTt6FC_79YlCq5-N4Qw2rVhiGWKY9B5EbZPgieawpwBh7LPLaO_z5h4xEYZWC4DiRsNLxcYwlfH0qMFm8GU08v5wPZKRtsPjrAx8Gi2qugnAWotz0rKdPM95nHThQVzxYWTVwdCfnqeyAX43GrZbE53vOkQhDBX3W4WhJJ0OOx0ji37gx6Pb8%3D "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel
_Sent from my iPhone_

Dear Friend,
Historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has written an insightful eBook, _Victory and the Savior Generals_ , which you can download for free.

Throughout history, certain leaders have turned around seemingly hopeless situations with their unique vision and skills. These savior generals displayed exceptional leadership and strategic thinking.

In this eBook, you will explore the key traits that defined these generals, how they approached conflict, never accepted failure, and adapted out of necessity. You'll learn about their innovative ideas, bold decisions, and steadfast courage and how they turned the tide in critical moments.

Already downloaded by more than 30,000 people in the last 6 months, you don't want to miss your chance to learn from history's most influential leaders from one of our country's most esteemed historians.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: [https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6009b81523784b95b2e5a5289e97231e&_e=NZc0-K5RzX_Ge19_8BcHCI9a9cTyPrBm8JAVLpeXTEHGIWKgV_Y9SVyKUGAyyv_g6JrJBiiBHAmpnBS3P6YJyroaVhre7C98vCCt1cDuOJdTc7xGOuYqIGYL4TUXgso3R7mJtCEoAZBoigaP8YPspgeMYHrky7RizR7eXQ1N1lgd2S1Wx9W-eE72QKywAfIqJdg-_rhsr_XxA7-DaH8nPKZxwc5rYc-aooOEmrap4bXSeofpnYLws65wNIBlvuEwvrmSU7dIOkkNPRKRAbzF12s66A4g104JH3VGJihercejyWRtI_SRIdQOSNwkKk5yGJWFNYLxheRn8De8RxvYcCqVRW-ZN7KdsQV8638bDQJj8lCHfgwhhUZmRcccdq-lllfx04OK52YGGsHjvDiZWbzNMMOWUD6keiIIWlCYTJ8%3D)

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

name: Pastor Paula White
subject: Help set Trump’s priorities
body:
TRUMP! TRUMP! TRUMP!
| | | | ******[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=27f3c57722aa40229686670db8738ea5&_e=wxeo4iqZUEVwMxnFDC-lxjBTJl9Xjq3A0pLyYfsUwqKAhebdgLdyJCFKvKmD9SHdr9MkrEN8wAqEC-E3Gtk-qCX16IL_qldp46tSBBsQO9AI6wplAPYJxKBjxeqzJQAzBud5ND0Tx8ARB465m2d_1aA-kBFoOkzstZng9onGO8y7Qgv0l44txcmY5wYPYyLV4I83WCwy-Jxqxk1VMCgIAnLzTL_jv0Vg2z5-YKB5NmPKk7EiPW7My6SrhtpDHmrAOSop5irMnNml0ug4YpCJtq6ExOb0DwVQtkey6xO4CL-PwTNSAKprtgYHkMMlXB9qRiusL9QRMLKeRr8dX4YeGPQgUT2U4xnxTJZGKnjH_LfgQlbA1cKwiMQOS2I1FC2wMCkZV_EBI1Odkah13VXn1A%3D%3D)******
**BREAKING NEWS: PRESIDENT TRUMP WON!**
Peter, I invite you to join me, Pastor Paula White, and the National Faith Advisory Board in the crucial mission to defend our faith.
I'm calling on you to join our Inaugural Faith Committee. Together, we can help set the agenda for President Trump's second term. Through prayer and unity, we can shape a future rooted in faith, and make sure our priorities are put FIRST!
[JOIN THE INAUGURAL FAITH COMMITTEE](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=27f3c57722aa40229686670db8738ea5&_e=wxeo4iqZUEVwMxnFDC-lxjBTJl9Xjq3A0pLyYfsUwqKAhebdgLdyJCFKvKmD9SHdr9MkrEN8wAqEC-E3Gtk-qCX16IL_qldp46tSBBsQO9AI6wplAPYJxKBjxeqzJQAzBud5ND0Tx8ARB465m2d_1aA-kBFoOkzstZng9onGO8y7Qgv0l44txcmY5wYPYyLV4I83WCwy-Jxqxk1VMCgIAnLzTL_jv0Vg2z5-YKB5NmPKk7EiPW7My6SrhtpDHmrA4O_QYaGk5tsXLZdvW90YVg8rZpbuComDlEgpFmv3mDAvZlJ1TDQ73QVJktRCpiwaAk7VIj6ZFKnYomJ755Pk2PwY2aDMnRdMn8IGx9hRTpaB0wIF41Wv_uz11V2TWa9qEJoavz1dnNVk5YHn67Sn5w%3D%3D)
As President Trump's personal pastor, I have witnessed firsthand his unwavering commitment to defending our faith. During his first term, he championed religious freedom, and now, as he prepares for his second, it is up to us to set the agenda.
**Will you join our Inaugural Faith Committee?**
******[YES!](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=27f3c57722aa40229686670db8738ea5&_e=wxeo4iqZUEVwMxnFDC-lxjBTJl9Xjq3A0pLyYfsUwqKAhebdgLdyJCFKvKmD9SHdr9MkrEN8wAqEC-E3Gtk-qCX16IL_qldp46tSBBsQO9AI6wplAPYJxKBjxeqzJQAzBud5ND0Tx8ARB465m2d_1aA-kBFoOkzstZng9onGO8y7Qgv0l44txcmY5wYPYyLV4I83WCwy-Jxqxk1VMCgIAnLzTL_jv0Vg2z5-YKB5NmPKk7EiPW7My6SrhtpDHmrAemzYqQMRNCCprlc1V4gIyY6PxG_X03WjZl5DQ9ThC19dU0dWbZ2cBF9uc-dJY10ldkSG7wcxw6JBootOLuO1ANk_Y5WfAYnaYOT0GaiUyrP6_Y5bBB06Fj-Eel5N3kZVGea6z2gS5CzbzvCXk8AcIQ%3D%3D)** **** President Trump stood for us in this election; now, let us stand for him. The power of our collective voice can influence government policies and create generational change. Join us in this mission of hope and resilience.
We need to make sure we provide him with the resources he needs to represent People of Faith in his second term. [**I 'm going to share this list of priorities with him, so PLEASE make sure I have your response by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! >>**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=27f3c57722aa40229686670db8738ea5&_e=wxeo4iqZUEVwMxnFDC-lxjBTJl9Xjq3A0pLyYfsUwqKAhebdgLdyJCFKvKmD9SHdr9MkrEN8wAqEC-E3Gtk-qCX16IL_qldp46tSBBsQO9AI6wplAPYJxKBjxeqzJQAzBud5ND0Tx8ARB465m2d_1aA-kBFoOkzstZng9onGO8y7Qgv0l44txcmY5wYPYyLV4I83WCwy-Jxqxk1VMCgIAnLzTL_jv0Vg2z5-YKB5NmPKk7EiPW7My6SrhtpDHmrAiBM5DY_vWk56Wyms-65VQrvKIs1DsQtD8_u5to-XNlms7f7X1T77C-syx4qlOMdndg_Tf_r4_aP9hEhWA4gfwbgbYyYoQ__Aarf7uCrP50UZ_EUWSVthmgiqPUSXfHsVKllXvuEZiMoPfskGFVXk6Q%3D%3D)
In faith and unity,
Pastor Paula White National Faith Advisory Board

Apopka, FL 32703

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc69bfe03b49429cbaeb287da2601b91&_e=yUWqFzMedLmCjCWrvZQ27WqVn0qLWJ_gAmAog6dyjuGHwKVc8SeWtXhc8BWEjOlaW_ukzt19QAV6tlhL-nqg0xNHji9d6-1Ji0xtoG_R1LbUPKAqCudFGPo5CBhMHfxnqhLelp6mQlHsvI0vC64pRpCA79XgDuFe6jHMvuyqUQGxVY3OXVsnUq3jlU1szcdrSazVp26eUdqQxn9LD1hQ6iPAzyCxiN0iv7Gfn26XmmA-6A3mfn7SCnoH0L5RoMMmohe2iQkuKk-Cts--E6jvlMyl8Ew1wrTbo1avwKtDpQUtI9MxAW6BGiQ5LRS8C6KtwnaR3PruelMJnigypyW8ToAHVoPVfoe_xdBK05JQusovr1txsy8YnBa8ha1QLIcNiF4sZj3OkYscy9uL-es6Dw%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc69bfe03b49429cbaeb287da2601b91&_e=yUWqFzMedLmCjCWrvZQ27WqVn0qLWJ_gAmAog6dyjuGHwKVc8SeWtXhc8BWEjOlaW_ukzt19QAV6tlhL-nqg0xNHji9d6-1Ji0xtoG_R1LbUPKAqCudFGPo5CBhMHfxnqhLelp6mQlHsvI0vC64pRpCA79XgDuFe6jHMvuyqUQGxVY3OXVsnUq3jlU1szcdrSazVp26eUdqQxn9LD1hQ6iPAzyCxiN0iv7Gfn26XmmBPWM3qTlyrRMkbS3lxDpQg_u2qzSxf03OEx8p9Oh7-nF0WDZfOo5uTTEJACZdB5UTKzb50pzHVsujrNsbfWoZSmd1IIjDzrZRsMmqrdrjhjWEu3lb_t2mNbW7UBQ_7QWaN4uF-T_zkPfw09Za2bVm5wOBxPI7Dzg6mwOphazhVPA%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc69bfe03b49429cbaeb287da2601b91&_e=yUWqFzMedLmCjCWrvZQ27WqVn0qLWJ_gAmAog6dyjuGHwKVc8SeWtXhc8BWEjOlaW_ukzt19QAV6tlhL-nqg0xNHji9d6-1Ji0xtoG_R1LbUPKAqCudFGPo5CBhMHfxnqhLelp6mQlHsvI0vC64pRpCA79XgDuFe6jHMvuyqUQGxVY3OXVsnUq3jlU1szcdrSazVp26eUdqQxn9LD1hQ6iPAzyCxiN0iv7Gfn26XmmAjCTkYsCb1g9Ux5lCn4QBLPSR0MsvKuAcAloVPMl7Jim_1Z1IYXX13zRNljdO9xQ8Ok9C-_7tf9VOh3ivQOFgPcXVdhwAiq5x1myW0ujsr0U61hr-hgWwDn-yuN7K3NJy-znVR8oLtmZMf9_kL_ZcODxSWVt89H75y-1ZGXWPSOQ%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc69bfe03b49429cbaeb287da2601b91&_e=yUWqFzMedLmCjCWrvZQ27WqVn0qLWJ_gAmAog6dyjuGHwKVc8SeWtXhc8BWEjOlaW_ukzt19QAV6tlhL-nqg0xNHji9d6-1Ji0xtoG_R1LbUPKAqCudFGPo5CBhMHfxnqhLelp6mQlHsvI0vC64pRpCA79XgDuFe6jHMvuyqUQGxVY3OXVsnUq3jlU1szcdrSazVp26eUdqQxn9LD1hQ6iPAzyCxiN0iv7Gfn26XmmDZ2UeGY6kY2k8QQwQbBkqWd0UewNscCdYrRQFjW8ZjbOHveb-yUAZNWvRMF1VwikzTJuNbkxp4c6Yabj61b6nJ8ZrBZwpZOollnX8ZqZuLzj45dS9q77S830nh8jNh0recQHuOHRRmyZGBe5gKhCeYD5nrjMxkN4bv3GuL8Q9iYg%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc69bfe03b49429cbaeb287da2601b91&_e=yUWqFzMedLmCjCWrvZQ27WqVn0qLWJ_gAmAog6dyjuGHwKVc8SeWtXhc8BWEjOlaW_ukzt19QAV6tlhL-nqg0xNHji9d6-1Ji0xtoG_R1LbUPKAqCudFGPo5CBhMHfxnqhLelp6mQlHsvI0vC64pRpCA79XgDuFe6jHMvuyqUQGxVY3OXVsnUq3jlU1szcdrSazVp26eUdqQxn9LD1hQ6iPAzyCxiN0iv7Gfn26XmmA3UWqQ7qSHcu9vbJ6nCf3ZJ-9yBr-QDDEg8Gt4wse16aRbdr_tVAYGVFH8RYWkxH0xwfH6hMr1q4W59cVtopXs4BdHu0xG08LjlYhwgalizFfOMTfQ2vSpGlQwFyd7pgrjEBXtFTSJOWTL70ZO4Os7bBDtRtDpVdDkQXDDEyYU_g%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc69bfe03b49429cbaeb287da2601b91&_e=yUWqFzMedLmCjCWrvZQ27WqVn0qLWJ_gAmAog6dyjuGHwKVc8SeWtXhc8BWEjOlaW_ukzt19QAV6tlhL-nqg0xNHji9d6-1Ji0xtoG_R1LbUPKAqCudFGPo5CBhMHfxnqhLelp6mQlHsvI0vC64pRpCA79XgDuFe6jHMvuyqUQGxVY3OXVsnUq3jlU1szcdrSazVp26eUdqQxn9LD1hQ6iPAzyCxiN0iv7Gfn26XmmDJkc7SCRwDoYqDsElWyd01LRT5Cb7Jw9J7vdXYC5VLEGXIK7buo10PPwYXaM9-FQY0FyF0TWdrC7ECnXC3fOq0yTgYP0yzCc9JcMVcEESLoK7iBkOVpXNgCFRRifY2lF6Zk3s5BQjk8Ng9i4UnqaToNV4-LwRjF7IQ1t9-zaOaZQ%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

clean_body: My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. Dear Peter, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: Reminder: 2024 APP Christmas Ball Invite & Keynote speaker
body:
Join us in Washington D.C. for this conservative tradition
| | |
---
| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BOU2s7GjkgOtu3PITyzSpy4cAqyCUC2HuhKYRqUpoPZDEL85XFlMrN2dewOdTaqTFHYcS46YDQ0fX1KJ8B7BAwMSl5PdnHXfUIVuOoIQshHWPL8-8StUuWww6McoE_M7n_0CtLciBC6fX_cae6CK-0pu4bOP25GKfiJw_hcKNjGX5HEEhZTAGiIvyPvlaxL9HeZW3FndCg_OKREVwIZw0Q5xqjpdkOpSSe9NXA2aBUc=&c=ooV4ClEOjJy9f6z8w6Bdx0VNTliLR8hCMZl1ebMzhfqPtSXxY3BcaQ==&ch=UYPt_R6QbSumwvszYx2UPKjuMt9rUB3JWit2IJBO-bvEQAt51wfgYQ==)

| Friends,
The festive season is upon us, and this one, more than ever before, has something for us all to celebrate.
We're thrilled to invite you to our annual Christmas Ball on Thursday, December 5th in Washington D.C. -- this year will be a memorable celebration, and we would love for you to join us.
The American Principles Project Christmas Ball has become an important tradition, bringing together both emerging conservative voices and seasoned advocates - policy makers, and conservative commentators.
In past years, we've hosted influential speakers like Tucker Carlson, this year, who better to have as our main speaker as someone who trail-blazed a return to common sense by asking basic questions like: What is a woman?
Matt Walsh, host of the Matt Walsh Podcast and creator of groundbreaking documentaries "What is a Woman?" and "Am I Racist?" will be our keynote speaker and I couldn't be more excited.

name: Laura Gillen
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
We defeated Anthony D’Esposito earlier this month and his time is up.

| Peter,

_**Did you see this?**_
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97190935/512584398/549506455?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-11-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmRlMzhjNC0zMGE0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zkOWi9XueN7fiB7Tg_TYMk1D-4yGHuvdz4spYLTIzBM=) **D'Esposito isn't ready to say 'goodbye'**
---
| [KEEP NY-04 BLUE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97190936/512584399/549506455?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-11-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmRlMzhjNC0zMGE0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zkOWi9XueN7fiB7Tg_TYMk1D-4yGHuvdz4spYLTIzBM=)
---
Republican Anthony D’Esposito sent an interesting post-election statement to his supporters – _“Taking back #NY04 begins today”_ – indicating he’s already preparing to run again in 2026.

We defeated Anthony D’Esposito earlier this month and his time is up. Voters chose our message of common sense and common ground, and that is exactly the approach I will bring to Washington from Day ONE. As Town Supervisor, I reached across the aisle to lower costs for Nassau County families, and in Congress, I will work in a bipartisan manner to deliver on the pressing issues we face – unlike do-nothing Anthony D’Esposito.

**Our work does not end here. We need to lay a strong foundation to keep Anthony D’Esposito out of office!

clean_body: We defeated Anthony D’Esposito earlier this month and his time is up. | Peter, Did you see this? | | = D'Esposito isn't ready to say 'goodbye' | = Republican Anthony D’Esposito sent an interesting post-election statement to his supporters – “Taking back #NY04 begins today” – indicating he’s already preparing to run again in 2026. We defeated Anthony D’Esposito earlier this month and his time is up. Voters chose our message of common sense and common ground, and that is exactly the approach I will bring to Washington from Day ONE. As Town Supervisor, I reached across the aisle to lower costs for Nassau County families, and in Congress, I will work in a bipartisan manner to deliver on the pressing issues we face – unlike do-nothing Anthony D’Esposito. Our work does not end here. We need to lay a strong foundation to keep Anthony D’Esposito out of office! = | = | = | = | = | = –Laura Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

California’s 45th House District race is the closest in the country right now, with fewer than 400 votes separating Derek Tran and incumbent Michelle Steel. Flipping this seat blue is crucial, but we need your help to cross the finish line as ballots continue to be counted and cured.

Will you rush a split donation between Derek Tran’s recount fund and my campaign to make sure every vote is counted? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tran-ca-45-recount-split?refcode=20241116-total]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tran-ca-45-recount-split?refcode=20241116-total]

This race could make all the difference when it comes to supporting working families and defending reproductive rights. Steel holds just a 5 percent lifetime score [https://aflcio.org/scorecard/legislators/michelle-steel] with the AFL-CIO on pro-worker legislation and firmly opposes a woman’s right to choose, supporting both a national abortion ban and restricting access to contraception.

Californians need a pro-worker, pro-choice representative like Derek Tran in Congress.

Donate now to help us ensure that every vote is counted and every voice is heard. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tran-ca-45-recount-split?refcode=20241116-total]

Thanks for your support and for all you do.

Onward,
Ro

* **Sunday:** [Project 2025 Is Officially Here--How We Fight Back](https://substack.com/redirect/b010745e-2f63-462f-bd54-bfc96002adda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): A recap of Project 2025 and how to counter its fascist policies
* **Monday: ***[The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 145](https://substack.com/redirect/6c0162f4-a854-4ca8-94f7-aa1000809e66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Deep dive into what went wrong in the 2024 POTUS election, why Harris lost, & how we prevent future losses
* **Tuesday:** [How Joe Biden Can Slow MAGA Fascism](https://substack.com/redirect/bea68d48-5b69-4fba-bd9b-c9f9d85cc6e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Biden can make seismic changes to help 10s of millions of Americans--but will he have the courage to act?
* **Wednesday:**[Seriously Joe, Cancel All Student Debt](https://substack.com/redirect/6e711f37-09c5-41b8-b84c-b60c043e6c9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): The receipts legacy media isn't reporting on what cancelling student debt will do for our country
* **Thursday:** [How Republicans ](https://substack.com/redirect/9f64a008-8f2d-4869-a28e-5d8eb3ffb95f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Actually](https://substack.com/redirect/9f64a008-8f2d-4869-a28e-5d8eb3ffb95f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ Stole the 2024 Election](https://substack.com/redirect/9f64a008-8f2d-4869-a28e-5d8eb3ffb95f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): No need to look at wild tech conspiracies when MAGAs are dismantling democracy in broad daylight
* **Friday:**[Trump Nominees Are Not Just A Joke--They Are Dangerous](https://substack.com/redirect/3bcfcfbf-5dd3-47f0-8ead-26972c3183be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): They lack qualifications, have histories of sexual abuse, & have zero regard for human rights

*My analysis of the 2024 election is already my most downloaded podcast episode of the year. It has also resulted in more than 20,000 people unfollowing me on social media. If you have not already, I hope you take a moment to listen to it for yourself and share with your networks.
## **Dad Joke of the Week**
Farmers report that their hoofed animals are increasingly unable to drink their own mother's milk. Scientists believe it's because they are _lack toes intolerant_.

Hey team, here’s a cold, hard truth from this election: we barely eked out a victory here in FL-23. These results prove that this remains an extremely vulnerable district. For a person in a battleground seat like mine, the “wisest” strategy would probably be to keep quiet, keep my head down, and not attract too much attention. But who am I kidding... we all know that won’t happen. Fighting for people across Florida is my specialty! **[So, will you help me reach my $10,000 mid-month goal so that I can continue speaking out and fighting for working families without fear of out-of-state powers flipping this seat in 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97194405/512595436/1921673955?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.16_MM1_B1_F1_S1_C1_35DA_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzJiM2U1OS0zNWE0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OBnTOPk3dVAvB4EE-JdHt5Yum7OTRSWE0nDqycPp23A=)** I can’t help standing up for what I believe in, calling out those who want to blockade progress, and speaking plainly about the issues I’m hearing from constituents. **It’s just who I am.** **[Will you rush in $10 to our mid-month goal so I can keep up the fight for folks across Florida? name: John Fetterman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m going to tell you about my tattoos, Derek
#
Derek,
There’s been a lot of talk in the media lately about how I don’t look or sound like a typical politician. It’s not surprising since my tattoos are *literally* the first thing people Google about me.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241116?refcode=em20241116-9598&refcode2=9598_434096_ZR_rVv&akid=9598%2E434096%2EZR_rVv)
Well enough Googling. **Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself, Derek.**
**On my left arm I have the zip code 15104.** That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as Mayor for 15 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241116?refcode=em20241116-9598&refcode2=9598_434096_ZR_rVv&akid=9598%2E434096%2EZR_rVv)
**On my right arm I have nine different dates.** These represent the dates of people who were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as Mayor, starting in 2005. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic loss of life.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241116?refcode=em20241116-9598&refcode2=9598_434096_ZR_rVv&akid=9598%2E434096%2EZR_rVv)
My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had been robbed and killed by gun violence.
**Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world.** In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to go through.
In my 15 years as Mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I helped initiate youth and art programs for the students of our community and we worked together to create a community center.
We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off, kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment as Mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss of life due to gun violence.
**Derek, I got into public service because I believe that every community is worth fighting for.** And it's my promise to you that I'm going to fight for you and your community just as if it were my own — no matter who’s the president.
But in order to build the kind of campaign that can win again, we need to raise *a lot of money* and a big part of that is people like you chipping in. So today, I have to ask:
[**Will you please chip in $5 or more to our campaign right now? Every dollar helps me keep fighting like hell for your community just like I fight for mine.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241116?refcode=em20241116-9598&refcode2=9598_434096_ZR_rVv&akid=9598%2E434096%2EZR_rVv)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241116?amount=5&refcode=em20241116-9598&refcode2=9598_434096_ZR_rVv&akid=9598%2E434096%2EZR_rVv)**
Thanks for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator for Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241116-9598-footer&t=1&refcode2=9598_434096_ZR_rVv&akid=9598%2E434096%2EZR_rVv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9598%2E434096%2EZR_rVv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9598%2E434096%2EZR_rVv)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Theology 101
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ The gifts of reason and speech [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8f8061fcee41424b97ef10618c6612de&_e=tfYo6QtxODSsCrljWQDUV5Mwcccsho1TYzb4HEIx7xztW4F0pi8xHw9kTDOSrJVgGlT2whRT5CIHBFdyPxdxxbg9IfwuoA1mUXTChBRhYI0lpVfj3CLG5xCtn_ZwPl4rs98Ionanl14182fyp0gfhTUxvTImeb74ZpDAnweIwcWq0_Kqv93m3pq37cM-SvxSGbr2QhgcS-sBoEHD7QHzCd0J-4nQWrPlvxOsg59Ct7T_Yyb3W0I0DF4ekKinGGOHsM9WEgWzD3T984PYizgk1iYlQ1GEX8Vd7-SAp3HufrgEnEI56mteGdWqSrvALmKA9zAU5D9KYT0P2KQXuTpm6cRev3x-kK7jt8GU66a7TmCwkgokg2a1H7LMaCC8Ie8y5fdHo4FUhMdUdlNxw2pOEINAn_ufVpx-n1fohARLN0DF2mimqeE5zALsa5wQdbmm) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8f8061fcee41424b97ef10618c6612de&_e=tfYo6QtxODSsCrljWQDUV5Mwcccsho1TYzb4HEIx7xztW4F0pi8xHw9kTDOSrJVgGlT2whRT5CIHBFdyPxdxxbg9IfwuoA1mUXTChBRhYI0lpVfj3CLG5xCtn_ZwPl4rs98Ionanl14182fyp0gfhTUxvTImeb74ZpDAnweIwcWq0_Kqv93m3pq37cM-SvxSGbr2QhgcS-sBoEHD7QHzCd0J-4nQWrPlvxOsg59Ct7T_Yyb3W0I0DF4ekKinGGOHsM9WEgWzD3T984PYizgk1iYlQ1GEX8Vd7-SAp3Hufrga4tVTFQ3lZz9tT-oG1LwTJTKX_hMa5cvVBZzlQvBOygmWbAEZ4tMQGwfGYjd3H0JoLGygZ0rqrdzVnRMSriC2DSLHwJu8SY7wAgbAdu33YiM9Vxbx0O7LfGZezGp1GllxaM6MIzZJ9WMfdVjFcxy7) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

clean_body: A message from our sponsor... The gifts of reason and speech Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God. The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s “Theology 101” online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century. “Theology 101” has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is . You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative. We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of “Theology 101” on DVD. name: Jenna Burns
subject: It’s basically a death sentence
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a878e3b37c9b40db846dcfa2a3fefade&_e=u033LqZ8kNMfEumobP6K9gduPiQKbG1qEqZLVvy0jJvM7GjP10nZCB8Y5JX6-k3-G3oSJeD6BYcTXtSoJwvjPQ_vwhIfNgxY-5866XR_JbQ3kUiPXAGuJLTYn5Vjxl1td79SXX0kEq6gEBfWV7g2fxRAz_yDagvaPTIDBYOygp3PPAIq2z3VNyhozGw-ZhegMxrmmDxJSvq-gez231jzXbJAve1pOjONuzr_qzRPutWCBUJT2MPaiweFAaOUdyWJ46Tyo03ey5QTvue2hyfaE4exf4qwpduJVcZWC50O7gcX8a5WvTBOWu_s-7zpDYkbORcApVUUmacl0XZBKW6nse-bPZBR-jLdZdW0yHM-Yn4kYsUEl6xbP_qEJcS1h-O5)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a878e3b37c9b40db846dcfa2a3fefade&_e=u033LqZ8kNMfEumobP6K9gduPiQKbG1qEqZLVvy0jJvM7GjP10nZCB8Y5JX6-k3-G3oSJeD6BYcTXtSoJwvjPQ_vwhIfNgxY-5866XR_JbQ3kUiPXAGuJLTYn5Vjxl1td79SXX0kEq6gEBfWV7g2fxRAz_yDagvaPTIDBYOygp3PPAIq2z3VNyhozGw-ZhegMxrmmDxJSvq-gez231jzXbJAve1pOjONuzr_qzRPutUgd5kB-pa6FTKhHvWqEamZAtbPAmL6xiOb6pOsFCagTScCJZXBrZU4uOpCA3v5vU3pxLzGWTOOo8MSKxtDMQSeBZy-3C8nvxjQIv1_biyemHciShDhCQeMtj8Z4-wCBtDohE4FPiSYWtpbGfGORml8)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a878e3b37c9b40db846dcfa2a3fefade&_e=u033LqZ8kNMfEumobP6K9gduPiQKbG1qEqZLVvy0jJvM7GjP10nZCB8Y5JX6-k3-G3oSJeD6BYcTXtSoJwvjPQ_vwhIfNgxY-5866XR_JbQ3kUiPXAGuJLTYn5Vjxl1td79SXX0kEq6gEBfWV7g2fxRAz_yDagvaPTIDBYOygp3PPAIq2z3VNyhozGw-ZhegMxrmmDxJSvq-gez231jzXbJAve1pOjONuzr_qzRPutUHY44KUjYl87UmH_7132XkAYjrseu8l0-tUk2yq8zNTKnKxCsNVKptUTJQmDTnqnILZlGglVzPeJ3OXWLGn6WN-Fz6YrF5CXcoH7XaimalvqGFqAB1gpGC6ffb6yYL45uOf0EtrTTWYzI9lYxqDuTf)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a878e3b37c9b40db846dcfa2a3fefade&_e=u033LqZ8kNMfEumobP6K9gduPiQKbG1qEqZLVvy0jJvM7GjP10nZCB8Y5JX6-k3-G3oSJeD6BYcTXtSoJwvjPQ_vwhIfNgxY-5866XR_JbQ3kUiPXAGuJLTYn5Vjxl1td79SXX0kEq6gEBfWV7g2fxRAz_yDagvaPTIDBYOygp3PPAIq2z3VNyhozGw-ZhegMxrmmDxJSvq-gez231jzXbJAve1pOjONuzr_qzRPutXxtfiEWvbcebUDa-6cWiiG6KyH8Ka5fKilOkTr_gCh3-79t5EWMgQwpszqM9n3JApSpV3cBeb1dwlgvEK6FMb2ZhXvC8-Ux5eBhnAX88PcrwNl1WvbxJZAb_HptDRzqqVgGdF2lb6DQ2trVo--scym)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a878e3b37c9b40db846dcfa2a3fefade&_e=u033LqZ8kNMfEumobP6K9gduPiQKbG1qEqZLVvy0jJvM7GjP10nZCB8Y5JX6-k3-G3oSJeD6BYcTXtSoJwvjPQ_vwhIfNgxY-5866XR_JbQ3kUiPXAGuJLTYn5Vjxl1td79SXX0kEq6gEBfWV7g2fxRAz_yDagvaPTIDBYOygp3PPAIq2z3VNyhozGw-ZhegMxrmmDxJSvq-gez231jzXbJAve1pOjONuzr_qzRPutXO4TGERedSI881bz_j36mYp3bWXEpFFUZ04JpD0azIttgioDijjwk20Zh_A5WniIXHIYjT-pUorklKuhp-_OW1PHxRmsBCcPGZMryHm6sT50iwwzeT1daFrMb5KVf1r3nZIsa4GsfOQnTe9BaTJq6H)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a878e3b37c9b40db846dcfa2a3fefade&_e=u033LqZ8kNMfEumobP6K9gduPiQKbG1qEqZLVvy0jJvM7GjP10nZCB8Y5JX6-k3-G3oSJeD6BYcTXtSoJwvjPQ_vwhIfNgxY-5866XR_JbQ3kUiPXAGuJLTYn5Vjxl1td79SXX0kEq6gEBfWV7g2fxRAz_yDagvaPTIDBYOygp3PPAIq2z3VNyhozGw-ZhegMxrmmDxJSvq-gez231jzXbJAve1pOjONuzr_qzRPutW17KbvKdfdd32hsuHgOPlp-ZGWFsq7azxWJxJL0fgbtgqEpEieqal7oS6Y9SUv5up9ktZYGQpHNReHxNRUO92Qga2fbqjG18Wjpr60K4XU9jlD2sJrlIGWkfzHeIiP1w_XRHb2MeAukIsxveDXb85p)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a878e3b37c9b40db846dcfa2a3fefade&_e=u033LqZ8kNMfEumobP6K9gduPiQKbG1qEqZLVvy0jJvM7GjP10nZCB8Y5JX6-k3-G3oSJeD6BYcTXtSoJwvjPQ_vwhIfNgxY-5866XR_JbQ3kUiPXAGuJLTYn5Vjxl1td79SXX0kEq6gEBfWV7g2fxRAz_yDagvaPTIDBYOygp3PPAIq2z3VNyhozGw-ZhegMxrmmDxJSvq-gez231jzXbJAve1pOjONuzr_qzRPutWxjj4fT17oV6YZchG6DkZXAcJO1YEEkS7iOhpSheyiaGDyjFLOHEjq4sEE8NlF79l9uZWleTJbrmu5kX4ttabkosnGOx582CWOz0wzWNGbo-1c_6aajw-Is9CWMerTmKo9vXfGVdh2n4V44-hm907N)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click [here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=a878e3b37c9b40db846dcfa2a3fefade&_t=r-ZXv6CWYbf3Yd_UX6X1vb2doOtVFUaiY-G-nX8zEXS_TU30pZEOW710R2sTg78RNX_S3llVUBOMQnCEzi6qrj1inXx5pbROq-FkeGN4hrajFO1OXT0fz8Q3VYLMgR1M) to unsubscribe

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Please let us explain why a donation to the Democratic Party is so important.
body:
We know that many of you are tired, disappointed, burnt out, and the last thing you thought you would be doing is making a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.
---
We know that many of you are tired, disappointed, and burnt out, and the last thing you thought you would be doing is making a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. But today is the day we need Democrats to step up and chip in if you're in a place to do so. Let us explain why: In just a few weeks, a new Congress will be sworn in. Shortly after that, Trump will become president. We’re already seeing how disastrous it could be. We need -- America needs -- a strong and robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under his control. We get that you may be tired or feeling tapped out. But we cannot sit back and let Trump take us backward without a fight. So we have to ask one more time: [**We're asking you, humbly, to make a contribution to the Democratic Party today. It can be $5, $50, or whatever you can afford. It will all add up, and we will use your support to mobilize Democrats in the weeks ahead to stop the far-right Trump agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241116_2336_fr&refcode2=2339_22930333_y0kmFu&akid=2339%2E22930333%2Ey0kmFu) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241116_2336_fr&refcode2=2339_22930333_y0kmFu&akid=2339%2E22930333%2Ey0kmFu)**

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Sign the petition: Democratic Party elites need to face facts and take on the billionaire class
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, we’ve seen
two different reactions within the Democratic Party to another election
loss to Donald Trump.

On one side, Bernie Sanders said that Democrats abandoned the working
class and must embrace a true progressive economic agenda for all. “While
the Democratic leadership defends the status quo, the American people are
angry and want change.” He said the Party must choose between the working
class and the billionaire class. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20510?source=email-20241116&t=1011&akid=7240%2E5885482%2EkDcwYY ]Add your name now to support Bernie’s
vision for transforming the Democratic Party >>

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20510?source=email-20241116&t=1012&akid=7240%2E5885482%2EkDcwYY ]ADD YOUR NAME

On the other side, DNC Chair Jaime Harrison called Bernie’s words
“straight up BS.” Harrison is the one who oversaw the Party for Trump’s
victory and a GOP trifecta. He and other party elites seem ready to fight
for the status quo — instead of trying to fight to win for the people.
It’s no surprise when the Party is so beholden to corporate special
interests. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20510?source=email-20241116&t=1013&akid=7240%2E5885482%2EkDcwYY ]Add your name if you think Democratic Party elites need to
face facts and take on the billionaire class >>

Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese wrote in The Hill
this week, assessing the shortfalls of the Harris campaign that Democratic
leadership must grapple with if the Party has a chance at winning in the
future.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20510?source=email-20241116&t=1014&akid=7240%2E5885482%2EkDcwYY ][IMG]

Joseph said, “Harris might have seized the moment with a powerful populist
economic message, naming real corporate adversaries like the world’s
wealthiest man (and Trump’s top donor) Elon Musk. Instead, she courted her
own billionaire surrogate Mark Cuban as well as war hawk Liz Cheney,
hoping to woo wealthy donors and Republicans nostalgic for the Bush
years.”

Our Revolution called for the campaign to focus on popular progressive
economic messaging, but the Harris team chose to placate its corporate
backers instead.

We organized around what our fight for progressive change under Harris
would look like, but the Democratic Party failed to put forth a campaign
that could defeat Trump.

One of our most important fights now is to transform the Democratic Party
so that it represents Bernie’s agenda — the working class people’s agenda
— and kicks out the influence of the billionaire, corporate class. Or else
we’re doomed to lose elections to right-wing extremists going forward.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20510?source=email-20241116&t=1015&akid=7240%2E5885482%2EkDcwYY ]Add your name now to stand with Bernie and Our Revolution in the fight
to create real, transformative change in the Democratic Party.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20510?source=email-20241116&t=1016&akid=7240%2E5885482%2EkDcwYY ]ADD YOUR NAME

Thank you,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20241116.RCZHeZ&t=1008&akid=7240%2E5885482%2EkDcwYY ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20241116.EY_Vc_&t=1009&akid=7240%2E5885482%2EkDcwYY ]GIVE MONTHLY
