name: California Dems
subject: “Too close to call” in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Hi there.
We know that most news outlets have called control of the U.S. House for the Republican Party. But we still have multiple uncalled U.S. House races in our state that will help determine the balance of power.
Simply put: Republican Speaker Mike Johnson *could* be facing a diminished majority, especially as President Trump appoints Republican Members of Congress to his administration.
We need to narrow the gap as much as possible to give Democrats as much leverage as possible (and perhaps even take back the House in special elections later this year). That’s why our teams are still working 24/7 to ensure every eligible vote is counted in our uncalled U.S. House races. Will you pitch in a donation to fuel this work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-nov24?refcode=&amount=]

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: Republicans are working to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Pennsylvania’s Senate race isn’t over.
Hi Peter,
I wanted to send you a quick update on what’s happening here on the ground in Pennsylvania’s Senate race:
David McCormick and national Republicans are working to throw out votes in an attempt to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters and ultimately impact the outcome of this election.
With tens of thousands of votes left to count, we are still fighting to ensure that Pennsylvanians' voices are heard in this Senate race — but we need your help.
**[Can you split $10 between Bob Casey and Lucas Kunce to support our efforts in Pennsylvania today? We’re counting on you to stand up for the voting rights of Pennsylvanians.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84197?refcode=em20241116-8673&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8673%2E614464%2E46Vjtn)**

body:
We need leaders to step up and hold them accountable.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97196424/512601418/1328794144?refcode=ea.48973c66-3aa4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.48973c66-3aa4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4OTczYzY2LTNhYTQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vAJ4N6FTw5UNzGiyAwgbHrgpNvE8pLmGGOOCYYlqEeY=&emci=55fe4b58-8ca3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=48973c66-3aa4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)
---
**Donald Trump promised to name only the “best people” to his government, and this week, he followed through![Read about them below, and consider a contribution to JanePAC so we can elect leaders who will hold them accountable to the people](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97196425/512601419/2105508926?refcode=ea.48973c66-3aa4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.48973c66-3aa4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4OTczYzY2LTNhYTQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vAJ4N6FTw5UNzGiyAwgbHrgpNvE8pLmGGOOCYYlqEeY=)** 👇 _Trump has announced a slate of unqualified, biased, conflicted sycophants to run our country — and we can only imagine what havoc they’ll wreak._ He is giving **Elon Musk** and **Vivek Ramaswamy** untold powers over “efficiency” in the “Department of Government Efficiency” or “DOGE” office. He also named now-former Republican Representative **Matt Gaetz** (who has faced investigation by the Department of Justice and the House Ethics Committee related to sex trafficking, sexual misconduct, and accepting “improper gifts” while in office, and who we had to check was actually a lawyer) as his Attorney General. He plans to place the Defense Department in the entirely incapable hands of Fox News anchor **Pete Hegseth,** a decision that is already sending shockwaves through the national security community. And he plans to allow anti-vax conspiracy theorist **Robert F. Kennedy Jr.** to “go wild” on public health. **Doug Burgum,** governor of North Dakota, is Trump’s nominee to be the Interior Secretary. Burgum is intimately connected with the fossil fuel industry and helped ensure millions of dollars in contributions to the Trump campaign from oil & gas companies. He’ll enforce Trump’s “drill, baby, drill” mandate to ensure those companies can continue to pump up more and more “liquid gold.” Meanwhile, Trump is naming former Congressman **Lee Zeldin** to lead the EPA in 2025. With Zeldin at the helm, the EPA may be poised to roll back decades of climate progress. Zeldin’s abysmal record — including a 14% lifetime score from the League of Conservation Voters — reveals he’s fully aligned with an agenda that threatens to obliterate decades of climate progress. **Look, these folks are ready to help put Donald Trump’s Project 2025 agenda into play on Day 1. We need leaders to step up on the state and local levels to mitigate the harm.** **[JanePAC’s mission is to support down-ballot candidates who will defend our climate and our rights. Can you power our critical work by contributing $25 to the fight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97196426/512601420/2105508926?amount=25&refcode=ea.48973c66-3aa4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.48973c66-3aa4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4OTczYzY2LTNhYTQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vAJ4N6FTw5UNzGiyAwgbHrgpNvE8pLmGGOOCYYlqEeY=)** | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97196427/512601421/2105508926?amount=25&refcode=ea.48973c66-3aa4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.48973c66-3aa4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4OTczYzY2LTNhYTQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vAJ4N6FTw5UNzGiyAwgbHrgpNvE8pLmGGOOCYYlqEeY=)

body:
| | | **BREAKING via AP:** **"Pennsylvania Senate contest headed toward a recount"**
**We can't let up now:****[We must fight for every single seat to hold Trump accountable! Will you chip in $5 now to make sure we have the resources to defeat MAGA Republicans across the country?>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241116-BREAKING-PARecountAnnounced-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241116-BREAKING-PARecountAnnounced-Pros-sl1&akid=18948%2E9716520%2EQh5qgf)**
| | [DONATE $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241116-BREAKING-PARecountAnnounced-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241116-BREAKING-PARecountAnnounced-Pros-sl1&akid=18948%2E9716520%2EQh5qgf)
---

**This is a MAJOR update, team:** Pennsylvania's Senate race is officially going to a recount!

With this _crucial_ race still up in the air, all eyes are on us. We need to fight for every single seat and ensure Pennsylvanians' voices are heard -- and that means having _all possible resources_ at our disposal. But right now, we're running short of our URGENT $50,000 goal and we're counting on YOUR help to catch up.

**We only have until midnight to meet our target and keep up the fight. Please,****what we do now will impact our country for YEARS:**

The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: | | | Sorry to be so blunt, but right now there are races that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. Whether we have the resources to ensure every vote is counted or not in these races depends on folks like you making a donation today. It will all add up fast when you and others like you are united in making sure every vote is counted and every voter's voice is heard. That's why we’re asking: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | More soon, Kamala HQ | | | |

name: Mike Lawler For Congress
subject: This Week's Lawler Ledger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawler for Congress, Inc
body:
| | | | [ ](https://www.lawlerforcongress.com/)
---
| | _**_November Lawler Ledger_**_ This edition of the Lawler Ledger is dedicated to you, Peter. After last week's historic victory – there’s only one thing we can say – THANK YOU.
We can’t thank each and every one of you enough for everything you’ve done to make this happen. _Mike talked a lot in this campaign about being bipartisan, and last night’s victory is evidence that people listened._ While Mike is and always will be a proud Republican...Let us be clear: he would not have won tonight without the support of Democrats and Independents, who crossed party lines and I won’t let them down. Thank you for trusting Mike with your support. Together, we will continue to make the Hudson Valley and America a better, safer, and more prosperous place for everyone.
---
|
* * *
---
| | **🚨LAWLER POLLING 🚨**
---
|
* * *
---
| | _Are you concerned about Gov. Kathy Hochul's congestion plan?_

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: U.S. taxpayers have funded 70% of Israel’s attacks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

For more than a year, the far-right government of Israel has conducted
countless war crimes against Palestinian and Lebanese civilians — and the
United States gave them $22 billion in weapons and bombs to do it.

A new report found that U.S. taxpayers funded 70 percent of Israel’s
attacks over the last year that have left at least 170,000 people killed
or injured in Gaza and Lebanon, even though a majority of Americans
support an immediate ceasefire.

The Biden administration wants to send another $20 billion worth of
military aid despite clear evidence of Israel displacing millions of
people, systematically destroying Gaza’s healthcare system, blocking food
and medical aid from reaching those in need, burning families alive in
refugee tents, and much more. To continue arming Israel while it commits
genocide and ethnic cleansing would violate federal and international law.

We cannot stand by while our tax dollars fuel this carnage. That’s why
Senator Bernie Sanders has introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to
block new shipments of U.S.-made weapons and military equipment to Israel.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140514?t=1002&akid=36156%2E1203867%2EnmKbyv ]Bernie is bringing his resolutions up for a vote next week, so we need
to build urgent, undeniable pressure on the Senate to pass them. Sign the
petition now to tell your Senators to vote yes on the Joint Resolutions of
Disapproval to block $20 billion in U.S. weapons to Israel!

Take Action

As Bernie said, “Sending more weapons is not only immoral, it is also
illegal. We cannot continue to be complicit.”

This is our chance to stop the flow of weapons and bombs that Israel is
using to commit horrific atrocities against humankind.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241116-36156-footer&t=1003&refcode2=36156_1203867_nmKbyv&akid=36156%2E1203867%2EnmKbyv

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=36156%2E1203867%2EnmKbyv

[ ]Bernie is bringing his resolutions up for a vote next week, so we need to build urgent, undeniable pressure on the Senate to pass them. Sign the petition now to tell your Senators to vote yes on the Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block $20 billion in U.S. weapons to Israel! Take Action As Bernie said, “Sending more weapons is not only immoral, it is also illegal. We cannot continue to be complicit.” This is our chance to stop the flow of weapons and bombs that Israel is using to commit horrific atrocities against humankind. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

subject: Update on Giving Tuesday
body:
We're a bit early
USO Supporter,
I wanted to reach out right away because we sent out a Giving Tuesday email this morning ... a bit early. Today is clearly NOT Giving Tuesday (or even Tuesday!).
But a big thank you to everyone who donated anyway! Giving Tuesday is the biggest fundraising day of the year for the USO, so we truly appreciate your (early) support, and every dollar will still go to helping the USO support our brave service members.
**If you 'd still like to support our heroes in uniform with a pre-Giving Tuesday matched gift, here's a new personalized link for you: [https://uso.org/donate/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/YWdETY8eN4f_/TUxGalZsODFMbkt5enlUaDExcVdxWmdVZTkyalEvV2pBQmdLMjJsY0dPeTg4Y3VMMUF6OGhDVWw3ZnpQZGEvRXVpdE9KZG8wMHRKN1NmUloxbllYNWxEcHpWaEZFRTltMnB5T2pRMEJWVDA9S0/MHBqWStub2dYcUVSN0trSGw0RitBSjUya2VjeDJyOVdSa0h4VUtoazNldmw0YnlNaHR5OFpqVzMvTUdiM1pCWHBOMzYraGQwOUlCazh0bkpJcFhiYlQ2WTFjalNMZlQrS0)**

The USO

We're reaching out with three reasons why your gift to the USO today is mission-critical in supporting our brave service members.
1. Our heroes in uniform make countless unseen sacrifices -- **including spending the holidays far from their families and loved ones.** Your support helps them stay connected to home when they need it most, in the form of a video call and the comfort of a warm holiday meal enjoyed at a USO Center.

2. **The USO is a nonprofit organization that relies on the generosity and support of people who care deeply about our service members -- like you.** We are not a government agency -- we're an organization dedicated to supporting military heroes and their families. Your generous gift today will help advance the USO mission of strengthening the well-being of those who serve.

3. Today, **your generosity will also be MATCHED** , dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, thanks to a generous group of donors. So that means every dollar you give will be worth twice as much to provide vital support to those who serve.

[GIVE $29 (BECOMES $58)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-)
---
[GIVE $58 (BECOMES $116)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~CyDvjXB~)
---
[GIVE $116 (BECOMES $232)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-)
---
[MATCH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj~kP-M7/TUxGalZsODFMbkt5enlUaDExcVdxWmdVZTkyalEvV2pBQmdLMjJsY0dPeTg4Y3VMMUF6OGhDVWw3ZnpQZGEvRXVpdE9KZG8wMHRKN1NmUloxbllYNWxEcHpWaEZFRTltMnB5T2pRMEJWVDA9S0/MHBqWStub2dYcUVSN0trSGw0RitBSjUya2VjeDJyOVdSa0h4VUtoazNldmw0YnlNaHR5OFpqVzMvTUdiM1pCWHBOMzYraGQwOUlCazh0bkpJcFhiYlQ2WTFjalNMZlQrS0)
---
As you enjoy family and friends this holiday season, please take a moment to remember our service members far from home. From providing support in the Middle East to hurricane relief in North Carolina, our heroes in uniform are always ready to serve. And your Giving Tuesday donation will help the USO bring them a sense of connection and home this holiday season and into the new year.
**[So please, will you donate $29 or more now to help us reach our $500,000 Giving Tuesday goal via email and text message and have the value of your gift DOUBLED to support our service members?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[GIVE NOW TO MATCH YOUR GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for supporting the USO. Your generosity truly makes a difference.
With gratitude,
The USO

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2ffb0904315c495ea34747f7e290d10c&_e=mg3x_YDkV2VQSrqZnXtFdtiDKlCgESiY_omkuI_elmVx7E2T-oD1XPuxfV6X1Wgyltdyvdyuudzp4N5EZ39c5LYS-Rsk1A-f5WD4Y3giatUpajK2QIbwkPUi4q6T2VQ--VFSmYOnId3vZnxuvYj8PKBGbINujSJXhVFBQGopTZVADRbRbyUFNzMiqKDMsCuXZVWzoUI3AvaxH4y81tzUh6tcmow_FA15g9Ya4CUcZbBvtvoTjAlOevicN-ux5uh8X-5uxPbweGvaf9M6FbdMJnvj0RhcXMWPZsymNfuNN4_BtBLBgNqTD0NhoLNrpFKYMovkB63PAD82alLbnhoI--gP94MseVuPwUGU5MLa73riX8llquMaHnmkamoLEOsC)

clean_body: As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Peter,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: Nick Begich
subject: House Race Called: Nick Begich Wins Alaska's Congressional Race!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALASKANS FOR NICK BEGICH
body:
Decision Desk HQ calls the race for Republican Nick Begich | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=52fa11cde2&e=6679001ba0)
---
|
# **House Race Called: Nick Begich Wins Sole Alaska Congressional Seat**

_**Bold, New Leadership for Alaska’s Future**_
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
November 16, 2024 Contact:
Josh Walton, Campaign Manager
Phone: (907) 227-5785
Email: josh@alaskansfornickbegich.com

Michael Horanburg, General Consultant
Phone: (505) 261-2087
Email: michael@alaskansfornickbegich.com

Website: [www.alaskansfornickbegich.com](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=88a2bbb40d&e=6679001ba0)
**Nick Begich Wins Alaska Congressional Race**
_Bold, New Leadership for Alaska’s Future_ **ANCHORAGE, AK** — **Nick Begich** has [emerged victorious](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=42f4a05232&e=6679001ba0) in Alaska’s congressional race after a closely contested battle, demonstrating the strength of his vision for Alaska’s future and American prosperity.

“This victory belongs to the people of Alaska,” **Begich** said. “Our state has immense potential, and now is the time to responsibly unlock the resources that make Alaska a cornerstone of America’s path to prosperity.”

Throughout the race, Nick Begich underscored the importance of Alaska's role in shaping the nation's economic and energy future. As Alaska’s representative in Congress, Begich is committed to advancing policies that respect Alaska’s unique heritage, prioritize responsible development, and ensure lasting opportunities for future generations.

“Our path forward starts with a unified understanding of what Alaska can do for our nation,” Begich continued. “Together, we will deliver results for Alaska, creating long-term jobs, protecting our way of life, and playing our part to put America back on track. Alaska’s resources are not just a blessing for the people of our state - they are vital to the strength and independence of our entire nation.”

Begich called for collaboration and a renewed focus on practical solutions. “We must work together—across our geographies and communities—to unlock Alaska’s potential and bring meaningful opportunity to every Alaskan. The challenges we have faced are real, but so is our resolve as we work to overcome them.”

As Alaska moves forward, Begich emphasized his commitment to being a voice for all Alaskans, working to strengthen the state’s economy, support families, and lead on issues of national importance.
###
_Nick Begich is the Republican candidate and Congressman-elect for Alaska’s at-large seat in the U. S. Congress. For more information about Nick Begich's campaign, please visit alaskansfornickbegich.com or contact Josh Walton at (907) 227-5785._

## Disaster Briefs
**Disaster Briefs** are your semi-regular summaries and headlines from around the world about natural and man-made disasters, climate change, disease and health, and international conflict. See endnotes for resources used in putting this report together. Data is retrieved, analyzed and summarized on the day of publication unless otherwise noted.
After the final data for 2024 is complete, I will publish a comprehensive analysis and report on the year's major meteorologic, geologic, and public health disasters for the year.
## **Meteorological/Climatological**
**Tropical Storm Sara** caused (and is still causing)[ widespread flooding](https://substack.com/redirect/67ec562c-0767-43e1-ae9c-8ae44a5db08b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as it moves across the Yucatan Peninsula [at a snail's pace](https://substack.com/redirect/baa11fe1-28b8-4569-a055-ff9df030c4ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), with expected rainfall totaling more than 30" of rain in some areas. Sara is expected to re-enter the Gulf of Mexico by Tuesday and strengthen it heads W/NW toward Florida.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eee4128c-1850-465f-b929-b4f3003a51eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f0af2868-a5da-4b0e-a923-5c2531fddc50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
More than half-a-million people [have been evacuated](https://substack.com/redirect/b87420d2-d8bb-47ea-923e-9306d31edf00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the Philippines in anticipation of **Super Typhoon Pepito (Man-yi).** With top winds recorded at 240 km/h (160 mph), Pepito is the strength of a Category 5 hurricane on the Saffir-Simpson scale. Pepito/Man-yi underwent rapid intensification on Friday, jumping from a tropical storm early Friday morning to a super typhoon early Saturday. The increase of 55 mph in 24 hours well exceeds the definition of rapid intensification, which is 35 mph in 24 hours.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49fb1c68-718c-4ae2-83b3-95848322a511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hurricane season officially ends November 30.
Eastern **Ukraine 's [drought](https://substack.com/redirect/52f9b414-a8b2-420f-9046-1fdd1eefd54b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/52f9b414-a8b2-420f-9046-1fdd1eefd54b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)entered its eighth month this week, which continues to exacerbate issues for the nation as they also fight the Russian invasion...

subject: We must defend our immigrant neighbors.

body:
I will keep defending my undocumented neighbors and pushing for a humane immigration system. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWXmOAX1Ut9YZIOknGl25e14o4nMSuhSE3Tf8XYOgzGbw66c9q724wqq3A18RZcydmcOz50K5fIYd-KIG5Twy9W-uZlfM0akL205SGOfKgefJn96myU5GSRZIHTST62TRYbI2YkfEABaf6D5Hqot2vEU5rxoBrZJnhrzO0QQnmuRODZ2FAdsAaK0zXRbG8mMoS/4bi/5nxM1iwBTW-aRiHPENfxXQ/h0/h001.IsKQsMycZdmhKW0PpdgAxk0z8jz9gRp7AWPR489n_tw)
---
Friend, As a former immigration attorney, a daughter of immigrants, and a Congresswoman representing a vibrant community of immigrants, I will keep defending my undocumented neighbors and pushing for a humane immigration system, with real paths to citizenship for asylum-seekers and for the millions of undocumented people who’ve lived and worked in our communities for decades. **I want to lift up the work of United We Dream, the largest immigrant youth-led network in the country, which is already fighting back against anti-immigrant policies, empowering immigrant communities with know-your-rights campaigns, training allies on actions to protect immigrants in their communities, and creating spaces for immigrant youth to come together and process the moment.** Twelve years ago United We Dream successfully pushed the Obama administration to enact DACA, the program that protects undocumented youth from deportation and allows them to get government IDs so they can drive, go to school, and hold jobs.**** This was the first major immigration policy victory in over 25 years! Since then, United We Dream has continued to push for expanded protections and to fight back against deportation raids and racist laws under multiple presidential administrations. **As Trump plans to carry out the largest deportation effort in our country’s history by weaponizing the same policy that sent Japanese Americans to internment camps, United We Dream is ready to defend immigrant communities.** Right now, United We Dream is pressuring the Biden-Harris administration and Members of Congress to take advantage of every possible measure to deliver massive protections for millions of immigrants over the critical next few weeks. [**Will you chip in today to help the undocumented youth leaders at United We Dream urgently ramp up efforts to prevent and respond to mass deportations?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJqqP2W7SFI7wBAUqYrwfUcqKzhplnhU9qEZZ4V3Ou4-gr-Ttp3WB48RYsWCF9ztPfhXSPJ6QztbvSXll9XI08jaTXf2SZtpDC5QblZAfkGgQGNCG3eO5ZHfZS_qoRXJE9B92lDsyEvr_RaRorcmLObkYeJlSAbp81t99XxS9OdsTbIv_qdMjvUeQSvDlSVYWP7xzN4UrdlCuktsHSHXHCJ_LQ1NK1guw9NVOTvgs_1RdRt-N4t301NSXHHiJJyt3fGVTuiS1XWOSXKY2l0k8ygpBzpvCsSNNpLBnqLkzTzBvJN7QNIzNchR4aRk4vHtCKqzT3gogst1CvC-iH8mG42g/4bi/5nxM1iwBTW-aRiHPENfxXQ/h1/h001.JTN7sMd6gvW6U-NIekypx009cYE4ZpAZfrXCEjg1Ews) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to United We Dream Network_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJqqP2W7SFI7wBAUqYrwfUcmbsfJt1tL89DeRtv4o4B0Y9NIpCcjC9Oa9f0AP2SqwpX3IsPIgSNoiSPbQAS4XcbrF_MzgLIHBdKS29gghwctXJakOW3HillV4-G34Y-4JNX21xIcnRsPJRI1nx4j4ucHlyvUZStchAl_zpjWPVerpwTks9pp1y_BoCIlQI56XVeCHmOe_4NT7xOHfI14Frtwv24WrPLM05iFMWe1b-xvdYEdO6zCxnO7Ye_---qdxlCueu-OCTDmpEwQ6gdXH_qus0dsyBF3MGiK1Ds94gYh7UK5N6w-ylv4_lefjZ8AGxxypMBXw3N0AZXfo-RewEB8P2dMHL5EmEZWP4TuREPYXEiwOJiEBsTckHTzs5f4ei/4bi/5nxM1iwBTW-aRiHPENfxXQ/h2/h001._U3iRDyCi1_I2Q9ejFQdFtTXKC43YWLE49cxJUPAj8Q)

Since mobilizing to enact the DACA program, United We Dream has continued to support people with DACA renewals and to expand protections for DACA recipients’ undocumented parents and spouses.
In response to the Obama administration's record number of deportations (which have increased with every following president), United We Dream launched the first and only volunteer-led national hotline to report inhumane behavior by ICE and local law enforcement.
During the first Trump administration, **United We Dream won sanctuary resolutions and state policies that limit cooperation with ICE, while pushing back against Trump’s attacks on DACA and Temporary Protected Status.** Some immigrant children are still separated from their families due to Trump’s cruel policies.
Unfortunately, President Biden continued many of Trump’s anti-immigrant policies and his administration has increased deportations and immigrant detention. Recently we’ve seen more Democrats normalize and participate in the dehumanization and demonization of immigrants.
That’s why **no matter who’s in power, United We Dream’s work to build immigrant community resilience is essential** ,**** including**** running their Undocuhealth program and creating safe spaces for people impacted by unjust anti-immigrant policies.
As United We Dream wrote after Election Day: _“Immigrants are here to stay. We’re ready to fight for our safety and our futures, and will continue to grow our movement of people ready to protect our communities at every turn.”_

clean_body: I will keep defending my undocumented neighbors and pushing for a humane immigration system. | | | Friend, As a former immigration attorney, a daughter of immigrants, and a Congresswoman representing a vibrant community of immigrants, I will keep defending my undocumented neighbors and pushing for a humane immigration system, with real paths to citizenship for asylum-seekers and for the millions of undocumented people who’ve lived and worked in our communities for decades. I want to lift up the work of United We Dream, the largest immigrant youth-led network in the country, which is already fighting back against anti-immigrant policies, empowering immigrant communities with know-your-rights campaigns, training allies on actions to protect immigrants in their communities, and creating spaces for immigrant youth to come together and process the moment. Twelve years ago United We Dream successfully pushed the Obama administration to enact DACA, the program that protects undocumented youth from deportation and allows them to get government IDs so they can drive, go to school, and hold jobs.** This was the first major immigration policy victory in over 25 years! Since then, United We Dream has continued to push for expanded protections and to fight back against deportation raids and racist laws under multiple presidential administrations. As Trump plans to carry out the largest deportation effort in our country’s history by weaponizing the same policy that sent Japanese Americans to internment camps, United We Dream is ready to defend immigrant communities. Right now, United We Dream is pressuring the Biden-Harris administration and Members of Congress to take advantage of every possible measure to deliver massive protections for millions of immigrants over the critical next few weeks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to United We Dream Network | | | | | | | | | | Since mobilizing to enact the DACA program, United We Dream has continued to support people with DACA renewals and to expand protections for DACA recipients’ undocumented parents and spouses. In response to the Obama administration's record number of deportations (which have increased with every following president), United We Dream launched the first and only volunteer-led national hotline to report inhumane behavior by ICE and local law enforcement. During the first Trump administration, United We Dream won sanctuary resolutions and state policies that limit cooperation with ICE, while pushing back against Trump’s attacks on DACA and Temporary Protected Status. Some immigrant children are still separated from their families due to Trump’s cruel policies. Unfortunately, President Biden continued many of Trump’s anti-immigrant policies and his administration has increased deportations and immigrant detention. Recently we’ve seen more Democrats normalize and participate in the dehumanization and demonization of immigrants. That’s why no matter who’s in power, United We Dream’s work to build immigrant community resilience is essential , including running their Undocuhealth program and creating safe spaces for people impacted by unjust anti-immigrant policies. As United We Dream wrote after Election Day: “Immigrants are here to stay. We’re ready to fight for our safety and our futures, and will continue to grow our movement of people ready to protect our communities at every turn.” Thank you for standing up to protect one another. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. name: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
subject: Why I Need Your Help Now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Let's close this chapter together.

|
---
| | | | [**Before stepping into this role, I need your help.**](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=B9oCvaG-v1LL3aXV4mTUyFTQI7Qbz9i2RwqOtQckCRDUfkKhxadsYLRU1Ze7weD2iV810GvLTXAz6qBdoK4Zeg8WUPJh5RXzoZY6j2lXTCJE7umnooMqal_RXE6-2SVM_zyOnxWaz2lMUbK3GTrUQg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=from_rfk_jr_11_16_24_1&n=1)

[](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=B9oCvaG-v1LL3aXV4mTUyFTQI7Qbz9i2RwqOtQckCRDUfkKhxadsYLRU1Ze7weD2iV810GvLTXAz6qBdoK4Zeg8WUPJh5RXzoZY6j2lXTCJE7umnooMqal_RXE6-2SVM_zyOnxWaz2lMUbK3GTrUQg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=from_rfk_jr_11_16_24_1&n=4)
---
|
---
Private Security Was Necessary –
Now I Need Your Help
LET'S CLOSE THIS CHAPTER TOGETHER
Dear Peter,
For 19 years, I have prayed daily for the opportunity to end the chronic disease epidemic and restore health to our children.
Thanks to you, and incoming President-elect Donald Trump’s appointment of me as Secretary of Health and Human Services, we now have a chance to transform America’s health agencies and Make America Healthy Again.
I look forward to working with the more than 80,000 employees at HHS to free the agencies from the smothering cloud of corporate capture so they can pursue their mission to make Americans once again the healthiest people on Earth.
Together we will clean up corruption, stop the revolving door between industry and government, and return our health agencies to their rich tradition of gold-standard, evidence-based science. I will provide Americans with transparency and access to all the data so they can make informed choices for themselves and their families.
Before stepping into this role, I need your help to close out our campaign debt incurred to fund private security after the Biden administration denied me Secret Service protection.
**Many of you may be wondering why we don’t just ask a large donor to simply pay this off.** The answer is straightforward: FEC rules prohibit it. The only way we can pay this off is by individual contribution with a limit of $177,900 per individual through our [**Kennedy Victory Fund 2024**](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=B9oCvaG-v1LL3aXV4mTUyFTQI7Qbz9i2RwqOtQckCRDUfkKhxadsYLRU1Ze7weD2iV810GvLTXAz6qBdoK4Zeg8WUPJh5RXzoZY6j2lXTCJE7umnooMqal_RXE6-2SVM_zyOnxWaz2lMUbK3GTrUQg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=from_rfk_jr_11_16_24_1&n=5).
[Urgent: Pay Down the Debt](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=B9oCvaG-v1LL3aXV4mTUyFTQI7Qbz9i2RwqOtQckCRDUfkKhxadsYLRU1Ze7weD2iV810GvLTXAz6qBdoK4Zeg8WUPJh5RXzoZY6j2lXTCJE7umnooMqal_RXE6-2SVM_zyOnxWaz2lMUbK3GTrUQg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=from_rfk_jr_11_16_24_1&n=6)
[**Your gift of $5,000, $2,500, $1,500, or any amount**](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=B9oCvaG-v1LL3aXV4mTUyFTQI7Qbz9i2RwqOtQckCRDUfkKhxadsYLRU1Ze7weD2iV810GvLTXAz6qBdoK4Zeg8WUPJh5RXzoZY6j2lXTCJE7umnooMqal_RXE6-2SVM_zyOnxWaz2lMUbK3GTrUQg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=from_rfk_jr_11_16_24_1&n=7) will ensure this debt is paid and free me to focus on scrutinizing health agencies, improving safety standards, and breaking corporate control over our health and lives.
[**Please help us start this new chapter debt-free. Every dollar goes directly to closing this financial obligation.**](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=B9oCvaG-v1LL3aXV4mTUyFTQI7Qbz9i2RwqOtQckCRDUfkKhxadsYLRU1Ze7weD2iV810GvLTXAz6qBdoK4Zeg8WUPJh5RXzoZY6j2lXTCJE7umnooMqal_RXE6-2SVM_zyOnxWaz2lMUbK3GTrUQg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=from_rfk_jr_11_16_24_1&n=8)
Thank you for your generosity and steadfast support.
| |
---
---
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
[Mahanow.org](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=from_rfk_jr_11_16_24_1&n=9)
|

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I want to hear from you, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8192%2E5257348%2EwqYiu7)
How are you, Derek?
As I start my Senate transition and prepare to be sworn in as California’s next U.S. Senator, there’s one thing I have on my mind:
**_How can I use my role in the Senate to deliver for the people of California?_**
I am so grateful to Californians for giving me the opportunity to represent you in the United States Senate — I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and do whatever it takes to make sure we deliver.
From bringing down the cost of housing, child care, food, and medicine, to defending our democracy and our hard-fought rights and freedoms, **I’m ready to deliver for you.**
That’s why I want to hear directly from you, Derek:
**[After the election, what is on your mind? What are your top priorities for the months ahead? How are you feeling now that the election is behind us?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20241116-post-election-survey.YtTOyb&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20241116_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8192%2E5257348%2EwqYiu7)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20241116-post-election-survey.YtTOyb&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20241116_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8192%2E5257348%2EwqYiu7)
---
Thank you for taking a few minutes to fill out our survey. I wouldn’t be in this position without you, and my top priority in the Senate will be delivering for all Californians.
Best,
Adam

From bringing down the cost of housing, child care, food, and medicine, to defending our democracy and our hard-fought rights and freedoms, I’m ready to deliver for you. That’s why I want to hear directly from you, Derek: Thank you for taking a few minutes to fill out our survey. I wouldn’t be in this position without you, and my top priority in the Senate will be delivering for all Californians. Best, Adam | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.

| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7f3004e1d45340af9d6287b9655d7b99&_e=nvhTBWyie8uTYGVog7P6SlMgV_dbUvaGrCKEQl00__YcYDFhp0ur588uzkEPAGVkVJkSnv7i1etROQHGI-yuuTwNkJu6lJd3HNCndUDQC7J_99oksBG_ZjZ4fSsTijurQSMfKPW4kP9lg8UdatxrTHKTGJ7IhB2Ej7aLz17UZlQclwibBSmhc5SaW3SjIwoSTUT4EYy8sYafCQSPZNvYIkxQpfvNq2x989C_lvPEYavtY_hIF0sMDrY7DG1Pq3BIg7Ke7Vw2Y-QWD30-pixdcjk4yLjrNXb72okAtBP603ms9QcP_zAIp5wH_YQ5nxLtVtX49vmMh6rDccDRe8S3Li0PdNnT7rzCQJ8ufjJrHEY6FZYG0YTwDilrw0rEQ8Z4AqMP6qo68omHzYr5GZg3jAkGpUxJuLwhW2Odi5cH6fs%3D)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7f3004e1d45340af9d6287b9655d7b99&_e=nvhTBWyie8uTYGVog7P6SlMgV_dbUvaGrCKEQl00__YcYDFhp0ur588uzkEPAGVkVJkSnv7i1etROQHGI-yuuTwNkJu6lJd3HNCndUDQC7J_99oksBG_ZjZ4fSsTijurQSMfKPW4kP9lg8UdatxrTHKTGJ7IhB2Ej7aLz17UZlQclwibBSmhc5SaW3SjIwoSTUT4EYy8sYafCQSPZNvYIkxQpfvNq2x989C_lvPEYavtY_hIF0sMDrY7DG1Pq3BIg7Ke7Vw2Y-QWD30-pixdcojPpwEMajH54hY5-nve0b2hCu3Gs46kgtGVy4eZS379EJyQz5lX6DlUEVPoOmDz6tGf6RP9GMAIxn13R6-UJxEBZ1H9Y8wIyLsOCxLQ60kl5JLJ3mzICL3zqddEbLKdZ6V59D97rx7MVbhMiCg0Pq4%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Juliana, UWDA
subject: Email Congress: Block funding to Israel today!
body:
Demand Congress blocks billions in arms for Israel! | | | Peter, This is the worst stage of the genocide yet. Israel is starving and bombing Palestinians from Gaza and now carrying their attacks into Lebanon. Because we’ve seen firsthand what displacement and violence have done to our immigrant friends and loved ones, we stand against genocide and need our supporters in this fight with us. UWDA supporters, students, and immigrant communities across the country have been vocal about ending the genocide since the beginning, so I wanted to share another opportunity to show your solidarity. **Right now, we’re in a narrow window where the $20 billion arms deal — that President Biden approved in August — to Israel can still be blocked.** In the next week or two, the Senate will hold the first vote in history to directly block weapons to Israel. Each member of Congress will be forced to go on record with where they stand. Peter, we know anti-Palestinian dehumanization runs deep in Congress. But, because you believe in a world where we are all free to move and free to thrive, then you must bring the same support that you have for immigrants into action to demand Congress stop this genocide NOW. [**Will you send a letter today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38YW1llr0eCURtClfySWk2AcSzK8BPMZ08W78jilnfN_ehRGJwAqZ0WeFyQHqsoCMWHyiuC2BvjQQ60kCF5N2R24rJ3xtWiJUyb40Fih1DxzTmNUEPBAvEnLm6krjNk2lZIT8lYZpLfJJPtKZXHUHN-zifKeTcF40y3dFj47gfJr7U869RYzFea0vs_Heb2F0uCt0MjK-1hbiVw9W5UI_K_cnh3w8XO8r375cQNYgqCYHrE0EmEmuk6RPXNETbcamjkKv5LSTlZK-4lXa7ondSgkc0VWOti23z7ty3RoHh5Ha2_bYuusBURahKt0yyHgeDWUc_xkINE7VWFsENCURJBhX8rH7hIoIs-v7c6W6sF8Y9QdnTKtkWE5CuNj9OA2ag/4bi/KdL4KxGiRxq9HAxj-3r8Kg/h0/h001.R0oYP9xeOxO2F-mkq3acwRJPgcFI2uN7CFEk6PHNjPc) **[Act Now!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38YW1llr0eCURtClfySWk2AcSzK8BPMZ08W78jilnfN_ehRGJwAqZ0WeFyQHqsoCMWHyiuC2BvjQQ60kCF5N2R24rJ3xtWiJUyb40Fih1DxzTmNUEPBAvEnLm6krjNk2lZIT8lYZpLfJJPtKZXHUHN-nj2sStltcqxM53GAyUnKFjAL-Gw07RA4ujRarA1USQ-UNxLtwbAX88IELqvH19qGqeC6nyptwDeB9KTdAsSLFVLDnPq4z1VMmEXUp_myXr4zDQyXIOIOvK7H5352LuTF6Vt_Z0lNuedNEg-yYHSlHDIbHCFsQrUILg01BJcwuWQ5Zml96Hxj07ueuAHPeXcxoy_QNzzSQ4KPi0f48ErgESPcM0u-a6xSNibC0ZQmkBk/4bi/KdL4KxGiRxq9HAxj-3r8Kg/h1/h001.7tNpRLKbKvU1RQIz5IbfRCgB09ka9vPR0NXdTQ7DnZs)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38YW1llr0eCURtClfySWk2AcSzK8BPMZ08W78jilnfN_ehRGJwAqZ0WeFyQHqsoCMWHyiuC2BvjQQ60kCF5N2R24rJ3xtWiJUyb40Fih1DxzTmNUEPBAvEnLm6krjNk2lZIT8lYZpLfJJPtKZXHUHN-m_c86lYQbnaWeeqzunp7YrG_DHstOFzdXijXPkpBXl9YxoxDsqwrAQgjc4hXvjx5v_9C66kKxFFy_Xe3KKKEvUJQ4xkLykCe6bFsy1u_bs1Dz3iXwnVw4jJBNMtjhZq-hYQPHgMJpbR4Y-LA6MZFfgssP8cDMyEt0WoD7HnzfkxEVxzh_6yRVMNrlwyoMW8NMAfEmSw0K6jeVcfyBtaIWhZRr7w1zmHlGzWvDwDNxK4/4bi/KdL4KxGiRxq9HAxj-3r8Kg/h2/h001.7sv_VI0g67JYgvdrXFAwvPZYXyEGtYelaUmNnbXzrlM)Sen. Bernie Sanders, Peter Welch, and Jeff Merkley recently introduced six Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to halt the $20 billion weapons deal. These resolutions are the most effective vehicle to block Biden’s $20 billion deal and stop these weapons in their tracks. We must move swiftly to take advantage of this time before Congress goes on record with their vote. [**Will you join me in sending letters to Congress today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38YW1llr0eCURtClfySWk2AcSzK8BPMZ08W78jilnfN_ehRGJwAqZ0WeFyQHqsoCMWHyiuC2BvjQQ60kCF5N2R24rJ3xtWiJUyb40Fih1DxzTmNUEPBAvEnLm6krjNk2lZIT8lYZpLfJJPtKZXHUHN-zXuohBjlcEPlwmARWKWmZnXhLy40VbW_iRGC8J-JYcmSFBFCCH_U0pCgsupqkZV_hwI2CVVVSKU-i7L_0T__QkzIR4mn_Zq_bRsY7e1LQvb8LgsoS4IpjR5hXEZEF1abiAqohdgaZ5UazwP7pu23d4Ls66gW99cdIFn71bQ1Ic4uTEdYOo-fh3F0vyAGF1RBurNINM1ccQIrLBiEdip5dW8Pop5EJXPMobMwvQKByRY/4bi/KdL4KxGiRxq9HAxj-3r8Kg/h3/h001.HZOFniu9-A40PjDxIop_WrYIjP8Bar3IbT4mQw8KqsE) **The people of Gaza and Lebanon cannot wait another day. Blocking this $20 billion in weapons will save lives.** Thanks for taking action, Juliana and the rest of the UWD Action Team

clean_body: Demand Congress blocks billions in arms for Israel! | | | Peter, This is the worst stage of the genocide yet. Israel is starving and bombing Palestinians from Gaza and now carrying their attacks into Lebanon. Because we’ve seen firsthand what displacement and violence have done to our immigrant friends and loved ones, we stand against genocide and need our supporters in this fight with us. UWDA supporters, students, and immigrant communities across the country have been vocal about ending the genocide since the beginning, so I wanted to share another opportunity to show your solidarity. Right now, we’re in a narrow window where the $20 billion arms deal — that President Biden approved in August — to Israel can still be blocked. In the next week or two, the Senate will hold the first vote in history to directly block weapons to Israel. Each member of Congress will be forced to go on record with where they stand. Peter, we know anti-Palestinian dehumanization runs deep in Congress. But, because you believe in a world where we are all free to move and free to thrive, then you must bring the same support that you have for immigrants into action to demand Congress stop this genocide NOW. . Bernie Sanders, Peter Welch, and Jeff Merkley recently introduced six Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to halt the $20 billion weapons deal. These resolutions are the most effective vehicle to block Biden’s $20 billion deal and stop these weapons in their tracks. We must move swiftly to take advantage of this time before Congress goes on record with their vote. The people of Gaza and Lebanon cannot wait another day. Blocking this $20 billion in weapons will save lives. Thanks for taking action, Juliana and the rest of the UWD Action Team | Follow us on: | | | | |

**This is an OUTRAGE.**
Trump hasn’t even taken office yet, and the Democrats are ALREADY in a full-blown panic.
Gavin Newsom has just convened a special session of the California legislature to draft legislation to directly SABOTAGE Trump’s agenda.
In his own words, they want to “Trump-proof” the entire state.
This is NOTHING LESS than a blatant attack on the WILL OF THE PEOPLE.
_**Let’s make this crystal clear: OVER 40% OF CALIFORNIANS VOTED FOR TRUMP.**_
That’s right - 40% of Californians want his policies, not Newsom’s disastrous failures.
_**But it gets WORSE:**_
Newsom has made it clear that this is only the FIRST of MANY “actions” his administration will take to BLOCK Trump’s agenda.
The Democrats have been working for YEARS to strip away our rights.
And now, here’s Newsom undermining the President who was duly elected by a MAJORITY of the people nationwide
We MUST take action NOW.
This is a DIRECT threat to every Republican, every conservative, and every patriot who believes in free and fair governance.
Join the California GOP in DEMANDING that Newsom HALT his radical efforts to block Trump’s agenda.
**We need 10,000 signatures IMMEDIATELY.**

Time is running out.**_](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7d7acecc5bca4fb7a15e4ca08071bfb6&_e=NQ8k_hiLAoMRgEMjhLts3Ev2ZRd8JEeTicYkAtwOPf61EgQj8F_goVeA6LfwNLwCqvI5vrrWFZiKmmXbo1gNOYRL-LfzJI1lI1SExPMaJ9DdnvVe_4QdBY-qD_1aXYCPZ78cEtws0gIJMn6hIx5E7t5T8JUJKUo0Qycx3PHvPdxPYss51HfwzXrxYyiwaGiW7rM2PeYnxxVKVoFKTzFFGYnTjy2N5zrTw92_oi3cj_DeNsY0pfaPmKJgC-9H5RhBw22gzdTXCjW23bZVda6mopijn8OgCf1LA30A2SHfkL_5_TAPo2Ls6Z4IgWE979GOh_TIV80Mi_LBK56ZgTNi9uJ7ZrOpcsY8BPAcLNnlmY8TxBKs05w-ftrF5j4H2DFr_vIGAXT4GBGfySK07hD8oA%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is TERRIFYING for Democracy.| | | This is an OUTRAGE. Trump hasn’t even taken office yet, and the Democrats are ALREADY in a full-blown panic. Gavin Newsom has just convened a special session of the California legislature to draft legislation to directly SABOTAGE Trump’s agenda. In his own words, they want to “Trump-proof” the entire state. This is NOTHING LESS than a blatant attack on the WILL OF THE PEOPLE. Let’s make this crystal clear: OVER 40% OF CALIFORNIANS VOTED FOR TRUMP. That’s right - 40% of Californians want his policies, not Newsom’s disastrous failures. But it gets WORSE: Newsom has made it clear that this is only the FIRST of MANY “actions” his administration will take to BLOCK Trump’s agenda. The Democrats have been working for YEARS to strip away our rights. And now, here’s Newsom undermining the President who was duly elected by a MAJORITY of the people nationwide We MUST take action NOW. This is a DIRECT threat to every Republican, every conservative, and every patriot who believes in free and fair governance. Join the California GOP in DEMANDING that Newsom HALT his radical efforts to block Trump’s agenda. We need 10,000 signatures IMMEDIATELY. Thanks for your support! The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6f15947b0b3c4f36848f075cf5b1f4e4&_e=xcrHdrvB6P4xPKt39l2CWy4A65x70BiEsIvfc_wxny1ydmuErumXa6OppSA47o5ps-OHmAZAWCEeKQCslFcogGihn1Zh79lGbe2bwtl1SlpiQx-1O92DbJNDub1SSuO7xODq28iOIQxn8d5RIHUaeqW3kb4VM9hd10_o5HWjA6ZWHI0kpSrZytcop58C1US42iwjSQTcNYssqjnYQpjRFxw4w2dznLFUzvXQDUzuAC65bl_kG9OVldR-xLkLuidOFtwojcXUyeMAuPAw8PjViczoV4ddlqG1xASYv9Zj5YU3dOCtSojH3ILJbWurWj4up5NcP6092TuC1oe33M6hZmknduIr17FjodB3ITVVeDcLApL8KCRrIokb9yZ_Au8PkISVYZEA7uCDnFw_XsptPw%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: two big uncalled races in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
| Friends: I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails about last week’s elections. Despite a lot of disappointments for all of us, there are still some bright spots that I’m choosing to focus on – and that includes three uncalled House races here in California where our candidates are within striking distance to win and flip those seats from red to blue.

We have paid staff making sure every valid vote is counted. But we’ve blown through just about everything we’ve raised to do this. [**Can you rush a donation today and keep up the fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97203588/512624297/-172684291?source=EM_NBI_ZL_20241114_FR_TBTHPAC_0_Zoe_NA_NA_TBTHPAC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmZlYTliOC00ZGE0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDgw5pISqYee8khlBdMXfkC0Kkm__qX7h0fJtS-ncYw=)

I can’t stress enough how important these final races are. We must keep pushing to the end.

Please make a donation right away: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97203589/512624298/-172684291?source=EM_NBI_ZL_20241114_FR_TBTHPAC_0_Zoe_NA_NA_TBTHPAC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmZlYTliOC00ZGE0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDgw5pISqYee8khlBdMXfkC0Kkm__qX7h0fJtS-ncYw=)_**

Thank you,

Zoe

---

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Peter, the road to 2026 starts TODAY. As we enter into another Trump Presidency, it’s never been more important that we grow our Democratic base here in the Peach State. In less than two years, Georgia will once again be a battleground in the fight for our future as we work to take back the Senate by re-electing Jon Ossoff and electing Democrats up and down the ballot. This November, we saw HISTORIC gains in Democratic turnout, early voting, and the best Harris-Walz performance among all battleground states in the country.
And now, we’re laying the groundwork to build upon these wins in 2026 when Senator Jon Ossoff is up for re-election.
Because the road to taking back the Senate isn’t a sprint — _it’s a marathon._
We’re calling on folks from every corner of the state and country to come together and invest early. name: Liberty Pulse
subject: The Assault on Wealth
body:
Discussions about taxing the wealthy and making them pay their “fair share” have become central to many policy discussions.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. ---
Dear Friend, Discussions about taxing the wealthy and making them pay their "fair share" have become central to many policy discussions. But is a substantial tax on wealth justified? Will it lead to positive economic outcomes? According to David R. Henderson, a Hoover Institution Research Fellow, the answers are no and no.

In his compelling eBook, **The Assault on Wealth** , Henderson explores why such taxes are flawed both philosophically and economically. He provides a thorough analysis that debunks the justification for heavy taxation on the wealthy and outlines the negative repercussions it could have on our economy.

This insightful read is especially relevant as we make decisions for the future of our nation--it will help you understand the deeper implications of proposed economic policies. Henderson's arguments are not only informative but also engaging, offering a fresh perspective on a critical issue.

I'm excited to offer you a free copy of **The Assault on Wealth**. Equip yourself with the knowledge to navigate the economic debates shaping our nation's future.

Simply [click here](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=8618f2832cf644efb6ae1cfd7096df74&_e=1tFImEjIbMo0--6tbjYe5LWF-FGnR_tIi35xhmDbphXQt5liiRvq9_R9Slbi1ycnBEKD9k60IJniCcxdXdxse9t_ULQHJbKL-50CAp-usnjoU3cXvsZNEkU2sbtR8cC3QyTYIsxKGHeXjRVt0vXG4OU5N_6dXf-PTl3aEYUWQWnh8HEpKcVD7m0ys11CMjryGbnFvHLRjCZHPTodxuAt-VS9SQasR2V7j3svJ8gSPpWG0tW-5YFihsNedNE_t-ybOHxtOBAeHqDLTTDokgfQ-cfGPTwRfC45qbf6UHeS4myMYqgdTBawK2OrqB4Fma1XZcX1nCRQHQK_173VphEi-6CRNdUrVzYdi1r__JtYEvKB2ymtY2Xr-fSZquiXbX-3UVrZX44-wHGLnZ_lewmP7w%3D%3D) to request your free copy of **The Assault on Wealth** today.
| |
Thank you,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: Bob Casey
subject: American democracy was born in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4861%2E552475%2E8voTFH)
Peter, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.
Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.
[**I’m here to tell you that the process is _not_ done, and this race is _not_ over. Can you fund our fight to have all voices heard with a donation of $5 or more right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241116-3?refcode=em20241116-3&refcode2=4861_552475_8voTFH&akid=4861%2E552475%2E8voTFH)

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life
body:
You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e72aa89efe364a18a028413713dcd184&_e=-1OK8aFEUjih8_8raUCIHqiK57VoH72fr2A8MbTA4JoXvEs23V6pQfOAmw0FPernwiJ9tqHn-u5wOtSNOpLqtkxe4_3GweTW6nZlk3NYfo1Do7rEd5eHwtN6JRYFmpfXtFhexZ14R-MuJuPlfoNltNqjgYcz3BWIRVejHd3g4JRTlMlNOzdMiCnyyNfulGtmKj1aOcfQly9PD0gBA0hQRSe-QhYJR_VmaKNOil--Th1xNXOtwFDQEpfaIqGKcrEgLovTXBOSCgHdCzJgFrxZDhvjdL3qgoNqRObnxXo-kk5Wl-6wznC-mT-eOxpfYjt9Egoxj7YFmO8CcUMRijGphs11D0bmQaIQFylxqLjAr-6hr-3Uiya5lizfYj3iGxHP)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e72aa89efe364a18a028413713dcd184&_e=-1OK8aFEUjih8_8raUCIHqiK57VoH72fr2A8MbTA4JoXvEs23V6pQfOAmw0FPernwiJ9tqHn-u5wOtSNOpLqtkxe4_3GweTW6nZlk3NYfo1Do7rEd5eHwtN6JRYFmpfXtFhexZ14R-MuJuPlfoNltNqjgYcz3BWIRVejHd3g4JRTlMlNOzdMiCnyyNfulGtmKj1aOcfQly9PD0gBA0hQRSe-QhYJR_VmaKNOil--Th2WLkYJpfXDsJ9XIoobCvW2uiBKr6nkWPIo7WkL9RQjAH72Lc0sScoK6hjNpvaTL76PThqOI2fw6TSm0LM3mIwK9QhQL1akK-M891QLSwlXp5r5T8Y4Zxmqqg9AoCAqmMNz467zxLXLdDKNGV7vYC8I)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e72aa89efe364a18a028413713dcd184&_e=-1OK8aFEUjih8_8raUCIHqiK57VoH72fr2A8MbTA4JoXvEs23V6pQfOAmw0FPernwiJ9tqHn-u5wOtSNOpLqtkxe4_3GweTW6nZlk3NYfo1Do7rEd5eHwtN6JRYFmpfXtFhexZ14R-MuJuPlfoNltNqjgYcz3BWIRVejHd3g4JRTlMlNOzdMiCnyyNfulGtmKj1aOcfQly9PD0gBA0hQRSe-QhYJR_VmaKNOil--Th0blExE3GZG0g_lTDSmdAwHqgZACUTqomp5KR8-_SLa6Lg1-Z9pbimXt07PaU6wZrV5Gxd3-BimU7iFexDfYH1nQ7TKxd3guwBrKnuLP4_nBbT2DVb2ZFvaruWS2BfXpRkovImQyVU4MC_HW4_CGoFG)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e72aa89efe364a18a028413713dcd184&_e=-1OK8aFEUjih8_8raUCIHqiK57VoH72fr2A8MbTA4JoXvEs23V6pQfOAmw0FPernwiJ9tqHn-u5wOtSNOpLqtkxe4_3GweTW6nZlk3NYfo1Do7rEd5eHwtN6JRYFmpfXtFhexZ14R-MuJuPlfoNltNqjgYcz3BWIRVejHd3g4JRTlMlNOzdMiCnyyNfulGtmKj1aOcfQly9PD0gBA0hQRSe-QhYJR_VmaKNOil--Th0hOxAHr_lZljEWK_2sGPrPvZMIfavRmdPEPXsmmxgHe-7_hn4e9rTgz1qOKCLSLUPREAp3lQd4LRGRcXlXdpB1CBH2jzCMgW_jC3BmdfzR-pYKvruLjh6fpWOkttoLDAMkaxxjrK0_58JU3sBJWFy0)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e72aa89efe364a18a028413713dcd184&_e=-1OK8aFEUjih8_8raUCIHqiK57VoH72fr2A8MbTA4JoXvEs23V6pQfOAmw0FPernwiJ9tqHn-u5wOtSNOpLqtkxe4_3GweTW6nZlk3NYfo1Do7rEd5eHwtN6JRYFmpfXtFhexZ14R-MuJuPlfoNltNqjgYcz3BWIRVejHd3g4JRTlMlNOzdMiCnyyNfulGtmKj1aOcfQly9PD0gBA0hQRSe-QhYJR_VmaKNOil--Th0dE7wTl1qhl525wkw-zIo9PHEafdNYOclDdc2t5rptMK34qI1vFg1scYyng-kyUEMNnk3geXmKOM6W8GzkLcop_L87M_I-xRnn1etTQD-aIYqg9-MACvvhbO4i-utyMOC_h_Oa70MjYcxJ-SE3J9pu)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e72aa89efe364a18a028413713dcd184&_e=-1OK8aFEUjih8_8raUCIHqiK57VoH72fr2A8MbTA4JoXvEs23V6pQfOAmw0FPernwiJ9tqHn-u5wOtSNOpLqtkxe4_3GweTW6nZlk3NYfo1Do7rEd5eHwtN6JRYFmpfXtFhexZ14R-MuJuPlfoNltNqjgYcz3BWIRVejHd3g4JRTlMlNOzdMiCnyyNfulGtmKj1aOcfQly9PD0gBA0hQRSe-QhYJR_VmaKNOil--Th16rk3dNl3tKfYWmsJYbdn-0C6A1xGAEmhWSdMUj29Ta93O4YclfTfllWgkz7Xl0YoRHMhmhdKCjemoyR-Q0qLkGPS_h8KFMcsBCG-Cz5rFENxK47V3hLoGcOw_mrDRonCIUBuhzC6MujQ2WIXGNTP7)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e72aa89efe364a18a028413713dcd184&_e=-1OK8aFEUjih8_8raUCIHqiK57VoH72fr2A8MbTA4JoXvEs23V6pQfOAmw0FPernwiJ9tqHn-u5wOtSNOpLqtkxe4_3GweTW6nZlk3NYfo1Do7rEd5eHwtN6JRYFmpfXtFhexZ14R-MuJuPlfoNltNqjgYcz3BWIRVejHd3g4JRTlMlNOzdMiCnyyNfulGtmKj1aOcfQly9PD0gBA0hQRSe-QhYJR_VmaKNOil--Th0A_Tg5da5AjmxNX_OeJmUgBBrgTSPZFYNjHo9JNw2dOxrmlPAPTodPDVhxZ_bG3INE-auyP7XmnnDmrgfPHb0x0PHKKX0amTZIyPhPlt-F-ZwEOz69vh94WtOLVgXFa5RwcHlirBSeQFpCT60wfuo0)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e72aa89efe364a18a028413713dcd184&_e=-1OK8aFEUjih8_8raUCIHk1e-01DZ0Z1z8ZTznuaIf13l9mhNLT_qxm-ygjgr7cdCA4lhhCor5eo5Pr5PJLf_tMe5kmF1wgLol9dfX9C6Y1LtxlzktI5np769ppyk0B8eBVkc7DAYcwyU0ra24FreeY5lx6j8rFM4CBVXcHKasw7UYoyY_nTWiDxxTGkaAyIgBBX0yMLJ1uj8-jLOoZzvA%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click [here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=e72aa89efe364a18a028413713dcd184&_t=jL0Dz8tQhwIaZmERWEDpzN916wI49y7WgBnSAqzB-Xv0xUN7MzS44tN4R1ppvjlusyMTq50sU6UdJTulBx4UikRfjPRKaIlqSK4PoeIOf1S8szYWVQpLLfJzQmUJso77) to unsubscribe

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click to unsubscribe

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team — Donald Trump just nominated Matt Gaetz as his attorney general.

You heard that right.

This is the same Matt Gaetz who was once under investigation by the Justice Department for sex trafficking. The same Matt Gaetz who is currently under investigation by the House Ethics Committee. And the same Matt Gaetz who has been a megaphone for Donald Trump’s right-wing agenda for years.

It’s obvious that Matt Gaetz is grossly underqualified for the job of attorney general — but that doesn’t matter to Donald Trump.

Because this is what Trump and his MAGA allies stand for: chaos, extremism, and paying favor to their political allies — not the Colorado values we deserve to see represented in Congress.

clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] Team — Donald Trump just nominated Matt Gaetz as his attorney general. You heard that right. This is the same Matt Gaetz who was once under investigation by the Justice Department for sex trafficking. The same Matt Gaetz who is currently under investigation by the House Ethics Committee. And the same Matt Gaetz who has been a megaphone for Donald Trump’s right-wing agenda for years. It’s obvious that Matt Gaetz is grossly underqualified for the job of attorney general — but that doesn’t matter to Donald Trump. Because this is what Trump and his MAGA allies stand for: chaos, extremism, and paying favor to their political allies — not the Colorado values we deserve to see represented in Congress. Servant leadership in Congress has never been more important than it is right now .
