subject: We can’t let these wins go uncelebrated… 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Add your name now >>
| Friend, Democrats had some MAJOR Senate wins this year — _we can’t let them go uncelebrated!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85114?t=6&akid=18071%2E878179%2E4q5tCM) [**We’re sending an exclusive letter to our Democratic Senators, and there are only 100 spots for local Democrats. Claim your spot now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85114?t=7&akid=18071%2E878179%2E4q5tCM) | [100 SPOTS LEFT FOR LOCAL DEMOCRATS: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85114?t=8&akid=18071%2E878179%2E4q5tCM)
---
TO: Our Democratic Senators
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS! Dear newly elected Democratic Senators: _CONGRATULATIONS!_

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we had when we found out amazing Democrats like you would be fighting for us in the Senate.**

From Michigan to Wisconsin, you won in key battleground states that were absolutely _essential_ for Democrats — and we’re THRILLED!

**We know fighting against the MAGA mob’s vicious attacks wasn’t easy — _especially in such close races._**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on these outstanding victories and to continue to elect incredible Senate Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85114?t=9&akid=18071%2E878179%2E4q5tCM) | [100 SPOTS LEFT FOR LOCAL DEMOCRATS: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85114?t=10&akid=18071%2E878179%2E4q5tCM)
---
**__X A GRATEFUL DEMOCRAT__**
Thank you,

— The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18071%2E878179%2E4q5tCM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18071%2E878179%2E4q5tCM).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18071%2E878179%2E4q5tCM) to request fewer emails. body:
Peter, we won't give up. We won't stop fighting. This is what we're going to do:

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97204504/512627508/2145040083?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=241116_ya_forward&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmUxNTliOC01N2E0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yrRB1m57C7arvO6JjH_XNCsFZJH_CrAf2N1XMjY20Bc=)
---
Peter, I know many of us are still reeling from last week's election results. We don't yet know how much of the extremist Project 2025 agenda Donald Trump will put into place, but we do know that four more years of his unhinged rule will threaten our freedoms, our planet, our reproductive rights, and our democracy. **We also know this, Peter — we will not give up, because the work we do right now matters.** I'm already in Washington, attending New Member Orientation, working with the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and building our legislative team. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97204505/512627509/2145040083?refcode=241116_ya_forward_img&ms=241116_ya_forward&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmUxNTliOC01N2E0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yrRB1m57C7arvO6JjH_XNCsFZJH_CrAf2N1XMjY20Bc=)** In the House, we're going to stand up _**every day**_ for working people and communities like ours. We will do everything in our power to defend our environment, our bodily autonomy, and our democratic institutions. And the work to win back our House majority starts right now. Arizona will be a critical battleground in 2026 and beyond. Our year-round, grassroots organizing work will make a difference in those races. **[SUPPORT OUR WORK →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97204506/512627510/2145040083?refcode=241116_ya_forward&ms=241116_ya_forward&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmUxNTliOC01N2E0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yrRB1m57C7arvO6JjH_XNCsFZJH_CrAf2N1XMjY20Bc=)** I'm grateful to have you with me in this fight, Peter. Onward, — Yassamin
| **Yassamin Ansari is the Democratic nominee for AZ-03,** and former Vice Mayor of Phoenix. She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help.

**Will you support her campaign? ** **[Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97204507/512627511/2145040083?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=e2e159b8-57a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=241116_ya_forward&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmUxNTliOC01N2E0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yrRB1m57C7arvO6JjH_XNCsFZJH_CrAf2N1XMjY20Bc=)** **[GIVE Weekly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97204508/512627512/2145040083?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=e2e159b8-57a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=241116_ya_forward&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmUxNTliOC01N2E0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yrRB1m57C7arvO6JjH_XNCsFZJH_CrAf2N1XMjY20Bc=)**

Onward, — Yassamin | Yassamin Ansari is the Democratic nominee for AZ-03, and former Vice Mayor of Phoenix. She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help. Will you support her campaign? = = PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS | | | | ---|---|---|--- Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States

body:

---
It’s Derek Tran,

I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue.

I wanted to reach out and give you an update on our race: _**We are just 58 votes shy of taking the lead.**_

Every ballot drop has brought us closer to taking the lead in this toss-up race, but victory is going to come down to counting _every single vote._
**
[**We need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund to help us count every vote and Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats? # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

name: Truth to Power
subject: Did you catch Katie on MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39309%2E3422442%2EANz129)
Derek, did you catch Katie on MSNBC?
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21245?t=2&akid=39309%2E3422442%2EANz129)
Katie broke out her trusty whiteboard to break down exactly how Trump’s economic plan is going to hurt the American people.
1: **Tariffs:** Trump has made clear that he plans to enact tariffs on goods coming into the United States. When companies pay more, they pass that cost along to us—the consumers.
2: **Weaken antitrust:** The whole point of antitrust is to create competition. Guess what competition does? It lowers prices.
3: **Deport workers:** If the government deports workers or reduces immigration in areas where we need workers, labor costs go up for businesses. Then, what do businesses do? They pass that cost increase along to consumers.
**[Take a moment to watch Katie’s helpful breakdown on MSNBC on Trump’s economic plans and learn more about how his policies could hurt your pocketbook.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21245?t=3&akid=39309%2E3422442%2EANz129)**
[Watch Now](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21245?t=4&akid=39309%2E3422442%2EANz129)
We appreciate all that you do,
Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241116-39309&amounts=&t=5&refcode2=39309_3422442_ANz129&akid=39309%2E3422442%2EANz129)**

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Targeting my husband and President Trump
body:
For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=121a2ced6b8f4d05a40646f50d7f9ade&_e=HdbazutHHN3xpzOx7CmVeHFxHbHGFvkDGDcEgvNDdpeVawl6_hXinBHL3Q91KdspV1IdaI6SB6cFHK5lTWSxEI9gYPFKsgKiMbA7qUajlkipT6nOdxChnHJlj4B5WgShwU9sJYLq-Zyz1MjJf-I2NcBbeEIaEpYdjO3WMvZgwo2lZ6hvc2MYtWjqGhLdTK-KSuxXJUmJPZb6gcdsATxTykNetYkjME1ZOq3AyF8C9mJmBwprvkcUMUHm8p-ykkhLdURZUGqjsIhzmncrVVTl5fWe3MaS1E0t80CfG7YuxUqBaSSesF10Pghah4f1VjGiFbXGVHiDSBVkC1gAO9Kr83uX7gN2VOo2ZACmuWxW3ikOBgQJf0BpK8Ycdhk0IYZFvASqXTE6-WTe1NLj-XTo3Q%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=121a2ced6b8f4d05a40646f50d7f9ade&_e=HdbazutHHN3xpzOx7CmVeHFxHbHGFvkDGDcEgvNDdpeVawl6_hXinBHL3Q91KdspV1IdaI6SB6cFHK5lTWSxEI9gYPFKsgKiMbA7qUajlkipT6nOdxChnHJlj4B5WgShwU9sJYLq-Zyz1MjJf-I2NcBbeEIaEpYdjO3WMvZgwo2lZ6hvc2MYtWjqGhLdTK-KSuxXJUmJPZb6gcdsATxTykNetYkjME1ZOq3AyF8C9mKEXjLqCp-kD7tutlsfxakzOuP6-T1DCLL-1WXASTXPYv6QnPSCt8Cz9ijca8w8vCKvVG3hNyRL4xXwVqS_lAI8xqnHLlMhWE4fMseFJAzE8PdzWrCkRDZeFqE9LMlixIPRvV5-RR48Enl2KA0XFi9HHRQjOsnUInZefEAGVGqkCg%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=121a2ced6b8f4d05a40646f50d7f9ade&_e=HdbazutHHN3xpzOx7CmVeHFxHbHGFvkDGDcEgvNDdpeVawl6_hXinBHL3Q91KdspV1IdaI6SB6cFHK5lTWSxEI9gYPFKsgKiMbA7qUajlkipT6nOdxChnHJlj4B5WgShwU9sJYLq-Zyz1MjJf-I2NcBbeEIaEpYdjO3WMvZgwo2lZ6hvc2MYtWjqGhLdTK-KSuxXJUmJPZb6gcdsATxTykNetYkjME1ZOq3AyF8C9mLqbrwlhfwI2l1aMQkCole1KAeg4CBCImPMfkZNm9qTEhC3Ku2A6xIs8Ivlgy0WftmlicV2OvFR3neV0u4vObbBYNBigXqZOo1gizzPkGBR1eZ0E0PuDYEp_gTSy4JfZKu9AVeyxi6Nb7sSjhApBqSd6DUYSrcK39--cHp_UFPKwQ%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=121a2ced6b8f4d05a40646f50d7f9ade&_e=HdbazutHHN3xpzOx7CmVeHFxHbHGFvkDGDcEgvNDdpeVawl6_hXinBHL3Q91KdspV1IdaI6SB6cFHK5lTWSxEI9gYPFKsgKiMbA7qUajlkipT6nOdxChnHJlj4B5WgShwU9sJYLq-Zyz1MjJf-I2NcBbeEIaEpYdjO3WMvZgwo2lZ6hvc2MYtWjqGhLdTK-KSuxXJUmJPZb6gcdsATxTykNetYkjME1ZOq3AyF8C9mLuXFRIfuyQqDkobgcIm89EbAjSz6bDnPynS-nOqu0SlS_1CwXrasauVhy0-sDghnz4lT2x4rzCtSTU493LEyiWFlc6NYuuwv6Lg2mSOEgvlVzHtQerPzeVx_M3Egkwg0K_0Iy0UGKD0ua9u60ZMdd1kKupo6gT7OF1rSyoTZmPcw%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

clean_body: For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. Dear Fellow Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! I’m as cool as a cucumber.
You have to be when the Fake News is calling our MAGA Movement “evil” on national television.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
I got real tired of seeing them lying about us with no repercussions whatsoever.
So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight _**one-on-one**_?
That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressman to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself.
But I just went on MSNBC & what I heard made me realize we still have _**[so much work to do.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a968685d5fb1466b8bac7c7da1b65dde&_e=JOOnFX5FCQOdSh9VKjmaqUcKhqjGpi2wTGaKVHHBxgoRSnt6aFNNBm1GIGVXbus4OzhTHxIuZNaZq-NWkQCo-gY7itvDyjZ3-Dv-uBBdvIwwHmrNFuAq9TZlT8TznLotPtF1xG12xpccb-hIO3S_E0mJgBAzt7BNuYL7m-DjlT0tl7-hJMZHpgEJ9xEod2Qr7967izvvnPne_kIAovOTS4xKc0VduAOgh8ZiUGprb61xXCj47UrVf90FwE_G_OZ6jITGrH1CMiho_7KYTPwkVIYBgJpsW0uVc5rkyWB2dx1MKoOj87d_56U0ECNty4yakixKZ7VUEzJ1iW8aMIAsQGUvRZBe6Cq43zh_-EO8lLfKUZ0sfKpyfQJ3bKL6Coz46MFjUzgPXwZ6kkJPHDjSQYOi984vjDfsTekmzJmm5_c%3D)**_
They interrogated me, demanding to know if I thought that President-Elect Trump was too dangerous to be in the White House, then even hinted that he wasn’t qualified to be President.
**I kept my cool and picked their phony narratives apart piece by piece like clockwork.**
Problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense every single day until he’s inaugurated, and if no one challenges them, their lies could seriously get out of hand.
I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight.
_**[So please, can you chip into Fake News Offensive Fund today?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a968685d5fb1466b8bac7c7da1b65dde&_e=JOOnFX5FCQOdSh9VKjmaqUcKhqjGpi2wTGaKVHHBxgoRSnt6aFNNBm1GIGVXbus4OzhTHxIuZNaZq-NWkQCo-gY7itvDyjZ3-Dv-uBBdvIwwHmrNFuAq9TZlT8TznLotPtF1xG12xpccb-hIO3S_E0mJgBAzt7BNuYL7m-DjlT0tl7-hJMZHpgEJ9xEod2Qr7967izvvnPne_kIAovOTS4xKc0VduAOgh8ZiUGprb61xXCj47UrVf90FwE_G_OZ6Gv9FS_ifQSj-y-bG80QMXhIXWznKRcRr-AOwkqUWQpOjT96-mPJHW4adUkizUsVP-2_dZVHjT4pkKfgh_ULXPpPsdUoF7zuGhoDCdoi-n-ElVIyfaATgyIgU8xggwzMGbsrXc6_xFuyS6sbY4NmqVXTSIUKwoEQIl4qqdqZ2IOM%3D)**_ _****__****_

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: MASSIVE UPDATE!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MACKENZIE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | **MASSIVE UPDATE!** PA Dems are actively defying the Supreme Court! Earlier this year the Pennsylvania Supreme Court made a**EARTH SHATTERING** ruling. They decided that all invalid ballots need to be **THROWN OUT!** Well, Democrats in my home state think they know better. They just decided to**IGNORE** the Supreme Court and count these ballot anyway. But don’t take it from me, just see what the commissioner said herself. “We all know that precedent by a court doesn’t matter anymore in this country... if I violate this law it’s because I want a court to pay attention to it” I could hardly believe it myself. Well, I have something to say about this! And the Democrat commissioners of Bucks County aren’t going to like it. These out-of-control Dems need to be **HELD ACCOUNTABLE!** My name is Ryan Mackenzie. I’m a state representative, smart conservative, proud father, and Trump-endorsed candidate. I just won a hard-fought race to get rid of Pennsylvania's most liberal Congresswoman. And I’m not finished fighting. In a few months, I’ll be on my way to Washington to help Donald Trump**DRAIN THE SWAMP!** And it’s all thanks to patriots like you. But we can’t afford to let 2024 be a lifetime victory. We must do everything we can to make PA a solid red state. And that all starts with holding out-of-control Liberals accountable and bringing **ELECTION INTEGRITY** to the keystone state. I want patriots like you behind me when I champion free and secure elections in D.C. Add your name now and join me in **DEMANDING** election integrity in this country. I’ll be taking this petition with me to Washington on day one and I want your name on the list! It’s not just the right thing to do. It’s what this country deserves!

clean_body: She has every dirty trick in the book memorized and isn’t afraid to pull all the punches if it means gaining an inch on destroying President Trump and his legacy. Pelosi has been out to get Trump since Day 1 | | | | BREAKING NEWS: NANCY PELOSI OFFICIALLY FILES FOR RE-ELECTION | | | "STOP THE PELOSI MACHINE" First, Nancy Pelosi thought President Trump would NEVER be elected... Then, when the American people elected Trump as our 45th President, she called President Trump an "ENEMY" in the White House... BUT, she didn't stop there. She vowed to NEVER let President Trump return to Washington, D.C. and named him a "threat to the American political system." NOW, she is hoping to make good on her promise and will stop at nothing to see President Trump FAIL. Remember, this is the same woman who said: " I decided a while ago that Donald Trump will never set foot in the White House again as president of the United States or in any other capacity," THAT IS FOR THE AMERICAN PEOPLE TO DECIDE AND WE HAVE SPOKEN! Friend - the Pelosi Machine is a well-oiled operation with FOUR decades of insider political knowledge and know-how. She has every dirty trick in the book memorized and isn't afraid to pull all the punches if it means gaining an inch on destroying President Trump and his legacy. "If we want to defend our America First House Majority and stop the Pelosi Machine, we need your help right here and right now! Nancy Pelosi has every resource at her disposal so we need each and every patriot reading this pitches in. Are you ready to fight the Pelosi machine? "** | | | "YES: I WILL DO MY PART!" | | | "STOP THE PELOSI MACHINE >> " | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by November 30.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7ef6bdf56fac4688b415194273fbc3c7&_e=ckpup42vdqxg3RzOjnc1OOdIHbyJk2Ym3VFapLI8hUstRbGc71APcE52d6s6q95ntsOf5C9GNHg0A4dq1x9RVPeVuzW-H6UnIziyEie9BuZtp9cxyDmcEIVADq10QpBS6cuvZvpzhDCX0Cxjj6plOdG7LC5_N7V50TooySdw2tMOmOhJucKj_FyYjlrade0va_wErHTNDjAkRZm6jIjHiNl71G3TMsqao143426Nz6JNjFRApHRUJ5bN9wGB_7UWsPFMoQVYB8ubG1vEHS7PnVZhB4B93DWEpNSXkrsp9Hf8_x9xbwuxzUjLe7vNfVuLdKnIHdrnPYBzYZmO5yZtcWx957SdPWho0hWgKfNHYdYsC7qiP5rJRdUkX0fOj0du_goD2G1mg56TsP_zr09xng%3D%3D)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

body:

⏰ Time is running out ⏰ Pennsylvania voters’ voices must be heard — and we’re running out of time. **[Please rush a contribution right now to power our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241116-5?refcode=em20241116-5&refcode2=4864_552475_L69ldR&akid=4864%2E552475%2EL69ldR)** **[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241116-5?refcode=em20241116-5&refcode2=4864_552475_L69ldR&akid=4864%2E552475%2EL69ldR)**

We won’t stop fighting to ensure that every Pennsylvanian’s voice is heard. With a razor-thin margin and tens of thousands of votes left to count, we need resources ASAP.

name: Overhaul PAC
subject: MAKE AMERICA HEALTHY AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Overhaul PAC
body:
| | | **MAKE AMERICA HEALTHY AGAIN!** Trump just made another **HUGE** appointment. And it’s sending **SHOCKWAVES** through Washington. He just put RFK Jr. in charge of the Department of Health and Human Services. It’s everything he had ever prayed for. And it has the Left in full panic mode. They’re doing everything in their power to get in the way of Trump and his appointments. They’re getting ready to send the Senate into **DEADLOCK** just to spite Trump. They know that RFK and Trump's other new secretaries would be a **DISASTER** for the deep state. So they’re going to fight like hell to stop him. Well, we’re not going to just stand by and let them do it! Sign our petition now and **DEMAND** that the Senate confirms Pres. Trumps appointments. Even though we took back the Senate, it won’t stop the Left. They are going to work with RINOs to try and stop **MAGA.** Well, we have a message for them. If you get in the way of the **MAGA** movement, **YOUR GONE! ** And we won’t forget your name. Join us now, and send the Senate a message. “We won’t stop fighting until America is great again!”
